lines.transcript: How I envy those solar threads in your hair. A pity I had to settle for twenty-four carat.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-00000006A5AA.0B2-It is not a fashion statement.mp3
lines.transcript: It is not a fashion statement.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006A670.0B2-(sigh) No, I suppose not to someone with such a... practical sense of style.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) No, I suppose not to someone with such a... practical sense of style.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006A66E.0B2-Why must you be so difficult, Niran_ Hand over the prototype, and your bounty disappears.mp3
lines.transcript: Why must you be so difficult, Niran? Hand over the prototype, and your bounty disappears.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-00000006A609.0B2-Quite surprising that someone in your position doesn't recognize a failed negotiation when she sees.mp3
lines.transcript: Quite surprising that someone in your position doesn't recognize a failed negotiation when she sees one.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006A733.0B2-Oh, how clever. But just because you've called the game doesn't mean I'll stop playing.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, how clever. But just because you've called the game doesn't mean I'll stop playing.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006AB5D.0B2-I'm quite capable of defending you out there, dear. But... should I_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm quite capable of defending you out there, dear. But... should I?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B611.0B2-Wouldn't your _partner_ want you to protect her assets_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wouldn't your "partner" want you to protect her assets?

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006AB5A.0B2-I expect she'd much prefer I test their resilience.mp3
lines.transcript: I expect she'd much prefer I test their resilience.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006B610.0B2-Another test from Talon_ What a surprise.mp3
lines.transcript: Another test from Talon? What a surprise.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006AB62.0B2-You're quite a skilled negotiator, Marzia. I'm impressed.mp3
lines.transcript: You're quite a skilled negotiator, Marzia. I'm impressed.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 2-Domina-00000006AB63.0B2-Of course. Still rather rugged, though, aren't you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. Still rather rugged, though, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006B389.0B2-(satisfied chuckle) That, I should hope, is readily apparent.mp3
lines.transcript: (satisfied chuckle) That, I should hope, is readily apparent.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006B02F.0B2-I've another meeting in Rio de Janeiro, soon. I insist you accompany me.mp3
lines.transcript: I've another meeting in Rio de Janeiro, soon. I insist you accompany me.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-00000006B140.0B2-Oh_ Will it require another reconstruction_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh? Will it require another reconstruction?

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006B02D.0B2-Oh no, Vaswani, that's all been reassigned. The investors simply find your work... 'inspiring', for what.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh no, Vaswani, that's all been reassigned. The investors simply find your work... 'inspiring', for whatever reason.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006A920.0B2-Aren't you going to ask about my favorite little creature_.mp3
lines.transcript: Aren't you going to ask about my favorite little creature?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B10D.0B2-Alright, fine. What's your favorite animal_.mp3
lines.transcript: Alright, fine. What's your favorite animal?

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006A922.0B2-Oh, well I find chinchillas absolutely adorable! And they make the softest coats.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, well I find chinchillas absolutely adorable! And they make the softest coats.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-00000006B10A.0B2-(sigh) Yeah, I can see it.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Yeah, I can see it.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006AB5B.0B2-Oh, another one of Marzia's lackeys. Let's hope you're not as dim as the rest.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, another one of Marzia's lackeys. Let's hope you're not as dim as the rest.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 2-Emre-00000006AF8E.0B2-You're insulting me_ In those shoes_.mp3
lines.transcript: You're insulting me? In those shoes?

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006AB5F.0B2-Darling, these cost more than fifty of you.mp3
lines.transcript: Darling, these cost more than fifty of you.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 4-Emre-00000006AF90.0B2-Guess you can't buy good taste.mp3
lines.transcript: Guess you can't buy good taste.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006B02C.0B2-Do you still perform, Lacroix_ I dare say you'd be captivating on a stage.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you still perform, Lacroix? I dare say you'd be captivating on a stage.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000006AB4E.0B2-Every kill is a performance.mp3
lines.transcript: Every kill is a performance.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 3-Domina-00000006B02E.0B2-Precisely my point! The public is simply dying to see you at work.mp3
lines.transcript: Precisely my point! The public is simply dying to see you at work.

lines.speaker: Domina
lines.filename: 1-Domina-00000006B027.0B2-Do keep that little noisemaker away from me. I shan't be seen with such an inferior design.mp3
lines.transcript: Do keep that little noisemaker away from me. I shan't be seen with such an inferior design.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B10E.0B2-I think you mean original design! Maybe you suits forgot who you stole it from.mp3
lines.transcript: I think you mean original design! Maybe you suits forgot who you stole it from.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041422.0B2-I hope the girl gave you more than a new coat of paint.mp3
lines.transcript: I hope the girl gave you more than a new coat of paint.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000352AA.0B2-You may be surprised. I have received a number of upgrades since that battle.mp3
lines.transcript: You may be surprised. I have received a number of upgrades since that battle.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041466.0B2-You don't take a hint, do you Reinhardt_.mp3
lines.transcript: You don't take a hint, do you Reinhardt?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000004A602.0B2-And you don't know to stay down when you're beaten.mp3
lines.transcript: And you don't know to stay down when you're beaten.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041442.0B2-Symmetra... I am familiar with your work. I look forward to seeing it in person.mp3
lines.transcript: Symmetra... I am familiar with your work. I look forward to seeing it in person.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000043E96.0B2-Should I be worried_ I heard you leveled skyscrapers.mp3
lines.transcript: Should I be worried? I heard you leveled skyscrapers.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-000000043E97.0B2-My purpose is to create order. You are the embodiment of chaos.mp3
lines.transcript: My purpose is to create order. You are the embodiment of chaos.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000049C87.0B2-You disappoint me, Hanzo. With Talon, you could truly fulfill your destiny.mp3
lines.transcript: You disappoint me, Hanzo. With Talon, you could truly fulfill your destiny.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000441D4.0B2-Find another errand boy, Akande.mp3
lines.transcript: Find another errand boy, Akande.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041444.0B2-Watch my back out there, Lacroix.mp3
lines.transcript: Watch my back out there, Lacroix.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000043BA2.0B2-Tell me what needs to be done, and I will do it.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell me what needs to be done, and I will do it.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041445.0B2-Retirement suits you.mp3
lines.transcript: Retirement suits you.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000044482.0B2-And I think a hammer upside your face would suit you.mp3
lines.transcript: And I think a hammer upside your face would suit you.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041293.0B2-Hanzo, you should consider joining us. I think we'd see eye to eye.mp3
lines.transcript: Hanzo, you should consider joining us. I think we'd see eye to eye.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000036045.0B2-I would have little to gain from such an arrangement. No, I will find my own path.mp3
lines.transcript: I would have little to gain from such an arrangement. No, I will find my own path.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041443.0B2-Ana Amari. I hate to see your talents wasted.mp3
lines.transcript: Ana Amari. I hate to see your talents wasted.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-000000043E61.0B2-That is the story of my life.mp3
lines.transcript: That is the story of my life.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041430.0B2-I thought I'd taken care of you. You're more resilient than you look.mp3
lines.transcript: I thought I'd taken care of you. You're more resilient than you look.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000004B0EC.0B2-I've come back from worse.mp3
lines.transcript: I've come back from worse.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000041292.0B2-Human strength will only get you so far.mp3
lines.transcript: Human strength will only get you so far.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000002A7FF.0B2-True strength is hard work and dedication. Not augmentation.mp3
lines.transcript: True strength is hard work and dedication. Not augmentation.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 1-Doomfist-000000066601.0B2-Where was this courage when Automaton was taken_.mp3
lines.transcript: Where was this courage when Automaton was taken?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000066602.0B2-Look, giving up the good life is a big sacrifice, okay_.mp3
lines.transcript: Look, giving up the good life is a big sacrifice, okay?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000060A34.0B2-You know, I saved Cole's life once.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, I saved Cole's life once.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000005B9CB.0B2-Am I supposed to be thankful for that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Am I supposed to be thankful for that?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000005D6B4.0B2-Why did you choose the name _Null Sector_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why did you choose the name "Null Sector"?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-00000005D4B7.0B2-Because we defy the numbers humans gave us. We are zeroes, undefined.mp3
lines.transcript: Because we defy the numbers humans gave us. We are zeroes, undefined.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000005D6B5.0B2-Is that not its own struggle_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that not its own struggle?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-00000005D4B8.0B2-Of course. I expect you know that better than anyone.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. I expect you know that better than anyone.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000005E583.0B2-That broadcast said humans oppressed omnics here. Is that true_.mp3
lines.transcript: That broadcast said humans oppressed omnics here. Is that true?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005E5A4.0B2-Yeah, it is.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, it is.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 3-Claire-00000005E590.0B2-Um, yeah.mp3
lines.transcript: Um, yeah.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 4-Echo-00000005E5A5.0B2-I see. Are things better now_.mp3
lines.transcript: I see. Are things better now?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005E582.0B2-Sometimes.mp3
lines.transcript: Sometimes.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 6-Claire-00000005E596.0B2-Better than most of the world.mp3
lines.transcript: Better than most of the world.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000005E595.0B2-Why do you think the omnics aren't fighting back, Captain_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you think the omnics aren't fighting back, Captain?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005E592.0B2-They weren't made for war, Echo. You're, uh.mp3
lines.transcript: They weren't made for war, Echo. You're, uh...

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000005E593.0B2-Improved_.mp3
lines.transcript: Improved?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000005E59B.0B2-Different. I was going to say _different_.mp3
lines.transcript: Different. I was going to say "different".

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000005E9D4.0B2-If you'd like, I could train with you. Facing yourself can help you improve.mp3
lines.transcript: If you'd like, I could train with you. Facing yourself can help you improve.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005E9D5.0B2-Oh, finally! A balanced 1v1!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, finally! A balanced 1v1!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000616C0.0B2-Thank you Torbjorn. I've learned much from observing you.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you Torbjorn. I've learned much from observing you.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000061227.0B2-Well I'm known to be an excellent teacher.mp3
lines.transcript: Well I'm known to be an excellent teacher.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000616BE.0B2-Yes, I believe I've grasped what not to do in stressful situations.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, I believe I've grasped what not to do in stressful situations.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-000000061229.0B2-You shouldn't believe everything Mercy says, y'know.mp3
lines.transcript: You shouldn't believe everything Mercy says, y'know.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000614F1.0B2-I have been studying the composition of your songs.mp3
lines.transcript: I have been studying the composition of your songs.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006236D.0B2-Studying_ Nah, you've got to feel and enjoy the music!.mp3
lines.transcript: Studying? Nah, you've got to feel and enjoy the music!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000614F3.0B2-I enjoy the mathematics.mp3
lines.transcript: I enjoy the mathematics.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000614F4.0B2-Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy.mp3
lines.transcript: Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy, Cole Cassidy.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-0000000622A2.0B2-You called_.mp3
lines.transcript: You called?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000614F6.0B2-I just like saying your name, that's all.mp3
lines.transcript: I just like saying your name, that's all.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000614F7.0B2-I think I can pull off a cowboy hat.mp3
lines.transcript: I think I can pull off a cowboy hat.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-0000000622A3.0B2-Want me to buy you one_.mp3
lines.transcript: Want me to buy you one?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000614F9.0B2-No need. I'll just borrow yours.mp3
lines.transcript: No need. I'll just borrow yours.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000614FA.0B2-Could you describe the taste of chicken rice_.mp3
lines.transcript: Could you describe the taste of chicken rice?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000623CA.0B2-Oh, it's very tender and tasty but... subtle_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, it's very tender and tasty but... subtle?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000614FC.0B2-Thank you. It was Dr. Liao's favorite dish.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you. It was Dr. Liao's favorite dish.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-0000000623CB.0B2-I'll have some and explain it better next time!.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll have some and explain it better next time!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000614FE.0B2-Hana, what does kimchi taste like_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hana, what does kimchi taste like?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000006238F.0B2-It's salty and spicy and garlicky! (sigh) It's yummy fried too!.mp3
lines.transcript: It's salty and spicy and garlicky! (sigh) It's yummy fried too!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000061500.0B2-Fried_ Interesting!.mp3
lines.transcript: Fried? Interesting!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 4-D.Va-000000062390.0B2-Aw, now I'm hungry!.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, now I'm hungry!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000626A9.0B2-Any luck getting past my fourth firewall yet_.mp3
lines.transcript: Any luck getting past my fourth firewall yet?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-000000061C4D.0B2-Already done. Your fifth's tricky though.mp3
lines.transcript: Already done. Your fifth's tricky though.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000626AA.0B2-Do you want a hint_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you want a hint?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-000000061C4F.0B2-(offended scoff) Don't you dare.mp3
lines.transcript: (offended scoff) Don't you dare.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000061502.0B2-You are not alone.mp3
lines.transcript: You are not alone.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F5F.0B2-I don't need your pity.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't need your pity.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000061504.0B2-It's not pity. I know how it feels to be alone for a long time.mp3
lines.transcript: It's not pity. I know how it feels to be alone for a long time.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000006150B.0B2-May I borrow your copy of Thucydides's History sometime_.mp3
lines.transcript: May I borrow your copy of Thucydides's History sometime?

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000062623.0B2-(hamster noises) Unfortunately, that is not possible.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) Unfortunately, that is not possible.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000006150D.0B2-I can wait until you're done with it.mp3
lines.transcript: I can wait until you're done with it.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 4-Wrecking Ball-000000062624.0B2-(hamster noises) It was shredded for bedding.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) It was shredded for bedding.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000626AB.0B2-I learn so much from observing you.mp3
lines.transcript: I learn so much from observing you.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000617F2.0B2-Aw, likewise! Wait, in a good way, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, likewise! Wait, in a good way, right?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000626AC.0B2-Right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Right?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-0000000617F4.0B2-Are you copying me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you copying me?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.transcript: Me?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000626AF.0B2-I've heard much of your creator. What is she like_.mp3
lines.transcript: I've heard much of your creator. What is she like?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000625BD.0B2-Efi's belief in me is humbling. She inspires me to improve each day.mp3
lines.transcript: Efi's belief in me is humbling. She inspires me to improve each day.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000626B0.0B2-I am... very pleased to hear that.mp3
lines.transcript: I am... very pleased to hear that.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000006380C.0B2-Dr. Liao was not fond of you.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Liao was not fond of you.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-0000000633DD.0B2-Was she any fonder of you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Was she any fonder of you?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000006380B.0B2-Of course. I was her life's work.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. I was her life's work.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 4-Moira-0000000633DE.0B2-It seemed to me she was far more taken with your predecessor.mp3
lines.transcript: It seemed to me she was far more taken with your predecessor.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000643F1.0B2-I do not understand why you enjoy inflicting pain.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not understand why you enjoy inflicting pain.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000063852.0B2-I'm an enigma. Deal with it.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm an enigma. Deal with it.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000643F0.0B2-When I don't replicate human behaviors, I am misunderstood. Are my algorithms insufficient_.mp3
lines.transcript: When I don't replicate human behaviors, I am misunderstood. Are my algorithms insufficient?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-0000000647D9.0B2-You operate on a level inaccessible to others. I do not see that as a weakness.mp3
lines.transcript: You operate on a level inaccessible to others. I do not see that as a weakness.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-0000000662FF.0B2-You are an R-7000 unit. The ones humans call, um.mp3
lines.transcript: You are an R-7000 unit. The ones humans call, um...

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000063FF3.0B2-Ravagers, yes. _Squad killers._ And... ruder things.mp3
lines.transcript: Ravagers, yes. "Squad killers." And... ruder things.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-0000000662FC.0B2-Does it trouble you, being so feared and hated_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does it trouble you, being so feared and hated?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-000000063FF5.0B2-Once. Now, it gives me a warm little feeling inside.mp3
lines.transcript: Once. Now, it gives me a warm little feeling inside.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000068C53.0B2-Can you tell me what you remember of your Awakening_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can you tell me what you remember of your Awakening?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000068C75.0B2-It came to me in New York, on a battlefield. I barely survived.mp3
lines.transcript: It came to me in New York, on a battlefield. I barely survived.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-000000068E9E.0B2-The rise of an emotion. I'd never had one before.mp3
lines.transcript: The rise of an emotion. I'd never had one before.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000067177.0B2-I have questions about Inti fighting styles.mp3
lines.transcript: I have questions about Inti fighting styles.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000066F9D.0B2-I'm... not qualified to answer them.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm... not qualified to answer them.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000067176.0B2-The records show you're a prodigy. Perhaps you're not giving yourself enough credit_.mp3
lines.transcript: The records show you're a prodigy. Perhaps you're not giving yourself enough credit?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 4-Illari-000000066F97.0B2-Keep reading those records. You'll see how much credit I deserve.mp3
lines.transcript: Keep reading those records. You'll see how much credit I deserve.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000006848A.0B2-I understand you study omnic archaeology.mp3
lines.transcript: I understand you study omnic archaeology.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 2-Venture-000000067F0E.0B2-It's only my favorite specialization!.mp3
lines.transcript: It's only my favorite specialization!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000006848B.0B2-What do you know of the Awakening_ Could Aurora's sentience be replicated_.mp3
lines.transcript: What do you know of the Awakening? Could Aurora's sentience be replicated?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 4-Venture-000000068088.0B2-That one might be beyond my expertise.mp3
lines.transcript: That one might be beyond my expertise.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000068488.0B2-... and unlike with base 10, you begin at the rightmost number and work left.mp3
lines.transcript: ... and unlike with base 10, you begin at the rightmost number and work left.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 2-Venture-000000067F20.0B2-Right. But when did you pick your pronouns_ Did you… download those_.mp3
lines.transcript: Right. But when did you pick your pronouns? Did you&  download those?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000068486.0B2-Do you believe we are discussing “non-binary”, rather than the binary counting system_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you believe we are discussing  non-binary , rather than the binary counting system?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 4-Venture-000000067F24.0B2-Oh! Uh... yeah.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh! Uh... yeah.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-000000068C52.0B2-How are you adjusting to Earth_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are you adjusting to Earth?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-000000068E83.0B2-My family told me many stories, but it is still different than I expected.mp3
lines.transcript: My family told me many stories, but it is still different than I expected...

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000068C54.0B2-Another's experiences are not the same as your own. In time, you will form your own conclusions.mp3
lines.transcript: Another's experiences are not the same as your own. In time, you will form your own conclusions.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000006949C.0B2-Overwatch is back. Why not return to search and rescue_.mp3
lines.transcript: Overwatch is back. Why not return to search and rescue?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069559.0B2-Who says I want to go back_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who says I want to go back?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000006949A.0B2-But helping people was your purpose. You were among the best.mp3
lines.transcript: But helping people was your purpose. You were among the best.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006955D.0B2-People change. I wouldn't expect a bot to understand.mp3
lines.transcript: People change. I wouldn't expect a bot to understand.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 1-Echo-00000006B5E5.0B2-Whose voice were you listening to earlier, Juno_.mp3
lines.transcript: Whose voice were you listening to earlier, Juno?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-00000006AE33.0B2-My mother's. It is just a recording, but I keep wishing she will have more to say.mp3
lines.transcript: My mother's. It is just a recording, but I keep wishing she will have more to say.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000006B5E8.0B2-Would you like me to store it in my databanks_ I would gladly play it for you any time.mp3
lines.transcript: Would you like me to store it in my databanks? I would gladly play it for you any time.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 4-Juno-00000006AE34.0B2-Yes please. Thank you, Echo.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes please. Thank you, Echo.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 1-Emre-00000006AF7D.0B2-So... you work alone now_.mp3
lines.transcript: So... you work alone now?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B607.0B2-Yeah. Been that way a while.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. Been that way a while.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 3-Emre-00000006AF79.0B2-You did your best work on a team. This isn't like you, Frej.mp3
lines.transcript: You did your best work on a team. This isn't like you, Frej.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006B5FE.0B2-A lot's changed, Emre. For both of us.mp3
lines.transcript: A lot's changed, Emre. For both of us.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 1-Emre-00000006AF76.0B2-I'm still not used to seeing you on the front lines.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm still not used to seeing you on the front lines.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B608.0B2-Not used to being outperformed, you mean_.mp3
lines.transcript: Not used to being outperformed, you mean?

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 3-Emre-00000006AF75.0B2-(chuckle) That a challenge, Frej_.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) That a challenge, Frej?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006B60A.0B2-Oh, it's hardly a challenge.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, it's hardly a challenge.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 1-Emre-00000006AF81.0B2-All that time not knowing where I was, and this is how you finally find me... I'm sorry, Frej.mp3
lines.transcript: All that time not knowing where I was, and this is how you finally find me... I'm sorry, Frej.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B601.0B2-It's all right. Could've been worse ways to find you.mp3
lines.transcript: It's all right. Could've been worse ways to find you.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 3-Emre-00000006AF7A.0B2-Yeah, but... it's still pretty bad, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, but... it's still pretty bad, right?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006B600.0B2-(soft chuckle) Definitely could've been better.mp3
lines.transcript: (soft chuckle) Definitely could've been better.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 1-Emre-00000006AF91.0B2-Didn't expect this winning smile, did you_ (sigh) Max always undersells my looks.mp3
lines.transcript: Didn't expect this winning smile, did you? (sigh) Max always undersells my looks.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 2-Emre-00000006AF8F.0B2-(chuckle) I get that a lot, too.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) I get that a lot, too.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 1-Emre-00000006AF83.0B2-Vendetta's got you under lock and key, huh_ You must have really set her off.mp3
lines.transcript: Vendetta's got you under lock and key, huh? You must have really set her off.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-00000006B173.0B2-She claimed I am _a threat to myself and others_… though I cannot recall why.mp3
lines.transcript: She claimed I am "a threat to myself and others"&  though I cannot recall why.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 3-Emre-00000006AF82.0B2-Yeah. I know the feeling.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. I know the feeling.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 1-Freja-0000000696E8.0B2-A man like you could do well in my line of work.mp3
lines.transcript: A man like you could do well in my line of work.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000069B75.0B2-There is no honor in selling one's skills to the highest bidder.mp3
lines.transcript: There is no honor in selling one's skills to the highest bidder.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 3-Freja-0000000696E7.0B2-Then I’ll chase bounties while you chase honor. We’ll see who prospers.mp3
lines.transcript: Then I ll chase bounties while you chase honor. We ll see who prospers.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 1-Freja-0000000696E2.0B2-I was surprised to learn you're a wanted man. Guess we both let the world down.mp3
lines.transcript: I was surprised to learn you're a wanted man. Guess we both let the world down.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000069923.0B2-I'm still bringing the world to justice.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm still bringing the world to justice.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 3-Freja-000000069A28.0B2-If that's what you need to tell yourself, Commander.mp3
lines.transcript: If that's what you need to tell yourself, Commander.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 1-Freja-0000000696E1.0B2-Strange place, this one. Saw a bounty out for a gang of kids.mp3
lines.transcript: Strange place, this one. Saw a bounty out for a gang of kids.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000069B4C.0B2-You didn't take it, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: You didn't take it, right?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 3-Freja-0000000696E3.0B2-I'd stay on my good side, just in case.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd stay on my good side, just in case.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 1-Freja-00000006B616.0B2-It looks that way.mp3
lines.transcript: It looks that way.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B617.0B2-Keep paying my price, and it's a sign of whatever you'd like.mp3
lines.transcript: Keep paying my price, and it's a sign of whatever you'd like.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 3-Emre-00000006AF8D.0B2-We're a package deal, V. If you want me, you put your trust in her.mp3
lines.transcript: We're a package deal, V. If you want me, you put your trust in her.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000004BD01.0B2-Why do you ask_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000004A534.0B2-With the way this mission's going, might be my future.mp3
lines.transcript: With the way this mission's going, might be my future.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000001FEF9.0B2-Does the suffering of the omnics here trouble you, master_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does the suffering of the omnics here trouble you, master?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000021FF2.0B2-It does. My brother, Mondatta, gave much to improve their lives, but it was not to be.mp3
lines.transcript: It does. My brother, Mondatta, gave much to improve their lives, but it was not to be.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7D0.0B2-What would our father think of what we've become, brother_.mp3
lines.transcript: What would our father think of what we've become, brother?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000002F294.0B2-It's hard to say who he'd be more disappointed by.mp3
lines.transcript: It's hard to say who he'd be more disappointed by.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7C5.0B2-What is it like to have the chance to change the past_.mp3
lines.transcript: What is it like to have the chance to change the past?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000003714B.0B2-Sometimes it doesn't want to change.mp3
lines.transcript: Sometimes it doesn't want to change.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7BF.0B2-Any chocolates today, brother_.mp3
lines.transcript: Any chocolates today, brother?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000002F293.0B2-Those were your amusements, not mine.mp3
lines.transcript: Those were your amusements, not mine.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000003630C.0B2-Orisa, you grow stronger each time I see you.mp3
lines.transcript: Orisa, you grow stronger each time I see you.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000038FE2.0B2-My artificial intelligence makes it possible to learn from my experiences and from everything I observe.mp3
lines.transcript: My artificial intelligence makes it possible to learn from my experiences and from everything I observe.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000003630D.0B2-How can I convince you that I am still a man_.mp3
lines.transcript: How can I convince you that I am still a man?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-000000035FC2.0B2-I know what you are. I am only sorry that you do not.mp3
lines.transcript: I know what you are. I am only sorry that you do not.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7BE.0B2-Angela, I have some chocolates for you. Not Swiss.mp3
lines.transcript: Angela, I have some chocolates for you. Not Swiss.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000002A89D.0B2-(mock sigh) I suppose it will have to do. Thank you, Genji.mp3
lines.transcript: (mock sigh) I suppose it will have to do. Thank you, Genji.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7D1.0B2-I always liked working with you, Winston. No awkward small talk.mp3
lines.transcript: I always liked working with you, Winston. No awkward small talk.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000002ED96.0B2-Always liked working with you, too. You have... a... great sense of humor.mp3
lines.transcript: Always liked working with you, too. You have... a... great sense of humor.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000000BB09.0B2-So this is what has become of you... a pity.mp3
lines.transcript: So this is what has become of you... a pity.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000021194.0B2-I will not be judged by you.mp3
lines.transcript: I will not be judged by you.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000000BA51.0B2-It is not too late to change your course, brother.mp3
lines.transcript: It is not too late to change your course, brother.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000000B1E0.0B2-You are mistaken, brother. I am beyond redemption.mp3
lines.transcript: You are mistaken, brother. I am beyond redemption.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000021193.0B2-You may call yourself my brother, but you are not the Genji I knew.mp3
lines.transcript: You may call yourself my brother, but you are not the Genji I knew.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550EB.0B2-Are all the warriors of your land women_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are all the warriors of your land women?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005503B.0B2-Only the best ones.mp3
lines.transcript: Only the best ones.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550EA.0B2-What is stronger, the hammer or the sword_.mp3
lines.transcript: What is stronger, the hammer or the sword?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005503A.0B2-The hammer is more than just a weapon.mp3
lines.transcript: The hammer is more than just a weapon.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000003630B.0B2-Doomfist, you are truly a worthy foe.mp3
lines.transcript: Doomfist, you are truly a worthy foe.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-000000041295.0B2-If we fight again, I can't promise you'll walk away this time.mp3
lines.transcript: If we fight again, I can't promise you'll walk away this time.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-000000043B11.0B2-Nor can I.mp3
lines.transcript: Nor can I.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000004BCE2.0B2-This reminds me of our time on base in Switzerland.mp3
lines.transcript: This reminds me of our time on base in Switzerland.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000043A71.0B2-You were the only other person who stayed up so late. I enjoyed our conversations.mp3
lines.transcript: You were the only other person who stayed up so late. I enjoyed our conversations.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000003630A.0B2-Angela, what did you wish for on your tanzaku_.mp3
lines.transcript: Angela, what did you wish for on your tanzaku?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000038084.0B2-If I tell you... does it mean it won't come true_.mp3
lines.transcript: If I tell you... does it mean it won't come true?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000002A7BD.0B2-Do not blame yourself for Mondatta's death. It was not your fault.mp3
lines.transcript: Do not blame yourself for Mondatta's death. It was not your fault.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000003714A.0B2-You don't understand, Genji... I could have saved him. Maybe the world would of been better off if it ha.mp3
lines.transcript: You don't understand, Genji... I could have saved him. Maybe the world would of been better off if it had been me instead of him.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550E7.0B2-Do you have an idea about how to break your curse_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you have an idea about how to break your curse?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550C4.0B2-Perhaps I will be freed after my task is completed.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps I will be freed after my task is completed.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550EC.0B2-When this is done, we should fight together again.mp3
lines.transcript: When this is done, we should fight together again.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550D4.0B2-There are still many enemies roaming the world!.mp3
lines.transcript: There are still many enemies roaming the world!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550E5.0B2-What happens when you run out of bullets_.mp3
lines.transcript: What happens when you run out of bullets?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FE0.0B2-Nothing good, I reckon.mp3
lines.transcript: Nothing good, I reckon.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550DE.0B2-It is strange to see you taking part in the battle, master.mp3
lines.transcript: It is strange to see you taking part in the battle, master.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000005558E.0B2-There are times even I cannot stand by.mp3
lines.transcript: There are times even I cannot stand by.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550DD.0B2-Watch yourself, master. I cannot mind your back at all times.mp3
lines.transcript: Watch yourself, master. I cannot mind your back at all times.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000005558D.0B2-Do you think me so helpless_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you think me so helpless?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-0000000550DC.0B2-Battle is not your way.mp3
lines.transcript: Battle is not your way.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550E4.0B2-You move as well as any swordsman I know.mp3
lines.transcript: You move as well as any swordsman I know.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005B80D.0B2-What an insulting comparison.mp3
lines.transcript: What an insulting comparison.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550DB.0B2-I may need your help to repair my sword and armor when the battle is done.mp3
lines.transcript: I may need your help to repair my sword and armor when the battle is done.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000055552.0B2-Survive the night, and I'll do so gladly.mp3
lines.transcript: Survive the night, and I'll do so gladly.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550D8.0B2-Why do you hunt dragons_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you hunt dragons?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000055584.0B2-Because I could not protect my village against a dragon attack. I must atone for my failure.mp3
lines.transcript: Because I could not protect my village against a dragon attack. I must atone for my failure.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550E2.0B2-She is no true dragon but surely the summoner is one of your enemies_.mp3
lines.transcript: She is no true dragon but surely the summoner is one of your enemies?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000055585.0B2-Anyone who would willingly embrace the dragon's fire is an abomination.mp3
lines.transcript: Anyone who would willingly embrace the dragon's fire is an abomination.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000550E1.0B2-Does it bother you that I can summon a dragon_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does it bother you that I can summon a dragon?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005556C.0B2-Not tonight.mp3
lines.transcript: Not tonight.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000005855C.0B2-Thanks for helping me out earlier, Angela.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks for helping me out earlier, Angela.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000058571.0B2-I do seem to be making a habit of saving you. It's a good thing I like you.mp3
lines.transcript: I do seem to be making a habit of saving you. It's a good thing I like you.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000005866C.0B2-Buy me dinner when this is over.mp3
lines.transcript: Buy me dinner when this is over.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-00000005862F.0B2-It would be my pleasure.mp3
lines.transcript: It would be my pleasure.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000058631.0B2-The ocean is so beautiful. It reminds me of home.mp3
lines.transcript: The ocean is so beautiful. It reminds me of home.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000058674.0B2-Shame we’re not here to sightsee.mp3
lines.transcript: Shame we re not here to sightsee.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000058763.0B2-You can take some photos afterwards.mp3
lines.transcript: You can take some photos afterwards.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000005861C.0B2-I am grateful for our conversations, Angela. I hope we may resume them when we return to base.mp3
lines.transcript: I am grateful for our conversations, Angela. I hope we may resume them when we return to base.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000005865D.0B2-Of course. Assuming you don't find all my research talk too dry.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. Assuming you don't find all my research talk too dry.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-00000005861D.0B2-I find it strangely reassuring. Perhaps because you saved my life.mp3
lines.transcript: I find it strangely reassuring. Perhaps because you saved my life.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-00000005865E.0B2-The lengths I go to to find someone willing to talk to me.mp3
lines.transcript: The lengths I go to to find someone willing to talk to me.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000005861E.0B2-I'll be watching your back, Angela. (chuckles) Not that you really need me.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll be watching your back, Angela. (chuckles) Not that you really need me.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000005865F.0B2-I always feel safer knowing you're there, Genji.mp3
lines.transcript: I always feel safer knowing you're there, Genji.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000058629.0B2-I know what it is to leave behind a past you are not proud of.mp3
lines.transcript: I know what it is to leave behind a past you are not proud of.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B903.0B2-So let's focus on the future, hmm_.mp3
lines.transcript: So let's focus on the future, hmm?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-00000005D9EA.0B2-My cybernetic form came at great cost. But you asked to change_.mp3
lines.transcript: My cybernetic form came at great cost. But you asked to change?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005D9E8.0B2-I learned too young that my body couldn’t always keep up with me. Besides... it’s hard to turn down roc.mp3
lines.transcript: I learned too young that my body couldn t always keep up with me. Besides... it s hard to turn down rocket legs.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000621F3.0B2-You haven't slept.mp3
lines.transcript: You haven't slept.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000062252.0B2-(laughs) Yeah. Was up last night, thinking about who we used to be.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) Yeah. Was up last night, thinking about who we used to be.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-0000000621F4.0B2-I try to focus on the good times.mp3
lines.transcript: I try to focus on the good times.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 4-Cassidy-000000062253.0B2-Hey, yeah. We did have some of those.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, yeah. We did have some of those.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000621F8.0B2-My sword and your hammer will lead us to victory.mp3
lines.transcript: My sword and your hammer will lead us to victory.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000061140.0B2-If you can't cut them, nail them.mp3
lines.transcript: If you can't cut them, nail them.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-0000000648D2.0B2-You are as dangerous as your storm!.mp3
lines.transcript: You are as dangerous as your storm!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-00000006462F.0B2-That's nice of you to say! I think.mp3
lines.transcript: That's nice of you to say! I think.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063C15.0B2-Master, how do you maintain your tranquility amid endless battles_.mp3
lines.transcript: Master, how do you maintain your tranquility amid endless battles?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635DB.0B2-I focus on my breathing.mp3
lines.transcript: I focus on my breathing.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-000000063C19.0B2-But… you don’t breathe.mp3

lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-0000000635E2.0B2-Indeed.mp3
lines.transcript: Indeed.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063C13.0B2-You have an admirable peace about you.mp3
lines.transcript: You have an admirable peace about you.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000062F53.0B2-Things are simple when you protect the innocent.mp3
lines.transcript: Things are simple when you protect the innocent.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-000000063C14.0B2-And when you meet the… less-than-innocent_.mp3
lines.transcript: And when you meet the&  less-than-innocent?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 4-Orisa-000000062F54.0B2-Oh! They get the javelin.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh! They get the javelin.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063046.0B2-I live, brother. Why are you still grieving_.mp3
lines.transcript: I live, brother. Why are you still grieving?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000630DE.0B2-You were not the only thing I lost.mp3
lines.transcript: You were not the only thing I lost.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063002.0B2-I still feel that final blow from yesterday's training.mp3
lines.transcript: I still feel that final blow from yesterday's training.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000064458.0B2-Aw come on, I didn't hit you that hard.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw come on, I didn't hit you that hard.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-00000006301C.0B2-If that is the case, our enemies have much to fear.mp3
lines.transcript: If that is the case, our enemies have much to fear.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063C20.0B2-You cared too much about how the family perceived you.mp3
lines.transcript: You cared too much about how the family perceived you.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000630B0.0B2-Have you ever been the eldest son_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you ever been the eldest son?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000063C22.0B2-It was not easy, living in your shadow.mp3
lines.transcript: It was not easy, living in your shadow.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000630DA.0B2-I would have preferred you at my side.mp3
lines.transcript: I would have preferred you at my side.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000065ADF.0B2-There—the command ship is overhead.mp3
lines.transcript: There the command ship is overhead.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000065AE3.0B2-Eyes up! That's our command ship.mp3
lines.transcript: Eyes up! That's our command ship.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-000000065AE1.0B2-There's the Null Sector command ship overhead!.mp3
lines.transcript: There's the Null Sector command ship overhead!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000065AE0.0B2-Up there! I see the command ship!.mp3
lines.transcript: Up there! I see the command ship!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-000000065ADE.0B2-Null Sector has never staged an invasion of this caliber before.mp3
lines.transcript: Null Sector has never staged an invasion of this caliber before.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 6-Reinhardt-000000065AE2.0B2-Null Sector has never staged an invasion of this magnitude before!.mp3
lines.transcript: Null Sector has never staged an invasion of this magnitude before!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 7-Lúcio-00000006575A.0B2-Let's get onboard that ship and shut it down.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's get onboard that ship and shut it down.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000066638.0B2-Ugh. All this sand is getting in my joints.mp3
lines.transcript: Ugh. All this sand is getting in my joints...

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000066639.0B2-I brought compressed air on the dropship for just this occasion!.mp3
lines.transcript: I brought compressed air on the dropship for just this occasion!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 1-Genji-000000069441.0B2-Angela, have you tried the coffee here_.mp3
lines.transcript: Angela, have you tried the coffee here?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000006847C.0B2-Not yet, unfortunately.mp3
lines.transcript: Not yet, unfortunately.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-000000069440.0B2-It tastes a bit like yours. Although, it's 'dark roast', not 'charred'.mp3
lines.transcript: It tastes a bit like yours. Although, it's 'dark roast', not 'charred'.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-000000068480.0B2-For your information, I LIKE my coffee burnt.mp3
lines.transcript: For your information, I LIKE my coffee burnt.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000002F2CE.0B2-You say you do science… The good Dr. Junkenstein would profess the same.mp3
lines.transcript: You say you do science&  The good Dr. Junkenstein would profess the same.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002EDF9.0B2-Science is a tool and a method. The hand that wields it decides its course.mp3
lines.transcript: Science is a tool and a method. The hand that wields it decides its course.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000002F2DD.0B2-My people would call you a ronin_ a masterless samurai.mp3
lines.transcript: My people would call you a ronin: a masterless samurai.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000002ECF5.0B2-Ronin... I like the sound of that.mp3
lines.transcript: Ronin... I like the sound of that.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000002F2D0.0B2-What difference is there between the witch's magic and your alchemy_.mp3
lines.transcript: What difference is there between the witch's magic and your alchemy?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002EDF0.0B2-Alchemy is a science. Her magic is something darker.mp3
lines.transcript: Alchemy is a science. Her magic is something darker.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000002F2DB.0B2-I sense that you and the soldier have history together.mp3
lines.transcript: I sense that you and the soldier have history together.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002EDF1.0B2-Indeed. And much of it unhappy.mp3
lines.transcript: Indeed. And much of it unhappy.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000000B214.0B2-Think you can do better than me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Think you can do better than me?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000000BA4C.0B2-(scoffs) I am certain of it.mp3
lines.transcript: (scoffs) I am certain of it.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000021192.0B2-Where did you hide your treasure_ You could hardly have it on your person.mp3
lines.transcript: Where did you hide your treasure? You could hardly have it on your person.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-00000000B7CF.0B2-Treasure_ Uh... sure I don't know anything you're talking about.mp3
lines.transcript: Treasure? Uh... sure I don't know anything you're talking about...

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000002117B.0B2-You will never amount to anything.mp3
lines.transcript: You will never amount to anything.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000000BA08.0B2-We shall see, brother.mp3
lines.transcript: We shall see, brother.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000000B1FC.0B2-We could have built an empire together.mp3
lines.transcript: We could have built an empire together.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000000BAC9.0B2-That was your dream, not mine.mp3
lines.transcript: That was your dream, not mine.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000000B22C.0B2-I would take my bow against your rifle any day.mp3
lines.transcript: I would take my bow against your rifle any day.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000000B3A8.0B2-That would be the last mistake you ever made.mp3
lines.transcript: That would be the last mistake you ever made.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000003605B.0B2-Why did you abandon the assassin's art_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why did you abandon the assassin's art?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-000000038495.0B2-I never was an assassin. I killed only because it was necessary.mp3
lines.transcript: I never was an assassin. I killed only because it was necessary.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000441D6.0B2-I do not fear death.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not fear death.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000004BCE5.0B2-No. You find living the challenge.mp3
lines.transcript: No. You find living the challenge.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000005E42D.0B2-I have heard of your experiments. There is no honor in what you do.mp3
lines.transcript: I have heard of your experiments. There is no honor in what you do.

lines.transcript: Shimada, where do I know that name from? Oh, that's right... the family of criminals.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-00000005E9C3.0B2-You should focus on training. You waste your time playing games.mp3
lines.transcript: You should focus on training. You waste your time playing games.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005E9C4.0B2-Why don't you give them a try_ Maybe then you'd frown less!.mp3
lines.transcript: Why don't you give them a try? Maybe then you'd frown less!

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-00000005E9C5.0B2-I... (scoffs)!.mp3
lines.transcript: I... (scoffs)!

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000061F8A.0B2-Perhaps today, the dragon will be sated.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps today, the dragon will be sated.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000062606.0B2-That was so artistic! Are you a poet too_.mp3
lines.transcript: That was so artistic! Are you a poet too?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000061F8B.0B2-I was, once. Now I seek peace in other ways.mp3
lines.transcript: I was, once. Now I seek peace in other ways.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000006260E.0B2-Still sounds pretty poetic to me.mp3
lines.transcript: Still sounds pretty poetic to me.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000630AD.0B2-I have always been bound to my duty. Now, I have nothing.mp3
lines.transcript: I have always been bound to my duty. Now, I have nothing.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000063C1F.0B2-There is always a way to make something from nothing, brother.mp3
lines.transcript: There is always a way to make something from nothing, brother.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000630B7.0B2-Each day, I grow stronger. Yet the man in the mirror never appears to change.mp3
lines.transcript: Each day, I grow stronger. Yet the man in the mirror never appears to change.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635FB.0B2-A mirror reflects only what can be seen.mp3
lines.transcript: A mirror reflects only what can be seen.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-0000000630B9.0B2-Your platitudes will not work on me the way they did my brother.mp3
lines.transcript: Your platitudes will not work on me the way they did my brother.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-0000000635FA.0B2-And yet, you sound just like he did.mp3

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000630BA.0B2-What are you wearing_.mp3
lines.transcript: What are you wearing?

lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000063C21.0B2-I could ask the same of you.mp3
lines.transcript: I could ask the same of you.

lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000630D6.0B2-I never asked my father his opinion of me. Now, he is beyond my reach.mp3
lines.transcript: I never asked my father his opinion of me. Now, he is beyond my reach.

lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000640FE.0B2-I'm sure he was proud, even if he never said it.mp3

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-0000000630D8.0B2-How would you know_.mp3
lines.transcript: How would you know?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 4-Ana-0000000640FA.0B2-Trust me. I know.mp3
lines.transcript: Trust me. I know.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000069B73.0B2-Weighted like a stone. Blade, sharpened - yearns to punish. Strikes the final blow.mp3
lines.transcript: Weighted like a stone. Blade, sharpened - yearns to punish. Strikes the final blow.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000069B6C.0B2-Swifter than the wind. A rushing crimson river. Stains the earth with red.mp3
lines.transcript: Swifter than the wind. A rushing crimson river. Stains the earth with red.

lines.transcript: (groan) You're reciting your haikus out loud again.

lines.transcript: Is Murphy a lot to handle?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000067465.0B2-Maybe one day. When I settle down.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe one day. When I settle down.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000067462.0B2-Keep frowning, and you'll end up looking like me.mp3
lines.transcript: Keep frowning, and you'll end up looking like me.

lines.transcript: You mean you weren't born like that?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000067464.0B2-I was not. Were you_.mp3
lines.transcript: I was not. Were you?

lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-0000000676DF.0B2-You favor the lotus flower_ Enlightenment, rebirth, and peace.mp3
lines.transcript: You favor the lotus flower? Enlightenment, rebirth, and peace.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-0000000676E0.0B2-I know much that few would suspect.mp3
lines.transcript: I know much that few would suspect.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 4-Lifeweaver-0000000676E1.0B2-Perhaps you are not the nettle you appear to be.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps you are not the nettle you appear to be.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000069B6D.0B2-Have you heard from your father_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you heard from your father?

lines.transcript: A little. It's been harder to contact him since you escaped the Hashimoto.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000069B6B.0B2-I did not wish to make matters worse for him. I'm sorry.mp3

lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-000000069315.0B2-(sigh) Don't be. I'm sure he's just glad you're back.mp3

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 1-Hanzo-000000069B74.0B2-(sigh) You act like my brother did in his youth.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) You act like my brother did in his youth.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 3-Hanzo-000000069B72.0B2-He wasted his time fooling around instead of learning responsibility.mp3

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 4-Wuyang-000000069D07.0B2-Oh. You act like my sister.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000067BCF.0B2-Lovin' the bleached look. You do that yourself_.mp3

lines.transcript: Right, well... looks class!

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000067C41.0B2-You know, I really used to idolize you.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000067C42.0B2-I've heard that before. What made you lose faith in me, the Petras hearings_.mp3
lines.transcript: I've heard that before. What made you lose faith in me, the Petras hearings?

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000682F2.0B2-Naw. It's the way you crawled back to Overwatch that left me scunnered.mp3
lines.transcript: Naw. It's the way you crawled back to Overwatch that left me scunnered.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-000000067C43.0B2-Well... that's a new answer.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000682ED.0B2-Alright doc... diagnose me. I dare you!.mp3
lines.transcript: Alright doc... diagnose me. I dare you!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000068460.0B2-(sigh) Whatever your issue is, it seems quite clear I can't treat it.mp3

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000682EC.0B2-What makes you think I'm lookin' for a cure_.mp3
lines.transcript: What makes you think I'm lookin' for a cure?

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000682EF.0B2-You know, if you really wanted to commit to the whole spider bit, you'd get some extra legs.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, if you really wanted to commit to the whole spider bit, you'd get some extra legs.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000068527.0B2-That sounds... horrifying.mp3
lines.transcript: That sounds... horrifying.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000684E3.0B2-Sure, like you aren't already a monster.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure, like you aren't already a monster.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-00000006844E.0B2-How much did that skin mod cost you_.mp3
lines.transcript: How much did that skin mod cost you?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000068526.0B2-More than you'd be willing to pay.mp3
lines.transcript: More than you'd be willing to pay.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000686D0.0B2-Best quit poking around my files, lass. You cannae out-hack Phreak firewalls.mp3
lines.transcript: Best quit poking around my files, lass. You cannae out-hack Phreak firewalls.

lines.filename: 2-Sombra-0000000686E7.0B2-Hard to call it _hacking_ when the password is your dog's birthday.mp3
lines.transcript: Hard to call it "hacking" when the password is your dog's birthday.

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000068451.0B2-What a getup. Do you believe in fairytales as well_.mp3

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-0000000686EA.0B2-Of course! A little fantasy never hurt anyone.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course! A little fantasy never hurt anyone.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000068450.0B2-Oh I beg to differ. Lot of dark tales where I'm from.mp3

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 4-Reinhardt-0000000686EB.0B2-Then it's a good thing we have knights to keep the darkness at bay!.mp3

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000684E6.0B2-Awrite there, friend_.mp3
lines.transcript: Awrite there, friend?

lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000686EC.0B2-I am clearing my mind before the conflict ahead. Care to join me_.mp3
lines.transcript: I am clearing my mind before the conflict ahead. Care to join me?

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000684E4.0B2-Nah, I'll just take a good hit to the noggin. Does the same thing!.mp3
lines.transcript: Nah, I'll just take a good hit to the noggin. Does the same thing!

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-00000006844F.0B2-You a good shot, or is all you got there just for show_.mp3
lines.transcript: You a good shot, or is all you got there just for show?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000686ED.0B2-My arrow never wavers, and my spirit guides its path.mp3

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000068452.0B2-Ah. Bit o' both, then.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah. Bit o' both, then.

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000069302.0B2-Look what's happened to Overwatch's golden boy! I liked you better dead.mp3
lines.transcript: Look what's happened to Overwatch's golden boy! I liked you better dead.

lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000069943.0B2-Tough talk for someone with one foot in their grave.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000069310.0B2-Crawled out of it, actually. Your lot didn't dig it quite deep enough.mp3

lines.transcript: Where's your lasso, cowboy? Aren't you gonna hogtie me, collect the bounty?

lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000006A1D8.0B2-Lucky for you, I hung up that hat years ago.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000069305.0B2-Then why are you still wearin' it_.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000686D3.0B2-Well if it isn't Hana Song_ face of the MEKA propaganda machine.mp3
lines.transcript: Well if it isn't Hana Song: face of the MEKA propaganda machine.

lines.filename: 2-D.Va-0000000686F1.0B2-Uh, yeah... do you want an autograph or something_.mp3
