lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000686D5.0B2-You've really bought in, haven't you_ Right shame.mp3
lines.transcript: You've really bought in, haven't you? Right shame.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000069308.0B2-You ever think of markin' up that chassis of yours_ I know a good tattoo artist.mp3
lines.transcript: You ever think of markin' up that chassis of yours? I know a good tattoo artist.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000069387.0B2-I hadn't considered decoration. I don't know what I would want.mp3
lines.transcript: I hadn't considered decoration. I don't know what I would want.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000069307.0B2-Well, what do you like_.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, what do you like?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 4-Echo-000000069386.0B2-I like... myself. Just as I am.mp3
lines.transcript: I like... myself. Just as I am.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000068FD3.0B2-Heard you paid a high price for that mod. Did you even want it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Heard you paid a high price for that mod. Did you even want it?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C95.0B2-My community was depending on me.mp3
lines.transcript: My community was depending on me.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000068FD1.0B2-Hardly the words of someone with much say in the matter.mp3
lines.transcript: Hardly the words of someone with much say in the matter.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 4-Illari-000000068C88.0B2-I wish it was that simple.mp3
lines.transcript: I wish it was that simple.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000068FD2.0B2-Do I spook ye_ Look like you're seeing spirits.mp3
lines.transcript: Do I spook ye? Look like you're seeing spirits.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000686F4.0B2-Wha—no! You're just, um... unique!.mp3
lines.transcript: Wha no! You're just, um... unique!

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000686CB.0B2-(soft chuckle) Nae bother, lassie. I'm used to it.mp3
lines.transcript: (soft chuckle) Nae bother, lassie. I'm used to it.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000686DA.0B2-You're not so scary, you know.mp3
lines.transcript: You're not so scary, you know.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-0000000686F5.0B2-(dark chuckle) Someone has a death wish.mp3
lines.transcript: (dark chuckle) Someone has a death wish.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000686DC.0B2-Aye, like you wouldn't believe.mp3
lines.transcript: Aye, like you wouldn't believe.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-00000006930D.0B2-How're you holdin' up, chief_ Is Talon pushing you too hard_.mp3
lines.transcript: How're you holdin' up, chief? Is Talon pushing you too hard?

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-000000069B35.0B2-The universe expands without limits. My colleagues are merely helping me further my own.mp3
lines.transcript: The universe expands without limits. My colleagues are merely helping me further my own.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000069306.0B2-Aye, but... are you happy with that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Aye, but... are you happy with that?

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 4-Sigma-000000069B37.0B2-Ah. The results have been... inconclusive.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah. The results have been... inconclusive.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000686CD.0B2-Ashe told me all about you.mp3
lines.transcript: Ashe told me all about you.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-0000000686F6.0B2-Is that right_ What'd she have to say_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that right? What'd she have to say?

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-0000000686D2.0B2-That you betrayed her and left Deadlock in the dust. For Overwatch!.mp3
lines.transcript: That you betrayed her and left Deadlock in the dust. For Overwatch!

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 4-Cassidy-0000000686F7.0B2-Not quite how I remember it... but I reckon you wouldn't care to hear my side.mp3
lines.transcript: Not quite how I remember it... but I reckon you wouldn't care to hear my side.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-0000000687FA.0B2-Oi, I had them pinned!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oi, I had them pinned!

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000688C5.0B2-Bob's not passing up an easy target, Haz.mp3
lines.transcript: Bob's not passing up an easy target, Haz.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000068FCF.0B2-Braw! Glad you two are on my team.mp3
lines.transcript: Braw! Glad you two are on my team.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000688CF.0B2-(chuckle) Likewise.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Likewise.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 1-Hazard-000000069303.0B2-Heard you got into another scrap with the Hashimoto. The Yokai doin' alright_.mp3
lines.transcript: Heard you got into another scrap with the Hashimoto. The Yokai doin' alright?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000069312.0B2-We'll survive. We always do.mp3
lines.transcript: We'll survive. We always do.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 3-Hazard-000000069304.0B2-Have to hope for more than that, though, aye_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have to hope for more than that, though, aye?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-000000069317.0B2-Why do you think we keep fighting_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you think we keep fighting?

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 1-Iggy-000000066C81.0B2-A friend of mine used to say it was fear that drives people to do this sort of thing. Fear of what they do.mp3
lines.transcript: A friend of mine used to say it was fear that drives people to do this sort of thing. Fear of what they don't want to know.

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 2-Iggy-000000066C80.0B2-If only they would have gotten to know her.mp3
lines.transcript: If only they would have gotten to know her.

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 1-Iggy-000000066C92.0B2-Looks like it's going to need more batteries.mp3
lines.transcript: Looks like it's going to need more batteries.

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 2-Iggy-000000066C45.0B2-We omnics have power sources stashed all over King's Row. See what you can find!.mp3
lines.transcript: We omnics have power sources stashed all over King's Row. See what you can find!

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 1-Iggy-00000006701F.0B2-Look! That Null sector unit just stole a battery.mp3
lines.transcript: Look! That Null sector unit just stole a battery.

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 2-Iggy-000000067014.0B2-Find them before Null Sector does!.mp3
lines.transcript: Find them before Null Sector does!

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 1-Iggy-000000067021.0B2-That was some hardcore hacking, Lizzy!.mp3
lines.transcript: That was some hardcore hacking, Lizzy!

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 2-Iggy-000000067020.0B2-All right, made it through the last firewall.mp3
lines.transcript: All right, made it through the last firewall.

lines.speaker: Iggy
lines.filename: 3-Iggy-000000067022.0B2-Last firewall down. Null Sector's got serious security.mp3
lines.transcript: Last firewall down. Null Sector's got serious security.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066F95.0B2-(humming).mp3
lines.transcript: (humming)

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000671C0.0B2-Nice melody. Does it have a name_.mp3
lines.transcript: Nice melody. Does it have a name?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000066F9F.0B2-No. Sometimes I just hum when I'm thinking. I can stop.mp3
lines.transcript: No. Sometimes I just hum when I'm thinking. I can stop.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-0000000671BF.0B2-Humming_ Or thinking_.mp3
lines.transcript: Humming? Or thinking?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 5-Illari-000000066F98.0B2-(frustrated dismissive sound).mp3
lines.transcript: (frustrated dismissive sound)

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066B15.0B2-Did you see my last information request_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you see my last information request?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-0000000674CC.0B2-I did. Aren't you taking on too much, chica_.mp3
lines.transcript: I did. Aren't you taking on too much, chica?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000066DB4.0B2-That's for me to decide. Not you.mp3
lines.transcript: That's for me to decide. Not you.

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-0000000674CF.0B2-(sigh) I'll send you the relevant details.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I'll send you the relevant details.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066B10.0B2-Lúcio, have you heard_ About the winner of the Fútbol Championship_.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, have you heard? About the winner of the Fútbol Championship?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-0000000671D1.0B2-I... I don't want to talk about it.mp3
lines.transcript: I... I don't want to talk about it.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-0000000671D2.0B2-It was a fluke! That yellow card was ridiculous!.mp3
lines.transcript: It was a fluke! That yellow card was ridiculous!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-0000000671CE.0B2-It's only because the ref didn't see that foul from the first half!.mp3
lines.transcript: It's only because the ref didn't see that foul from the first half!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 5-Lúcio-0000000671D3.0B2-(frustrated sound) If they just would have hit that last penalty shot.mp3
lines.transcript: (frustrated sound) If they just would have hit that last penalty shot...

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 6-Lúcio-0000000671CF.0B2-Look, I believe in my team. We'll get 'em next time.mp3
lines.transcript: Look, I believe in my team. We'll get 'em next time.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 7-Lúcio-0000000671D0.0B2-It could've been worse. At least it wasn't like that Germany game.mp3
lines.transcript: It could've been worse. At least it wasn't like that Germany game.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C82.0B2-You have killed so many. How do you live with yourself_.mp3
lines.transcript: You have killed so many. How do you live with yourself?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000068528.0B2-I stopped being weak. You should do the same.mp3
lines.transcript: I stopped being weak. You should do the same.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066B0D.0B2-Hey. Guinea pig. If you don't do well, I'm throwing you in the oven.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey. Guinea pig. If you don't do well, I'm throwing you in the oven.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000069E00.0B2-(hamster noises) He says he would cook you too, but you are not seasoned enough.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He says he would cook you too, but you are not seasoned enough.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066DB1.0B2-Why do you apologize so much_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you apologize so much?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000066DFB.0B2-I guess there's a lot I feel sorry about. Don't you_.mp3
lines.transcript: I guess there's a lot I feel sorry about. Don't you?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000066DAD.0B2-It doesn't matter. Anyone I would apologize to is gone.mp3
lines.transcript: It doesn't matter. Anyone I would apologize to is gone.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000066DFA.0B2-Ah. I know how that feels.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah. I know how that feels.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066DAF.0B2-I didn't know monkeys needed glasses.mp3
lines.transcript: I didn't know monkeys needed glasses.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000066FE4.0B2-Actually, I'm a gorilla! And a scientist.mp3
lines.transcript: Actually, I'm a gorilla! And a scientist.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C8E.0B2-Can I pet your dog_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can I pet your dog?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000069322.0B2-My what_ Oh! Uh... it's not a dog.mp3
lines.transcript: My what? Oh! Uh... it's not a dog.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000068C94.0B2-But it looks like one. Is it a wolf_.mp3
lines.transcript: But it looks like one. Is it a wolf?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-000000069321.0B2-...You know what_ Just for you, it's a wolf.mp3
lines.transcript: ...You know what? Just for you, it's a wolf.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066DB0.0B2-Are you bigger than other rats because you're from the moon_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you bigger than other rats because you're from the moon?

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000066B80.0B2-(hamster noises) He says no. Scientists did this to him.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He says no. Scientists did this to him.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000066DB2.0B2-I'm sorry. What they did to you was wrong.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm sorry. What they did to you was wrong.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 4-Wrecking Ball-000000069E02.0B2-(hamster noises) Mistaking the hamster for vermin is wrong. Making him a genius was a gift.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) Mistaking the hamster for vermin is wrong. Making him a genius was a gift.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066F9A.0B2-I studied you in school. They said you were the best sniper in the world.mp3
lines.transcript: I studied you in school. They said you were the best sniper in the world.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000671AF.0B2-I'm sure some would disagree.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm sure some would disagree.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000066F9C.0B2-Like the sniper who shot out your eye_.mp3
lines.transcript: Like the sniper who shot out your eye?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 4-Ana-0000000671AD.0B2-(scoffs) She doesn't count.mp3
lines.transcript: (scoffs) She doesn't count.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C89.0B2-I don't understand how you're always smiling.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't understand how you're always smiling.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000069106.0B2-Life always finds ways to get us down. But only I can choose to keep my spirits up.mp3
lines.transcript: Life always finds ways to get us down. But only I can choose to keep my spirits up.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000066F9E.0B2-How do you work with that doctor after everything she did to you_ Don't you want revenge_.mp3
lines.transcript: How do you work with that doctor after everything she did to you? Don't you want revenge?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000068DE0.0B2-Her time will come.mp3
lines.transcript: Her time will come.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C8D.0B2-How did you end up like this_.mp3
lines.transcript: How did you end up like this?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000006944B.0B2-I refused to walk my family's path. This was the result.mp3
lines.transcript: I refused to walk my family's path. This was the result.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000068C93.0B2-And you still overcame that_.mp3
lines.transcript: And you still overcame that?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000069450.0B2-Only when I learned to accept the help I was offered.mp3
lines.transcript: Only when I learned to accept the help I was offered.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C9D.0B2-Don't you ever feel remorse for the pain you have caused_.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't you ever feel remorse for the pain you have caused?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-000000067F4F.0B2-Pain makes one stronger. You should know that better than anyone.mp3
lines.transcript: Pain makes one stronger. You should know that better than anyone.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C96.0B2-Why do you dig around in the past_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you dig around in the past?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 2-Venture-000000067F1C.0B2-How couldn't I! Every site's like a big history mystery just begging to be solved!.mp3
lines.transcript: How couldn't I! Every site's like a big history mystery just begging to be solved!

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-000000068C92.0B2-Everyone wants the truth until they find out what it costs.mp3
lines.transcript: Everyone wants the truth until they find out what it costs.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-000000068C90.0B2-Quit surprising me. It throws me off when you show up so suddenly.mp3
lines.transcript: Quit surprising me. It throws me off when you show up so suddenly.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006931C.0B2-Sorry, won't happen again.mp3
lines.transcript: Sorry, won't happen again...

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.transcript: Boo!

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 4-Illari-000000068C91.0B2-(sigh) Stop that!.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Stop that!

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-00000006A5A4.0B2-You weren't always a bounty hunter, right_ You saved people once.mp3
lines.transcript: You weren't always a bounty hunter, right? You saved people once.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006986D.0B2-Yeah. In another life.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. In another life.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-00000006A5A8.0B2-Don't you still want to help_.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't you still want to help?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-000000069870.0B2-(sigh) Let's just stay focused on the job. Okay_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Let's just stay focused on the job. Okay?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 1-Illari-00000006A5A7.0B2-Hey. Why do you cover your eyes when I channel solar energy_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey. Why do you cover your eyes when I channel solar energy?

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 2-Wuyang-00000006A0FE.0B2-Everyone knows it's not safe to look at the sun without sunglasses.mp3
lines.transcript: Everyone knows it's not safe to look at the sun without sunglasses.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 3-Illari-00000006A5A3.0B2-Um... It is not safe to look at the sun at all.mp3
lines.transcript: Um... It is not safe to look at the sun at all.

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 4-Wuyang-00000006A101.0B2-Oh. Pfft, I knew that. I was just testing you.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh. Pfft, I knew that. I was just testing you.

lines.speaker: Inarius
lines.filename: 1-Inarius-000000067369.0B2-Hellish minions haunt this dungeon's halls.mp3
lines.transcript: Hellish minions haunt this dungeon's halls.

lines.speaker: Inarius
lines.filename: 2-Inarius-0000000673BC.0B2-Fight back the demons to summon their masters!.mp3
lines.transcript: Fight back the demons to summon their masters!

lines.speaker: Inarius
lines.filename: 1-Inarius-0000000673E7.0B2-The Butcher rises from the dungeon's depths. Though his visage is a stain and his stench a curse, his b.mp3
lines.transcript: The Butcher rises from the dungeon's depths. Though his visage is a stain and his stench a curse, his battlecry is the most feared of all:

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-00000006799D.0B2-Fresh meat.mp3
lines.transcript: Fresh meat.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-00000006AE42.0B2-Are you speaking to me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you speaking to me?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 4-Juno-00000006AE43.0B2-Hm... perhaps I should prioritize _cat_ on my list of languages to learn.mp3
lines.transcript: Hm... perhaps I should prioritize "cat" on my list of languages to learn.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-00000005E9D7.0B2-You got a hamster in that mech_.mp3
lines.transcript: You got a hamster in that mech?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.transcript: Um... no?

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-00000005E9D6.0B2-Sure, sure... I'm watching you.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure, sure... I'm watching you.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-00000005FC73.0B2-You look like a bruiser. Wanna be my bodyguard_.mp3
lines.transcript: You look like a bruiser. Wanna be my bodyguard?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000006234F.0B2-Ha. I think you can take care of yourself.mp3
lines.transcript: Ha. I think you can take care of yourself.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-000000061ED1.0B2-How many widows have you made_ Roughly_.mp3
lines.transcript: How many widows have you made? Roughly?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-0000000620F0.0B2-I do not keep track.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not keep track.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-000000061ECE.0B2-Well I'm pretty sure I'm ahead.mp3
lines.transcript: Well I'm pretty sure I'm ahead.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-000000061ECF.0B2-I could have run Overwatch much better than you.mp3
lines.transcript: I could have run Overwatch much better than you.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F77.0B2-What would you have done differently_.mp3
lines.transcript: What would you have done differently?

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-000000061ED0.0B2-I would have caught all the bad guys, then cut their heads off.mp3
lines.transcript: I would have caught all the bad guys, then cut their heads off.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 4-Soldier_ 76-000000062F78.0B2-Hmm. Tempting.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmm. Tempting.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-0000000640D3.0B2-Are you, on average, more mechanical or more human_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you, on average, more mechanical or more human?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000006437C.0B2-Why_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why?

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-0000000640D4.0B2-Trying to figure out whether to scrap you for parts.mp3
lines.transcript: Trying to figure out whether to scrap you for parts.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000006437D.0B2-Consider the railgun before you decide.mp3
lines.transcript: Consider the railgun before you decide.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-0000000640D5.0B2-Mako, the Wreckers want you back. Thought you might like to know.mp3
lines.transcript: Mako, the Wreckers want you back. Thought you might like to know.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-000000063DC6.0B2-(Meaningful grunt).mp3
lines.transcript: (Meaningful grunt)

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-0000000640D6.0B2-Ha! They'll hate that. I'll pass it along.mp3
lines.transcript: Ha! They'll hate that. I'll pass it along.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-0000000640D7.0B2-What's the biggest axe you could make out of hard light_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's the biggest axe you could make out of hard light?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-0000000647E4.0B2-A kilometer tall_ But you would not be able to wield it.mp3

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-0000000640D8.0B2-Maybe you wouldn't.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe you wouldn't.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 1-Junker Queen-0000000640D9.0B2-Champ, I need ya to make me something else.mp3
lines.transcript: Champ, I need ya to make me something else.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 2-Junker Queen-0000000640DA.0B2-A robot guard dog for me dirt garden. Maybe it can fly, you decide.mp3

lines.transcript: Jamison Fawkes, channel nine news. Mr. Gunbot, sir, how do you think the battle's going to go?

lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000062BF9.0B2-(excited, talkative beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (excited, talkative beeps)

lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-0000000622E8.0B2-Could you repeat that in words_ Hold on, breaking news! The moon has fallen into the ocean!.mp3
lines.transcript: Could you repeat that in words? Hold on, breaking news! The moon has fallen into the ocean!

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000062333.0B2-Jamison Fawkes, interviewing this fancy robot. Any wisdom to share with us as the battle begins_.mp3
lines.transcript: Jamison Fawkes, interviewing this fancy robot. Any wisdom to share with us as the battle begins?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000621E2.0B2-Victory goes to those who maintain their focus.mp3
lines.transcript: Victory goes to those who maintain their focus.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-0000000622E7.0B2-Boring! Back to you, Natasha—Any car chases we could watch_.mp3
lines.transcript: Boring! Back to you, Natasha Any car chases we could watch?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-00000006233E.0B2-Cheers love! It's time to save the world!.mp3
lines.transcript: Cheers love! It's time to save the world!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000617F7.0B2-What, again_.mp3
lines.transcript: What, again?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000062F5A.0B2-You look like a gentleman who eats his own toenails!.mp3
lines.transcript: You look like a gentleman who eats his own toenails!

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F6F.0B2-Why the hell would you say that to someone_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why the hell would you say that to someone?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000062F5B.0B2-Just looking for something we might have in common….mp3
lines.transcript: Just looking for something we might have in common&

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000063D65.0B2-Wouldn't a scythe be more on brand_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wouldn't a scythe be more on brand?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000006384C.0B2-I prefer shotguns.mp3
lines.transcript: I prefer shotguns.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000063D66.0B2-Can't really harvest with them, but who am I to argue with Death himself_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can't really harvest with them, but who am I to argue with Death himself?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000065F21.0B2-My exquisitous Queen, I come bearing news of great import!.mp3
lines.transcript: My exquisitous Queen, I come bearing news of great import!

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 2-Junker Queen-000000063A3C.0B2-Not now, Ratjunk.mp3
lines.transcript: Not now, Ratjunk.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000065EF4.0B2-My name's Junkrat!.mp3
lines.transcript: My name's Junkrat!

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 4-Junker Queen-000000063A3E.0B2-No it isn't.mp3
lines.transcript: No it isn't.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000063D68.0B2-It's so hard to tell right from wrong. If only I had someone to give me guidance.mp3
lines.transcript: It's so hard to tell right from wrong. If only I had someone to give me guidance...

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000640EF.0B2-Mh hmm.mp3
lines.transcript: Mh hmm.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000063D62.0B2-Someone wise, and experienced! An adoptive mother, if you will.mp3
lines.transcript: Someone wise, and experienced! An adoptive mother, if you will.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 4-Ana-0000000640F0.0B2-Oh no. Absolutely not.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh no. Absolutely not.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000065F23.0B2-I was thinking of becoming an underwear model. How does one get pecs as hulking as yours_.mp3
lines.transcript: I was thinking of becoming an underwear model. How does one get pecs as hulking as yours?

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000067835.0B2-You wouldn't like it.mp3
lines.transcript: You wouldn't like it.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000065F22.0B2-Why_ Does it include work_ I can't stand work.mp3
lines.transcript: Why? Does it include work? I can't stand work.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-000000065F20.0B2-Mr. Wilhelm, I'm working on me resume. What sounds better_ _itinerant scoundrel,_ or _perspicacious rap.mp3
lines.transcript: Mr. Wilhelm, I'm working on me resume. What sounds better: "itinerant scoundrel," or "perspicacious rapscallion"?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000066795.0B2-(chuckle) Is there room for both_.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Is there room for both?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000065F1E.0B2-I knew you were the right bloke to ask! (laugh).mp3
lines.transcript: I knew you were the right bloke to ask! (laugh)

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-000000066387.0B2-He said all that_.mp3
lines.transcript: He said all that?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000065EF2.0B2-It was more like, _Gonna turn that bloke in. Worth a heap, hurr hurr hurr._.mp3
lines.transcript: It was more like, "Gonna turn that bloke in. Worth a heap, hurr hurr hurr."

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 4-Lifeweaver-000000066382.0B2-Thank you for the warning and the convincing impression.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you for the warning and the convincing impression.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-00000006933F.0B2-Y'know, we could always use a little extra firepower! The vault doors on these banks are getting awful.mp3
lines.transcript: Y'know, we could always use a little extra firepower! The vault doors on these banks are getting awful thick!

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000066A2C.0B2-Your piggie friend not enough_.mp3
lines.transcript: Your piggie friend not enough?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-00000006933A.0B2-We would never say no to more mayhem! (laughs).mp3
lines.transcript: We would never say no to more mayhem! (laughs)

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 4-Mauga-000000066A2E.0B2-Yeah... Mako doesn't strike me as the sharing type.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah... Mako doesn't strike me as the sharing type.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 1-Junkrat-00000006933E.0B2-It's a little dark out there.mp3
lines.transcript: It's a little dark out there.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000066A2F.0B2-Then let's light it up!.mp3
lines.transcript: Then let's light it up!

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000069340.0B2-(laughs) This bloke gets it!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) This bloke gets it!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068776.0B2-Earth is overwhelming... there is still so much I do not understand.mp3
lines.transcript: Earth is overwhelming... there is still so much I do not understand.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000068E9D.0B2-Comprehension comes with experience. Experience comes with time.mp3
lines.transcript: Comprehension comes with experience. Experience comes with time.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A1C.0B2-That means I am taking too long! (groan) I miss my extra 37 minutes and 22 seconds.mp3
lines.transcript: That means I am taking too long! (groan) I miss my extra 37 minutes and 22 seconds...

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A16.0B2-Lúcio, can you teach me about karaoke_.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, can you teach me about karaoke?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B112.0B2-I'd love to help but... as much as I love making music, I'm not much of a singer.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd love to help but... as much as I love making music, I'm not much of a singer.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A15.0B2-Okay then... how about partying_.mp3
lines.transcript: Okay then... how about partying?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-00000006B119.0B2-Now that we can do!.mp3
lines.transcript: Now that we can do!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068703.0B2-I tried the chicken nuggets you suggested. But... why are they shaped like dinosaurs_.mp3
lines.transcript: I tried the chicken nuggets you suggested. But... why are they shaped like dinosaurs?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000069446.0B2-That is what makes them superior.mp3
lines.transcript: That is what makes them superior.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068702.0B2-Auntie, can you think of any reasons the storms back home have become so violent_.mp3
lines.transcript: Auntie, can you think of any reasons the storms back home have become so violent?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000068DBF.0B2-It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up until I figure it out.mp3
lines.transcript: It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up until I figure it out.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000068DC3.0B2-It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up. My friend needs me.mp3
lines.transcript: It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up. My friend needs me.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A19.0B2-Auntie Mei, what did Mother do for fun_.mp3
lines.transcript: Auntie Mei, what did Mother do for fun?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000068DB9.0B2-Lots of things! Figure skating, karaoke... and of course, partying!.mp3
lines.transcript: Lots of things! Figure skating, karaoke... and of course, partying!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A1A.0B2-Then I must learn these skills too!.mp3
lines.transcript: Then I must learn these skills too!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A1E.0B2-Oh moons! You are purple! Are you feeling unwell_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh moons! You are purple! Are you feeling unwell?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000068EFA.0B2-(sigh) I am now.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I am now.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A24.0B2-Do not panic! I will call a medic! But I am a medic... I will call another medic!.mp3
lines.transcript: Do not panic! I will call a medic! But I am a medic... I will call another medic!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A20.0B2-I reckon we're gonna tan their hides, pardner!.mp3
lines.transcript: I reckon we're gonna tan their hides, pardner!

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000006891E.0B2-I beg your pardon_.mp3
lines.transcript: I beg your pardon?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A1F.0B2-You look like you are from the Westerns my father brought to Mars. Let's draw, gunslinger!.mp3
lines.transcript: You look like you are from the Westerns my father brought to Mars. Let's draw, gunslinger!

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-00000006891D.0B2-(chuckle) Oh, you got a lot to learn, cowgirl.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Oh, you got a lot to learn, cowgirl.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A28.0B2-(sigh) I feel faint. Terran air has so little oxygen.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I feel faint. Terran air has so little oxygen.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C9C.0B2-Have you tried taking an altitude sickness pill_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you tried taking an altitude sickness pill?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A29.0B2-(nervous chuckle) Those are a choking hazard.mp3
lines.transcript: (nervous chuckle) Those are a choking hazard.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A2A.0B2-You remind me of the rovers back home! They also change their forms depending on the task.mp3
lines.transcript: You remind me of the rovers back home! They also change their forms depending on the task.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000068C73.0B2-Rovers_ (sigh) Human ignorance is truly boundless.mp3
lines.transcript: Rovers? (sigh) Human ignorance is truly boundless.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A26.0B2-Sir Wilhelm... How do you remain brave in combat_ I cannot stop shaking!.mp3
lines.transcript: Sir Wilhelm... How do you remain brave in combat? I cannot stop shaking!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000068C36.0B2-Half of courage is might, my Martian friend!.mp3
lines.transcript: Half of courage is might, my Martian friend!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068A27.0B2-Intriguing! But... I do not feel particularly mighty.mp3
lines.transcript: Intriguing! But... I do not feel particularly mighty...

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 4-Reinhardt-000000068C30.0B2-Don't fret. Stand with me, and you'll have nothing to fear!.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't fret. Stand with me, and you'll have nothing to fear!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068A21.0B2-If you are a knight... should I call you Sir Wilhelm_.mp3
lines.transcript: If you are a knight... should I call you Sir Wilhelm?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000068C31.0B2-(laugh) Yes! Finally, someone who understands!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laugh) Yes! Finally, someone who understands!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068E62.0B2-Does your turret have a name_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does your turret have a name?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000068EEF.0B2-Hm... I've never considered giving it one.mp3
lines.transcript: Hm... I've never considered giving it one.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068E5E.0B2-But you are always calling it your baby. I thought all babies had names.mp3
lines.transcript: But you are always calling it your baby. I thought all babies had names.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-000000068EF0.0B2-You've got a point! I'll have Brigitte come up with some.mp3
lines.transcript: You've got a point! I'll have Brigitte come up with some.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000069AC3.0B2-I am happy I have made so many new friends, but how am I going to keep track of everyone's names_.mp3
lines.transcript: I am happy I have made so many new friends, but how am I going to keep track of everyone's names?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006B305.0B2-Well, do you remember mine_.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, do you remember mine?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000069AC6.0B2-Of course, Brigitte.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course, Brigitte.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000006B306.0B2-That's the hardest one down! I know you've got the rest.mp3
lines.transcript: That's the hardest one down! I know you've got the rest.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068E7D.0B2-What is wrong, Auntie Mei_ You look sad.mp3
lines.transcript: What is wrong, Auntie Mei? You look sad.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000068DC0.0B2-I'm okay. I'm just... remembering the past.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm okay. I'm just... remembering the past.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068E78.0B2-Did something happen here_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did something happen here?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000068DC2.0B2-I'll tell you about it another time.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll tell you about it another time.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068E7A.0B2-Do you have information about Jurong_ It was my mother's birthplace.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you have information about Jurong? It was my mother's birthplace.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000068C50.0B2-Yes. Dr. Liao had fond memories of her time attending university there.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. Dr. Liao had fond memories of her time attending university there.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068E66.0B2-(gasp) You must tell me everything you know!.mp3
lines.transcript: (gasp) You must tell me everything you know!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000068E80.0B2-How did you and Winston even find me_ I wandered so far from my landing site.mp3
lines.transcript: How did you and Winston even find me? I wandered so far from my landing site.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000069102.0B2-We just had to ask the locals! Not everyday a Martian drops out of the sky.mp3
lines.transcript: We just had to ask the locals! Not everyday a Martian drops out of the sky.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000068E5C.0B2-(embarrassed laugh) I suppose it must have been a spectacle.mp3
lines.transcript: (embarrassed laugh) I suppose it must have been a spectacle.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000069AC5.0B2-A bounty hunter! Are you here to detain me_.mp3
lines.transcript: A bounty hunter! Are you here to detain me?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069A27.0B2-Nah. I only take the hard jobs.mp3
lines.transcript: Nah. I only take the hard jobs.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000069AC7.0B2-Ah, I am relieved! But also slightly disheartened.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, I am relieved! But also slightly disheartened...

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-000000069AB7.0B2-You have performed in the Colosseo_ I have always wanted to see the Circuit Maximus steeds up close!.mp3
lines.transcript: You have performed in the Colosseo? I have always wanted to see the Circuit Maximus steeds up close!

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 2-Vendetta-00000006A285.0B2-They have weak points, as does every opponent.mp3
lines.transcript: They have weak points, as does every opponent.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-000000069AB8.0B2-You don't mean... you have destroyed one before_.mp3
lines.transcript: You don't mean... you have destroyed one before?

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 4-Vendetta-000000069C67.0B2-Stay out of the Colosseo, girl. You wouldn’t have the stomach for it.mp3
lines.transcript: Stay out of the Colosseo, girl. You wouldn t have the stomach for it.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE3F.0B2-I have heard of Wuxing University! My Auntie Xiao was a graduate.mp3
lines.transcript: I have heard of Wuxing University! My Auntie Xiao was a graduate.

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 2-Wuyang-000000069D61.0B2-Wait... Xiao_ As in Dr. Tian Xiao of the Metal College_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wait... Xiao? As in Dr. Tian Xiao of the Metal College?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-00000006AE40.0B2-Yes! You have heard of her_.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes! You have heard of her?

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 4-Wuyang-00000006B1C8.0B2-My friend studied her old prototypes to build my staff! Small world. Or—heh, small solar system.mp3
lines.transcript: My friend studied her old prototypes to build my staff! Small world. Or heh, small solar system.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE46.0B2-Wuyang_ Will you teach me to swim_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wuyang? Will you teach me to swim?

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 2-Wuyang-00000006B1D1.0B2-Will you be okay_ I thought you were scared of water.mp3
lines.transcript: Will you be okay? I thought you were scared of water.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-00000006AE47.0B2-I am. But I must become braver if I do not wish to fall behind the others.mp3
lines.transcript: I am. But I must become braver if I do not wish to fall behind the others.

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 4-Wuyang-00000006B1D2.0B2-Aw, don't stress. At least to me, you're braver than you think.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, don't stress. At least to me, you're braver than you think.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE37.0B2-I have decided to accept your offer to train up my confidence. When do we start_.mp3
lines.transcript: I have decided to accept your offer to train up my confidence. When do we start?

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 2-Anran-00000006AB1F.0B2-Right now! Repeat after me. I am capable! I am confident! I've got this!.mp3
lines.transcript: Right now! Repeat after me. I am capable! I am confident! I've got this!

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-00000006AE38.0B2-On second thought, I require more time to deliberate.mp3
lines.transcript: On second thought, I require more time to deliberate.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE3C.0B2-It is hard to appreciate Earth's beauty during all this conflict.mp3
lines.transcript: It is hard to appreciate Earth's beauty during all this conflict.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000006AD08.0B2-At times like this, I remember a good friend's advice.mp3
lines.transcript: At times like this, I remember a good friend's advice.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-00000006AE3B.0B2-You do_ May I hear it_.mp3
lines.transcript: You do? May I hear it?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 4-Winston-00000006AD0A.0B2-Never accept the world as it appears to be. Dare to see it for what it could be.mp3
lines.transcript: Never accept the world as it appears to be. Dare to see it for what it could be.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE44.0B2-That is the largest hat I have ever seen!.mp3
lines.transcript: That is the largest hat I have ever seen!

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 2-Mizuki-00000006B35B.0B2-Thanks. A friend made it for me.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks. A friend made it for me.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 3-Juno-00000006AE45.0B2-It is handmade too_ They must care about you very much.mp3
lines.transcript: It is handmade too? They must care about you very much.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 4-Mizuki-00000006B35C.0B2-Yeah... maybe they do.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah... maybe they do.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 1-Juno-00000006AE41.0B2-I have heard that cats can be quite temperamental, but Fika seems very friendly!.mp3
lines.transcript: I have heard that cats can be quite temperamental, but Fika seems very friendly!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006B309.0B2-They aren't always the nicest. I think she just really likes you.mp3
lines.transcript: They aren't always the nicest. I think she just really likes you.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 1-Kiriko-00000005EFE5.0B2-Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training_.mp3
lines.transcript: Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000061FA2.0B2-Ho ho! Wish I was there!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ho ho! Wish I was there!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061F76.0B2-Ha! Is that true_.mp3
lines.transcript: Ha! Is that true?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 4-Cassidy-00000006224A.0B2-That sounds like him.mp3
lines.transcript: That sounds like him.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-0000000620C5.0B2-(chuckle) Is that true_.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Is that true?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 6-Mei-0000000623C3.0B2-No way! (giggle).mp3
lines.transcript: No way! (giggle)

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 7-Junker Queen-00000006280B.0B2-Ha! Some ninja.mp3
lines.transcript: Ha! Some ninja.

lines.speaker: Brigitte

lines.transcript: (annoyed grumble)

lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000645A6.0B2-Satya, remember our good old days at the academy_.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000066395.0B2-What is your fascination with artificial decay_.mp3
lines.transcript: What is your fascination with artificial decay?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000066383.0B2-Are you and Roadhog together_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you and Roadhog together?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-000000065EF6.0B2-Do you ever see us apart_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you ever see us apart?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-000000066389.0B2-No, I mean are you a couple_.mp3
lines.transcript: No, I mean are you a couple?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 4-Junkrat-000000065EF7.0B2-Yes, a couple of dashing rogues! Not sure what you're missing here.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, a couple of dashing rogues! Not sure what you're missing here.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-00000006638B.0B2-I need durable volunteers for some kinetic biolight experiments. Can I count on you_.mp3
lines.transcript: I need durable volunteers for some kinetic biolight experiments. Can I count on you?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000006610D.0B2-I'm not your best subject. This body isn't exactly cutting-edge tech anymore.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not your best subject. This body isn't exactly cutting-edge tech anymore.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-00000006638C.0B2-Ms. Chase, I insist that you never tear yourself down in my presence again.mp3
lines.transcript: Ms. Chase, I insist that you never tear yourself down in my presence again.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000006610E.0B2-(chuckling) All right, I get the picture.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckling) All right, I get the picture.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000066229.0B2-It's monstrous that you were kept locked up for so long.mp3
lines.transcript: It's monstrous that you were kept locked up for so long.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000066304.0B2-It didn't feel very long to me.mp3
lines.transcript: It didn't feel very long to me.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000661BD.0B2-Well, should your jailers ever come knocking again, I know a place you'd be safe.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, should your jailers ever come knocking again, I know a place you'd be safe.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000066385.0B2-I love the warmth in your music. Your newest album is like listening to a sunrise.mp3
lines.transcript: I love the warmth in your music. Your newest album is like listening to a sunrise.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000066819.0B2-Wow, thanks. You should tell that to my critics.mp3
lines.transcript: Wow, thanks. You should tell that to my critics.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-00000006637D.0B2-Critics_ You_ No! I won't stand for it.mp3
lines.transcript: Critics? You? No! I won't stand for it.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000661B6.0B2-I envy your amicable relationship with your family.mp3
lines.transcript: I envy your amicable relationship with your family.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000066831.0B2-You aren't in touch with yours_.mp3
lines.transcript: You aren't in touch with yours?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000661B7.0B2-We had a shouting match not long ago, if that counts.mp3
lines.transcript: We had a shouting match not long ago, if that counts.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-00000006637A.0B2-You know, you were the best roommate I've ever had.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, you were the best roommate I've ever had.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000065E33.0B2-You were third-best. The other two went to bed at appropriate times.mp3
lines.transcript: You were third-best. The other two went to bed at appropriate times.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-00000006637B.0B2-4 AM is perfectly appropriate if you're working on a great idea!.mp3
lines.transcript: 4 AM is perfectly appropriate if you're working on a great idea!

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000069612.0B2-Satya, you must try my latest culinary invention. I call it _The Stoplight!_.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya, you must try my latest culinary invention. I call it "The Stoplight!"

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000068672.0B2-(sigh) What's in it_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) What's in it?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-000000069611.0B2-Mango and pandan jelly blended into panang curry.mp3
lines.transcript: Mango and pandan jelly blended into panang curry.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 4-Symmetra-000000068674.0B2-I would rather perish.mp3
lines.transcript: I would rather perish.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000695FF.0B2-Is something on your mind_ I'd be happy to lend an ear.mp3
lines.transcript: Is something on your mind? I'd be happy to lend an ear.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000066B14.0B2-I would rather not. Talking's pointless.mp3
lines.transcript: I would rather not. Talking's pointless.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-000000069602.0B2-Are you sure_ I'm a great listener.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you sure? I'm a great listener.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 4-Illari-000000066F9B.0B2-Then hear what I just said.mp3
lines.transcript: Then hear what I just said.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000695FC.0B2-Satya, my clever little fox, my precious pearl plucked from the depths of the sea!.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya, my clever little fox, my precious pearl plucked from the depths of the sea!

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-0000000695FA.0B2-Satya, my radiant moon among the stars, my resonant siren song!.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya, my radiant moon among the stars, my resonant siren song!

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000695FB.0B2-Satya, my dancing dream, rhythmic ruler of my heart!.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya, my dancing dream, rhythmic ruler of my heart!

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 4-Lifeweaver-00000006960E.0B2-Satya, my blossoming spring flower! Light of my life, my reason to live!.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya, my blossoming spring flower! Light of my life, my reason to live!

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 5-Symmetra-000000068671.0B2-(sigh) What, Bua_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) What, Bua?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 6-Lifeweaver-000000069600.0B2-(laughs) What do you mean _what_ I'm just saying hello.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) What do you mean "what"? I'm just saying hello.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000069601.0B2-I saw you writing earlier. Diary_.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw you writing earlier. Diary?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 2-Venture-000000067236.0B2-No, it's more like a record of my hopes and thoughts.mp3
lines.transcript: No, it's more like a record of my hopes and thoughts.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-000000069603.0B2-That's... still a diary, I think.mp3
lines.transcript: That's... still a diary, I think.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 4-Venture-000000067234.0B2-Nah, can't be. Not enough stickers in this thing.mp3
lines.transcript: Nah, can't be. Not enough stickers in this thing.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000069613.0B2-I saw your parents at a few exorbitant parties when I was young. Never you.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw your parents at a few exorbitant parties when I was young. Never you.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000688C9.0B2-They didn't care to bring me along.mp3
lines.transcript: They didn't care to bring me along.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000695FE.0B2-A shame. I'm sure two wayward heirs could've gotten into loads of trouble.mp3
lines.transcript: A shame. I'm sure two wayward heirs could've gotten into loads of trouble.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-0000000688D0.0B2-(quiet chuckle) There's still plenty of time for that.mp3
lines.transcript: (quiet chuckle) There's still plenty of time for that.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000676DD.0B2-With how often we pull people around, we could start a transportation service!.mp3
lines.transcript: With how often we pull people around, we could start a transportation service!

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-0000000676DC.0B2-How much are we charging_.mp3
lines.transcript: How much are we charging?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000676DE.0B2-Let's discuss the details over tea.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's discuss the details over tea.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000676E8.0B2-Don't leap too far away. I can only work a limited amount of miracles.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't leap too far away. I can only work a limited amount of miracles.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-0000000676E6.0B2-Worried I'll leave you in a thorny situation_.mp3
lines.transcript: Worried I'll leave you in a thorny situation?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000676E7.0B2-Oh dear.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh dear.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-00000006960F.0B2-I hear you're a poet. Shall we exchange couplets over tea sometime_.mp3
lines.transcript: I hear you're a poet. Shall we exchange couplets over tea sometime?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000069B77.0B2-I would sooner exchange farewells.mp3
lines.transcript: I would sooner exchange farewells.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-000000069610.0B2-Very creative! Hint taken.mp3
lines.transcript: Very creative! Hint taken.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-0000000686F2.0B2-Look at us! Two fugitives on the run in the pursuit of a better world.mp3
lines.transcript: Look at us! Two fugitives on the run in the pursuit of a better world.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 2-Hazard-0000000686D4.0B2-Aye, I see you... but I doubt ye've ever had to get those hands dirty.mp3
lines.transcript: Aye, I see you... but I doubt ye've ever had to get those hands dirty.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-0000000686F3.0B2-Of course I have! I just know the value of clean cuticles.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course I have! I just know the value of clean cuticles.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-000000069609.0B2-Satya... I wanted to apologize. I should have tried harder to contact you.mp3
lines.transcript: Satya... I wanted to apologize. I should have tried harder to contact you.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-00000006B148.0B2-There is no need, Bua. Our separation was Vishkar's fault, alone.mp3
lines.transcript: There is no need, Bua. Our separation was Vishkar's fault, alone.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 3-Lifeweaver-00000006960A.0B2-At least we're back in touch now. We've always been better together.mp3
lines.transcript: At least we're back in touch now. We've always been better together.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 4-Symmetra-00000006B144.0B2-I could not agree more, my friend.mp3
lines.transcript: I could not agree more, my friend.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 1-Lifeweaver-00000006960B.0B2-Are you sure about returning to Vishkar, Satya_ You could always stay at the Arcology with me.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you sure about returning to Vishkar, Satya? You could always stay at the Arcology with me.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-00000006B149.0B2-I may join you there one day. But I will uncover more as Vishkar's ally than its enemy.mp3
lines.transcript: I may join you there one day. But I will uncover more as Vishkar's ally than its enemy.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000000B510.0B2-Reinhardt, we need to find you some new tunes.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, we need to find you some new tunes.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000021DEF.0B2-What's wrong with the classics_ I love Hasselhoff! Have you heard Night Rocker_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's wrong with the classics? I love Hasselhoff! Have you heard Night Rocker?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CDC.0B2-What do you think, Pharah_ Got time for a game_.mp3
lines.transcript: What do you think, Pharah? Got time for a game?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-000000036AFC.0B2-After the mission_ you're on.mp3
lines.transcript: After the mission: you're on.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CDE.0B2-You should come to Rio, Orisa. I could use your help with those Vishkar goons.mp3
lines.transcript: You should come to Rio, Orisa. I could use your help with those Vishkar goons.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000038FE0.0B2-I do not know about this Vishkar, but I am programmed to assist where I can.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not know about this Vishkar, but I am programmed to assist where I can.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-0000000216C0.0B2-What you Vishkar will never understand is that people should be free!.mp3
lines.transcript: What you Vishkar will never understand is that people should be free!

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-00000001FD0A.0B2-What you call freedom is an illusion that causes more harm than good.mp3
lines.transcript: What you call freedom is an illusion that causes more harm than good.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000002B7A4.0B2-Vishkar's using you, just like they used my father. You just wait. You'll see.mp3
lines.transcript: Vishkar's using you, just like they used my father. You just wait. You'll see.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-0000000216BF.0B2-Hey, Bastion. Check this out_ (imitates Bastion).mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, Bastion. Check this out: (imitates Bastion)

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000000BD2F.0B2-(quizzical beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (quizzical beeps)

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-0000000216BE.0B2-D.Va, in the flesh! Woo, can I get your autograph_.mp3
lines.transcript: D.Va, in the flesh! Woo, can I get your autograph?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000002009F.0B2-Only if I can get yours, too! I love your new album!.mp3
lines.transcript: Only if I can get yours, too! I love your new album!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000000B50F.0B2-Can't keep up_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can't keep up?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000000BD5E.0B2-Then stay out of our way!.mp3
lines.transcript: Then stay out of our way!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000000B50E.0B2-Winston! How's it hanging_.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston! How's it hanging?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000000BC69.0B2-Um, okay, I guess... got this big mission coming up. Oh. I get it.mp3
lines.transcript: Um, okay, I guess... got this big mission coming up. Oh. I get it.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CE2.0B2-Hey Tracer, you and Emily want to hit the slopes sometime_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey Tracer, you and Emily want to hit the slopes sometime?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000037115.0B2-Absolutely! If you think you can keep up with us.mp3
lines.transcript: Absolutely! If you think you can keep up with us.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CDD.0B2-Hey Genji, how about I hook up your lights to my music_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey Genji, how about I hook up your lights to my music?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000043B12.0B2-That is not what they are for.mp3
lines.transcript: That is not what they are for.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-00000004BCE7.0B2-(sighs) Just this one time.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) Just this one time.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CDF.0B2-Orisa, you are amazing! Could you ask Efi if she can help me out with my helmet sometime_.mp3
lines.transcript: Orisa, you are amazing! Could you ask Efi if she can help me out with my helmet sometime?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000038FE1.0B2-I am sure she would love to. She is a big fan of your music, as am I.mp3
lines.transcript: I am sure she would love to. She is a big fan of your music, as am I.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000036CE0.0B2-Winston, started on your Halloween costume yet_.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston, started on your Halloween costume yet?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000037620.0B2-Actually, I have! I was thinking of a safari costume.(chuckles) You thought I wasn't going to have one,.mp3
lines.transcript: Actually, I have! I was thinking of a safari costume.(chuckles) You thought I wasn't going to have one, didn't you?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000002B794.0B2-I've been thinking about my football name... Ready_ How about_ Winston. What do you think_.mp3
lines.transcript: I've been thinking about my football name... Ready? How about: Winston. What do you think?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000048B74.0B2-I... like it!.mp3
lines.transcript: I... like it!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000058D63.0B2-Ah-! That's my favorite record shop!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah-! That's my favorite record shop!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000058BDB.0B2-Dammit, they're wrecking the entire city!.mp3
lines.transcript: Dammit, they're wrecking the entire city!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000058E15.0B2-Not if we can do anything about it.mp3
lines.transcript: Not if we can do anything about it.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000061485.0B2-We will not allow this to go on any longer.mp3
lines.transcript: We will not allow this to go on any longer.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 5-Mei-00000006147E.0B2-Oh... I'm sorry, Lúcio. We'll stop them, I promise!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh... I'm sorry, Lúcio. We'll stop them, I promise!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 6-Echo-000000065AE4.0B2-We have to stop them, or else this destruction will continue.mp3
lines.transcript: We have to stop them, or else this destruction will continue.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000005B7FB.0B2-Hey man! Happy to have you.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey man! Happy to have you.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B909.0B2-I've had bad luck with teams, but this one seems alright.mp3
lines.transcript: I've had bad luck with teams, but this one seems alright.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-00000005B7FC.0B2-Yeah, that's the spirit!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, that's the spirit!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000061DCD.0B2-Hey big man, you got any requests_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey big man, you got any requests?

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-00000005E030.0B2-A little silence would be nice.mp3
lines.transcript: A little silence would be nice.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-00000005F146.0B2-I haven't forgotten about what you did to Rio.mp3
lines.transcript: I haven't forgotten about what you did to Rio.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-00000005F168.0B2-I'm glad your memory is intact. Let's get on with this.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm glad your memory is intact. Let's get on with this.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000061D8F.0B2-Brigitte tells me you can dance, but I won't believe it until I see it!.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte tells me you can dance, but I won't believe it until I see it!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000006207E.0B2-(chuckle) Are you sure you'll be able to handle it_.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Are you sure you'll be able to handle it?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-000000061D96.0B2-(laugh) Try me!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laugh) Try me!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-000000061DC9.0B2-Still can't believe I get to work with a real cowboy. What's it like in the American West_.mp3
lines.transcript: Still can't believe I get to work with a real cowboy. What's it like in the American West?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000062270.0B2-Lizards and dirt, far as the eye can see.mp3
lines.transcript: Lizards and dirt, far as the eye can see.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-000000061DCA.0B2-Wow! That sounds amazing.mp3
lines.transcript: Wow! That sounds amazing.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 4-Cassidy-000000062271.0B2-Beats the city, I'll tell you that.mp3
lines.transcript: Beats the city, I'll tell you that.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 1-Lúcio-0000000614AE.0B2-So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000006271F.0B2-Hmm, tiger shark. Best kind of shark.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmm, tiger shark. Best kind of shark.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 3-Ashe-00000006268F.0B2-I'm partial to scorpions.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm partial to scorpions.

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 4-Bastion-000000062196.0B2-(elephant-esque beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (elephant-esque beeps)

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 5-Pharah-0000000620BC.0B2-I like those really big dogs. The ones they use to ward off bears_.mp3
lines.transcript: I like those really big dogs. The ones they use to ward off bears?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 6-Brigitte-00000006260F.0B2-Ooh! Siberian tiger!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ooh! Siberian tiger!

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 7-Cassidy-0000000622A1.0B2-What's that jungle animal with the funky snout_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's that jungle animal with the funky snout?

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 8-Junker Queen-000000061EEC.0B2-Is there a kind of dingo that is also a shark_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is there a kind of dingo that is also a shark?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 9-Moira-0000000623B4.0B2-Scolopendra gigantea.mp3
lines.transcript: Scolopendra gigantea.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 10-Widowmaker-000000062142.0B2-The black widow.mp3
lines.transcript: The black widow.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 11-Zenyatta-0000000658DD.0B2-I envy ants for their clarity of purpose.mp3
lines.transcript: I envy ants for their clarity of purpose.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 12-Winston-0000000620E2.0B2-Hmm, humans, I suppose!.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmm, humans, I suppose!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 13-D.Va-00000006682D.0B2-Definitely the Zergling.mp3
lines.transcript: Definitely the Zergling.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 14-Echo-000000066300.0B2-My current favorite is a really big dog used to ward off bears.mp3
lines.transcript: My current favorite is a really big dog used to ward off bears.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 15-Genji-000000064AB9.0B2-Yeah... Triceratops.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah... Triceratops.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 16-Hanzo-000000067467.0B2-The brave and beautiful koi.mp3
lines.transcript: The brave and beautiful koi.

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 17-Junkrat-000000065EF5.0B2-I've always wanted a guinea pig. I'd name it... Melrose.mp3
lines.transcript: I've always wanted a guinea pig. I'd name it... Melrose.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 18-Kiriko-000000064D2E.0B2-Really_ Take a guess.mp3
lines.transcript: Really? Take a guess.

lines.filename: 3-Mei-0000000623D9.0B2-What about a hammer and shield_.mp3
