lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 4-Reinhardt-00000006209A.0B2-(laugh) Bonuses!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laugh) Bonuses!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000061CC8.0B2-Omigosh! A hamster! So cute!.mp3
lines.transcript: Omigosh! A hamster! So cute!

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-00000006262E.0B2-(angry squeaks) Do not call the hamster cute.mp3
lines.transcript: (angry squeaks) Do not call the hamster cute.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000061CC9.0B2-Oops. Sorry. (Chinese)_ But really, isn't he cute, Snowball_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oops. Sorry. (Chinese): But really, isn't he cute, Snowball?

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 4-Wrecking Ball-00000006262F.0B2-(angry squeaks) (Chinese)_ This is your final warning.mp3
lines.transcript: (angry squeaks) (Chinese): This is your final warning.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 5-Wrecking Ball-00000006395B.0B2-(angry squeaks) (Chinese)_ He says to stop talking.mp3
lines.transcript: (angry squeaks) (Chinese): He says to stop talking.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000066DF9.0B2-Genji_ Were you the last one in the kitchen_.mp3
lines.transcript: Genji? Were you the last one in the kitchen?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000063048.0B2-Yes. I was preparing my meals for the week.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. I was preparing my meals for the week.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000066DFC.0B2-Oh! Well... could you use a knife next time_ The sword is a bit messy.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh! Well... could you use a knife next time? The sword is a bit messy.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-00000006463B.0B2-I saw you carving wooden charms earlier! Can I see_.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw you carving wooden charms earlier! Can I see?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000630B4.0B2-I... have not honed my skills enough.mp3
lines.transcript: I... have not honed my skills enough.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-00000006463C.0B2-Oh... Ice might be easier. Want me to show you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh... Ice might be easier. Want me to show you?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 4-Hanzo-0000000630B2.0B2-...Perhaps.mp3
lines.transcript: ...Perhaps.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000064635.0B2-Do you ever make snowflakes with your light_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you ever make snowflakes with your light?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-0000000647D5.0B2-Regularly. Their repetitive patterns bring peace to my mind.mp3
lines.transcript: Regularly. Their repetitive patterns bring peace to my mind.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000064636.0B2-Great! We can build a snow fortress!.mp3
lines.transcript: Great! We can build a snow fortress!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000064637.0B2-Have you gotten bigger, Orisa_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you gotten bigger, Orisa?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000646F3.0B2-My dimensions have not changed. Does the javelin make me look taller_.mp3
lines.transcript: My dimensions have not changed. Does the javelin make me look taller?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000064638.0B2-A little. But I still think you're just as cute as before!.mp3
lines.transcript: A little. But I still think you're just as cute as before!

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 4-Orisa-0000000646F4.0B2-Oh! That is... thank you!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh! That is... thank you!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-00000006663A.0B2-(sigh) I'm really feeling this heat!.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I'm really feeling this heat!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000006663B.0B2-You certainly aren't the only one.mp3
lines.transcript: You certainly aren't the only one...

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-0000000588DC.0B2-Lúcio! Over here!.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio! Over here!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000588E3.0B2-Lúcio, hurry!.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, hurry!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-0000000588E5.0B2-Lúcio, we need to get off this ship!.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, we need to get off this ship!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000068DB7.0B2-(sigh) I'm concerned about Jiayi. I hope she's okay.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I'm concerned about Jiayi. I hope she's okay.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-000000068A18.0B2-Do not worry! Even through troubling times, Mother always finds a reason to smile.mp3
lines.transcript: Do not worry! Even through troubling times, Mother always finds a reason to smile.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000068DB8.0B2-I'm glad to hear she hasn't changed.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm glad to hear she hasn't changed.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000068DBA.0B2-You look pale, Juno. Did you skip dinner again_.mp3
lines.transcript: You look pale, Juno. Did you skip dinner again?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-000000068A1B.0B2-Yes... I spent so long deciding what to try that I stopped feeling hungry.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes... I spent so long deciding what to try that I stopped feeling hungry.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000068DBB.0B2-That is not a good excuse! (sigh) I'm cooking for you later.mp3
lines.transcript: That is not a good excuse! (sigh) I'm cooking for you later.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 1-Mei-000000068DBE.0B2-How did you become so miserable_.mp3
lines.transcript: How did you become so miserable?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000068DD6.0B2-What do you think_ Overwatch.mp3
lines.transcript: What do you think? Overwatch.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 3-Mei-000000068DBD.0B2-But... I love being in Overwatch. It feels good to make a difference.mp3
lines.transcript: But... I love being in Overwatch. It feels good to make a difference.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 4-Reaper-000000068DDB.0B2-All that _difference_ comes back to bite you. You'll see.mp3
lines.transcript: All that "difference" comes back to bite you. You'll see.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000001FF77.0B2-You seem well, Genji.mp3
lines.transcript: You seem well, Genji.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000001FF1D.0B2-I am a different man, now. I am whole.mp3
lines.transcript: I am a different man, now. I am whole.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000001FF76.0B2-Pharah, if your mother could see you now, I think she'd be proud of you.mp3
lines.transcript: Pharah, if your mother could see you now, I think she'd be proud of you.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000001FCBA.0B2-There's a first time for everything, I guess.mp3
lines.transcript: There's a first time for everything, I guess.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000001FF75.0B2-Winston, are you experiencing any issues with your genetic therapy_.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston, are you experiencing any issues with your genetic therapy?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000001FD5D.0B2-Other than a crippling addiction to peanut butter_.mp3
lines.transcript: Other than a crippling addiction to peanut butter?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000001FF74.0B2-Reinhardt, don’t you think it’s time you hung it up_ You're not getting any younger.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, don t you think it s time you hung it up? You're not getting any younger.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000021DEC.0B2-Never! I will fight to my last breath.mp3
lines.transcript: Never! I will fight to my last breath.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000001FFB1.0B2-Mei, you haven’t aged a day! What’s your secret_.mp3
lines.transcript: Mei, you haven t aged a day! What s your secret?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000211CA.0B2-Cryostasis, but I'm not sure if I'd recommend it!.mp3
lines.transcript: Cryostasis, but I'm not sure if I'd recommend it!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A89A.0B2-You know smoking's bad for your health.mp3
lines.transcript: You know smoking's bad for your health.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000002A87D.0B2-Well, I have faith you can get me patched back up, doc.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, I have faith you can get me patched back up, doc.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A89B.0B2-I got you some chocolates, Genji. Swiss. They're the best.mp3
lines.transcript: I got you some chocolates, Genji. Swiss. They're the best.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000002A7C2.0B2-Thank you, Angela. Perhaps you could share them with me.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you, Angela. Perhaps you could share them with me.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A89C.0B2-You know, Ana, there are procedures we could look into to repair your eye.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, Ana, there are procedures we could look into to repair your eye.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC89.0B2-You are very kind, but I am comfortable with who I am now. It is a good reminder.mp3
lines.transcript: You are very kind, but I am comfortable with who I am now. It is a good reminder.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000043A7E.0B2-Describing your work as unethical would be a kindness.mp3
lines.transcript: Describing your work as unethical would be a kindness.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000004C3B5.0B2-But the true question is whether or not you can deny my discoveries. No, I didn't think so.mp3
lines.transcript: But the true question is whether or not you can deny my discoveries. No, I didn't think so.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A898.0B2-Lúcio, I never realized your father was the one who invented Vishkar's sonic technology.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, I never realized your father was the one who invented Vishkar's sonic technology.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000002B7A3.0B2-The core tech was his life's work. Owned and patented by Vishkar. But it's mine now.mp3
lines.transcript: The core tech was his life's work. Owned and patented by Vishkar. But it's mine now.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000000B0E2.0B2-What happened to you_.mp3
lines.transcript: What happened to you?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000000B53B.0B2-You tell me, doc.mp3
lines.transcript: You tell me, doc.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000038086.0B2-(sighs) Torbjörn, I miss Ingrid's apple pie at the holidays.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) Torbjörn, I miss Ingrid's apple pie at the holidays.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000037EE1.0B2-Well, it just so happens she has some saved for you.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, it just so happens she has some saved for you.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000038085.0B2-Reinhardt, what are your plans for the holidays_.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, what are your plans for the holidays?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000038159.0B2-I'll probably visit Torbjörn's family in Gothenberg, like the last few years.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll probably visit Torbjörn's family in Gothenberg, like the last few years.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A899.0B2-Zenyatta, I must admit, I do not understand how your healing works.mp3
lines.transcript: Zenyatta, I must admit, I do not understand how your healing works.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000002EFD8.0B2-And I do not understand much of how you heal, Dr. Ziegler. I suppose we must all take some things on f.mp3
lines.transcript: And I do not understand much of how you heal, Dr. Ziegler. I suppose we must all take some things on faith.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000002A897.0B2-Tracer, you should be careful, we don't know the side effects of using the chronal accelerator.mp3
lines.transcript: Tracer, you should be careful, we don't know the side effects of using the chronal accelerator.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000002CDEC.0B2-Considering the alternatives, I'm willing to take the risks.mp3
lines.transcript: Considering the alternatives, I'm willing to take the risks.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-0000000552FF.0B2-Well, I suppose I'll be patching you up... as usual.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, I suppose I'll be patching you up... as usual.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000000BD5F.0B2-Don't worry, Dr. Ziegler. If I get in trouble, I'll just recall.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't worry, Dr. Ziegler. If I get in trouble, I'll just recall.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000058666.0B2-Ah, you're here. It's good to have backup.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, you're here. It's good to have backup.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-000000058416.0B2-Always glad to lend you a hand, Dr. Ziegler.mp3
lines.transcript: Always glad to lend you a hand, Dr. Ziegler.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000058670.0B2-You know, Tracer, technically I outrank you.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, Tracer, technically I outrank you.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000586B0.0B2-Did you want to take over, Dr. Ziegler_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you want to take over, Dr. Ziegler?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000058671.0B2-Maybe if there's a sudden outbreak of infectious disease.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe if there's a sudden outbreak of infectious disease.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000058657.0B2-Don't forget, Winston, you need to be mindful of your bone strength. Especially if you're going to be bou.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't forget, Winston, you need to be mindful of your bone strength. Especially if you're going to be bouncing around like that.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-0000000585EB.0B2-I've been taking my supplements.mp3
lines.transcript: I've been taking my supplements.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000058658.0B2-You spent a lot of time on the moon. You need to take it seriously. Remember Dr. Chao_.mp3
lines.transcript: You spent a lot of time on the moon. You need to take it seriously. Remember Dr. Chao?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 4-Winston-0000000585EC.0B2-I wonder how she's doing. It can't be easy, running a giant company.mp3
lines.transcript: I wonder how she's doing. It can't be easy, running a giant company.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 5-Mercy-000000058659.0B2-Last I heard they were working on a new space station.mp3
lines.transcript: Last I heard they were working on a new space station.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000061FA5.0B2-Must you be so relaxed_ We depend on you!.mp3
lines.transcript: Must you be so relaxed? We depend on you!

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005FC27.0B2-I'm not relaxed! I just make everything look easy.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not relaxed! I just make everything look easy.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000061FA6.0B2-I'd rather wait a century for progress than cause the harm you have.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd rather wait a century for progress than cause the harm you have.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-0000000623A9.0B2-What a joy it must be to feel entitled to patience.mp3
lines.transcript: What a joy it must be to feel entitled to patience.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000068467.0B2-How are you funding your crimes against humanity these days_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are you funding your crimes against humanity these days?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-000000060E34.0B2-My old friends innovation and imagination. A shame you've never met them.mp3
lines.transcript: My old friends innovation and imagination. A shame you've never met them.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000062C78.0B2-Call to me if you need help. I won't let you fall.mp3
lines.transcript: Call to me if you need help. I won't let you fall.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000060E28.0B2-Dr. Ziegler, don't forget. We're here to support you too.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Ziegler, don't forget. We're here to support you too.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000061FA7.0B2-Thank you Winston. I... needed to hear that.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you Winston. I... needed to hear that.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000061FAB.0B2-You know, anger management classes might help you with that temper.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, anger management classes might help you with that temper.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000006122B.0B2-Doctors! Always wanting you to do the work.mp3
lines.transcript: Doctors! Always wanting you to do the work.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000062C7D.0B2-I refuse to believe that your healing is magical.mp3
lines.transcript: I refuse to believe that your healing is magical.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635D8.0B2-What seems like magic is sometimes science we don't yet understand.mp3
lines.transcript: What seems like magic is sometimes science we don't yet understand.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000062C7C.0B2-Exactly! I must learn how it works!.mp3
lines.transcript: Exactly! I must learn how it works!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000063212.0B2-Vivian! What have you been up to_.mp3
lines.transcript: Vivian! What have you been up to?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000006437A.0B2-Oh, you know. Surviving.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, you know. Surviving.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000063213.0B2-And how's Murphy_.mp3
lines.transcript: And how's Murphy?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000006437B.0B2-Doing much better, now that you aren't feeding her scraps all the time.mp3
lines.transcript: Doing much better, now that you aren't feeding her scraps all the time.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000063A98.0B2-I've read about the genetic therapy they put you through. It sounds unpleasant.mp3
lines.transcript: I've read about the genetic therapy they put you through. It sounds unpleasant.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-0000000639B8.0B2-(hamster noises) It was, but ignorance was worse.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) It was, but ignorance was worse.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-00000006441B.0B2-Don't bother. Reason is lost on her.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't bother. Reason is lost on her.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000063A99.0B2-I'm not giving up on you, Reyes.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not giving up on you, Reyes.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000006384D.0B2-I wish you would.mp3
lines.transcript: I wish you would.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000064ABC.0B2-(sigh) Reinhardt, answering the recall is not my idea of _hanging it up_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Reinhardt, answering the recall is not my idea of "hanging it up".

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000006409B.0B2-I had to show! Otherwise, your life would be far too easy!.mp3
lines.transcript: I had to show! Otherwise, your life would be far too easy!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000064ABD.0B2-And what a shame that would be.mp3
lines.transcript: And what a shame that would be.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000065F32.0B2-Someone your size should donate blood more frequently than the average person.mp3
lines.transcript: Someone your size should donate blood more frequently than the average person.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-00000006784C.0B2-You need more_ I can get you more.mp3
lines.transcript: You need more? I can get you more.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000065F25.0B2-Are you sure that gas you inhale is safe_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you sure that gas you inhale is safe?

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-00000006565D.0B2-It tastes good.mp3
lines.transcript: It tastes good.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000065F2E.0B2-Your hair looks brittle, Jack. Are you taking your vitamins_.mp3
lines.transcript: Your hair looks brittle, Jack. Are you taking your vitamins?

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-00000006724A.0B2-Once a day, just after my steak dinner.mp3
lines.transcript: Once a day, just after my steak dinner.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006634D.0B2-(sigh) Why did we stop writing to each other anyway, Genji_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Why did we stop writing to each other anyway, Genji?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000066350.0B2-You sent me a beautiful sketch and I couldn't think of a way to respond.mp3
lines.transcript: You sent me a beautiful sketch and I couldn't think of a way to respond.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006590A.0B2-Ah, I see. So you're a terrible artist. A bad friend.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, I see. So you're a terrible artist. A bad friend.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-00000006590E.0B2-A liar too. The sketch was awful.mp3
lines.transcript: A liar too. The sketch was awful.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-0000000658F4.0B2-(disgust) This reminds me of facing Null Sector in London.mp3
lines.transcript: (disgust) This reminds me of facing Null Sector in London.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-0000000658F5.0B2-Yeah, except this time, whoever made these robots is invading every nation at once.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, except this time, whoever made these robots is invading every nation at once.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-0000000658E9.0B2-I'm not sure what we did fixed anything. The omnics there were suffering.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not sure what we did fixed anything. The omnics there were suffering.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-0000000658E7.0B2-I know. But none of us can go back in time, Angela.mp3
lines.transcript: I know. But none of us can go back in time, Angela.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-0000000658F6.0B2-Let's focus on helping that transit worker, huh_ We can save the world another day.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's focus on helping that transit worker, huh? We can save the world another day.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000065F28.0B2-Biolight has such potential for medicine and agriculture!.mp3
lines.transcript: Biolight has such potential for medicine and agriculture!

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-000000066392.0B2-Sadly, Vishkar agrees. They want their hands on it, and they're willing to cut mine off to get it.mp3
lines.transcript: Sadly, Vishkar agrees. They want their hands on it, and they're willing to cut mine off to get it.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000065F27.0B2-(sighing) Sounds about right.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighing) Sounds about right.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006846A.0B2-I keep forgetting to calibrate my staff to your higher temperature.mp3
lines.transcript: I keep forgetting to calibrate my staff to your higher temperature.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000066A29.0B2-Thanks for reminding me that I'm hot stuff.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks for reminding me that I'm hot stuff.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006846B.0B2-More like the stuff of medical nightmares.mp3
lines.transcript: More like the stuff of medical nightmares.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006664B.0B2-Careful, _Ace_. The Emperor's brightest stars burn out quickly.mp3
lines.transcript: Careful, "Ace". The Emperor's brightest stars burn out quickly.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000006664A.0B2-At least I'll burn the rebels down with me!.mp3
lines.transcript: At least I'll burn the rebels down with me!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006847F.0B2-Now that Overwatch is back, I insist that you start dressing up for the Halloween parties.mp3
lines.transcript: Now that Overwatch is back, I insist that you start dressing up for the Halloween parties.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000069448.0B2-What_ I always dress up.mp3
lines.transcript: What? I always dress up.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006847D.0B2-You can't be 'cyborg ninja' every year.mp3
lines.transcript: You can't be 'cyborg ninja' every year.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000069449.0B2-How about.... 'cyborg ninja in a hat'_.mp3
lines.transcript: How about.... 'cyborg ninja in a hat'?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000068469.0B2-So... why did we really stop writing_ I know my sketch wasn't that terrible.mp3
lines.transcript: So... why did we really stop writing? I know my sketch wasn't that terrible.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000006944C.0B2-Conflict got in the way. It is as you say_ _war takes every happiness_.mp3
lines.transcript: Conflict got in the way. It is as you say: "war takes every happiness".

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000068468.0B2-An unfortunate truth. But... we're still friends, aren't we_.mp3
lines.transcript: An unfortunate truth. But... we're still friends, aren't we?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000069453.0B2-Nothing could ever take that from us.mp3
lines.transcript: Nothing could ever take that from us.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006847E.0B2-Given the injuries you've sustained... you must be in an immense amount of pain.mp3
lines.transcript: Given the injuries you've sustained... you must be in an immense amount of pain.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 2-Hazard-0000000682E1.0B2-Let me guess_ you want to poke and prod, make it all go away_.mp3
lines.transcript: Let me guess: you want to poke and prod, make it all go away?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006847B.0B2-Well, an examination certainly couldn't hurt.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, an examination certainly couldn't hurt.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 4-Hazard-0000000682E4.0B2-Examine all you like. It won't mend the harm you've done.mp3
lines.transcript: Examine all you like. It won't mend the harm you've done.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006991E.0B2-Hmmm, Juno, you seem quite... attached to your suit.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmmm, Juno, you seem quite... attached to your suit.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-000000068A14.0B2-It keeps my vitals stable. Removing it could be catastrophic!.mp3
lines.transcript: It keeps my vitals stable. Removing it could be catastrophic!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006991F.0B2-You should be fine now that you've acclimated to Earth.mp3
lines.transcript: You should be fine now that you've acclimated to Earth.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 4-Juno-000000068A25.0B2-I will keep it on. Just in case I explode.mp3
lines.transcript: I will keep it on. Just in case I explode.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000069920.0B2-You are on the wrong path, Freja.mp3
lines.transcript: You are on the wrong path, Freja.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069554.0B2-If you say so, Doctor.mp3
lines.transcript: If you say so, Doctor.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-000000069922.0B2-You used to help people! What you're doing now, it's... (exasperated).mp3
lines.transcript: You used to help people! What you're doing now, it's... (exasperated)

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-000000069553.0B2-It’s enough for me. That’s all there is to it.mp3
lines.transcript: It s enough for me. That s all there is to it.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-000000069921.0B2-Freja... You should know you are not the only one who looks back on Overwatch with regret.mp3
lines.transcript: Freja... You should know you are not the only one who looks back on Overwatch with regret.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-0000000696E4.0B2-If I can help it, I don't look back at all.mp3
lines.transcript: If I can help it, I don't look back at all.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006B037.0B2-I'm quite surprised that you can get back up without my help.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm quite surprised that you can get back up without my help.

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 2-Anran-00000006AB22.0B2-Hey, one less person for you to keep an eye on, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, one less person for you to keep an eye on, right?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 3-Mercy-00000006B036.0B2-I wouldn't go that far.mp3
lines.transcript: I wouldn't go that far.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 1-Mercy-00000006B031.0B2-You've come a long way since joining Overwatch. I'm thankful to have your support.mp3
lines.transcript: You've come a long way since joining Overwatch. I'm thankful to have your support.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-00000006AE39.0B2-I am also grateful! You have taught me the meaning of _having each other's backs!_.mp3
lines.transcript: I am also grateful! You have taught me the meaning of "having each other's backs!"

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-00000006B106.0B2-Aw, back at'cha! It's all about relying on each other.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, back at'cha! It's all about relying on each other.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B7AA.0B2-(sigh) If only you were a black cat, you could help me ward off evil.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) If only you were a black cat, you could help me ward off evil.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B362.0B2-Sorry, geez. You're fine the way you are, okay_.mp3
lines.transcript: Sorry, geez. You're fine the way you are, okay?

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B365.0B2-The spirits are breathing down my neck again... gotta find a waterfall to stand under.mp3
lines.transcript: The spirits are breathing down my neck again... gotta find a waterfall to stand under.

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 2-Wuyang-00000006B1CB.0B2-Um, I could make a really big wave_.mp3
lines.transcript: Um, I could make a really big wave?

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B36A.0B2-(huff) It's not the same.mp3
lines.transcript: (huff) It's not the same.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B36D.0B2-Not sure Hanzo likes me much.mp3
lines.transcript: Not sure Hanzo likes me much.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006B541.0B2-Don't take it personal. He thinks everyone's suspicious.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't take it personal. He thinks everyone's suspicious.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B36C.0B2-Aw, but I'm such a stand up guy. You trust me, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, but I'm such a stand up guy. You trust me, right?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-00000006B543.0B2-Uh... not when you say it like that.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh... not when you say it like that.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B36F.0B2-Tell Ryota to stop tagging on Hashimoto turf. If they catch him, he's screwed.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell Ryota to stop tagging on Hashimoto turf. If they catch him, he's screwed.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006B545.0B2-Mizuki... You're actually a huge softie, aren't you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Mizuki... You're actually a huge softie, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B373.0B2-Quit messing around. Don't you know what they do to people that piss them off_.mp3
lines.transcript: Quit messing around. Don't you know what they do to people that piss them off?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-00000006B537.0B2-Relax, I'll talk to him. It's just funny you try to hide how much you care.mp3
lines.transcript: Relax, I'll talk to him. It's just funny you try to hide how much you care.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B364.0B2-Bought another Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet. I have a good feeling about today.mp3
lines.transcript: Bought another Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet. I have a good feeling about today.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006B53B.0B2-I hope you don't buy those often. Pretty sure they're a scam.mp3
lines.transcript: I hope you don't buy those often. Pretty sure they're a scam.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B369.0B2-Every week since I got to Kanezaka.mp3
lines.transcript: Every week since I got to Kanezaka.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-00000006B53D.0B2-See... this is why you're broke.mp3
lines.transcript: See... this is why you're broke.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B370.0B2-Kiriko. I really need your help.mp3
lines.transcript: Kiriko. I really need your help.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006B549.0B2-What's wrong_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B374.0B2-I lost this week's Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet.mp3
lines.transcript: I lost this week's Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet...

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-00000006B547.0B2-There there. I'll pray for you later.mp3
lines.transcript: There there. I'll pray for you later.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 1-Mizuki-00000006B372.0B2-You gonna reap souls without a scythe_.mp3
lines.transcript: You gonna reap souls without a scythe?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000006B28A.0B2-Guns get the job done. If you'd ever fired one, you'd know.mp3
lines.transcript: Guns get the job done. If you'd ever fired one, you'd know.

lines.speaker: Mizuki
lines.filename: 3-Mizuki-00000006B366.0B2-Okay, hand me yours. Let's see what I can do.mp3
lines.transcript: Okay, hand me yours. Let's see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004BB14.0B2-You could all do with a little culture. The cowboy especially.mp3
lines.transcript: You could all do with a little culture. The cowboy especially.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000004A52B.0B2-I'm plenty cultured. Have you ever been to the Cave of Mystery_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm plenty cultured. Have you ever been to the Cave of Mystery?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 3-Cassidy-00000004A531.0B2-(laughs) Didn't think so.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) Didn't think so.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C389.0B2-We've arrived at the art gallery. Where are you_.mp3
lines.transcript: We've arrived at the art gallery. Where are you?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C394.0B2-That could be an unforeseen side effect.mp3
lines.transcript: That could be an unforeseen side effect...

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C38F.0B2-I suppose we could just wait here until we're inevitably overwhelmed by our attackers.mp3
lines.transcript: I suppose we could just wait here until we're inevitably overwhelmed by our attackers.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000004C38E.0B2-Or I might suggest that someone begin breaching the door_.mp3
lines.transcript: Or I might suggest that someone begin breaching the door?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C387.0B2-A pity we'll miss the masquerade. I have the perfect costume.mp3
lines.transcript: A pity we'll miss the masquerade. I have the perfect costume.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000004C386.0B2-You're not the only one who likes to dress up.mp3
lines.transcript: You're not the only one who likes to dress up.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-00000004C385.0B2-There's a lot of things you don't know about me.mp3
lines.transcript: There's a lot of things you don't know about me.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000046740.0B2-Winston, you were never frustrated at the restrictions Overwatch placed upon your research_.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston, you were never frustrated at the restrictions Overwatch placed upon your research?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000048B73.0B2-Of course, but sometimes a measure of caution is needed in a scientist.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course, but sometimes a measure of caution is needed in a scientist.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004687F.0B2-Well, I must never worry about my safety when the brave agents of Helix are with us.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, I must never worry about my safety when the brave agents of Helix are with us.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000004CE21.0B2-Don't be so sure about that.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't be so sure about that.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004686E.0B2-Dr. Zhou, I'm interested in your colleagues' research into the long term effects of cryogenic freezing.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Zhou, I'm interested in your colleagues' research into the long term effects of cryogenic freezing.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000048C59.0B2-Oh, well, yes, I'm sure, maybe... (bursts into tears).mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, well, yes, I'm sure, maybe... (bursts into tears)

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004685F.0B2-How are you feeling, Lacroix_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are you feeling, Lacroix?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000043BA1.0B2-I don't feel. That's the point, isn't it_.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't feel. That's the point, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C3B4.0B2-Your condition seems relatively stable.mp3
lines.transcript: Your condition seems relatively stable.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000004BC76.0B2-No one's accused me of that in a long time.mp3
lines.transcript: No one's accused me of that in a long time.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000045B08.0B2-I must know how your technology functions.mp3
lines.transcript: I must know how your technology functions.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000044262.0B2-Existence is mysterious, isn't it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Existence is mysterious, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000046871.0B2-Started any wars lately_.mp3
lines.transcript: Started any wars lately?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-000000054ED7.0B2-I'd have to check my schedule.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd have to check my schedule.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004C3B2.0B2-I always thought you would understand better than most the duality of human existence.mp3
lines.transcript: I always thought you would understand better than most the duality of human existence.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000004BCE9.0B2-I am at peace with it. I suspect you will be forever unsatisfied.mp3
lines.transcript: I am at peace with it. I suspect you will be forever unsatisfied.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000004687D.0B2-Much more talkative now, aren't you, Genji_.mp3
lines.transcript: Much more talkative now, aren't you, Genji?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000004BCFE.0B2-I find the company more agreeable these days.mp3
lines.transcript: I find the company more agreeable these days.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000049ECE.0B2-I know we have our differences, but your brilliant mind would be welcome amongst my colleagues in Oasis.mp3
lines.transcript: I know we have our differences, but your brilliant mind would be welcome amongst my colleagues in Oasis.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000043A7A.0B2-No thank you. You and your colleagues discredit the field of science. I want nothing to do with it.mp3
lines.transcript: No thank you. You and your colleagues discredit the field of science. I want nothing to do with it.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000046881.0B2-Your state of chronal uncertainty is fascinating to me, Tracer. I do wish you'd allow me to study you.mp3
lines.transcript: Your state of chronal uncertainty is fascinating to me, Tracer. I do wish you'd allow me to study you.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000004B0EE.0B2-While I'm truly touched by your offer, (nervous laugh) I think I'll have to pass.mp3
lines.transcript: While I'm truly touched by your offer, (nervous laugh) I think I'll have to pass.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000046880.0B2-Your body seems to be adapting well to the changes, Gabriel.mp3
lines.transcript: Your body seems to be adapting well to the changes, Gabriel.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000054FB0.0B2-This is what you'd call _well_.mp3
lines.transcript: This is what you'd call "well"?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000045B0F.0B2-Look at this world, Symmetra. See what science has wrought.mp3
lines.transcript: Look at this world, Symmetra. See what science has wrought.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000043E98.0B2-Of course. Science obeys the laws of nature. It is only to be expected.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. Science obeys the laws of nature. It is only to be expected.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000006043B.0B2-Are you breathing petrol, or something more interesting_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you breathing petrol, or something more interesting?

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-00000005E028.0B2-Want some_.mp3
lines.transcript: Want some?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-00000006239F.0B2-No, thank you. I'll just observe.mp3
lines.transcript: No, thank you. I'll just observe.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000005F0A3.0B2-Have you enjoyed your time away with the fairies, Dr. De Kuiper_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you enjoyed your time away with the fairies, Dr. De Kuiper?

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-00000005F0A4.0B2-They do make lovely conversation.mp3
lines.transcript: They do make lovely conversation.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623A2.0B2-(sigh) What a nauseating bout of déjà vu.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) What a nauseating bout of déjà vu.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000006224B.0B2-Yep. Working with you has always made me sick.mp3
lines.transcript: Yep. Working with you has always made me sick.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 3-Reaper-000000061F94.0B2-Are you planning to whine the whole time... again_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you planning to whine the whole time... again?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-0000000621EF.0B2-(sigh).mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh)

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623A5.0B2-Aggression is no substitute for ability.mp3
lines.transcript: Aggression is no substitute for ability.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-000000061736.0B2-Reckon that's true. Good thing I have both.mp3
lines.transcript: Reckon that's true. Good thing I have both.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623A6.0B2-Does it bother you that you've taken as many lives as you've saved_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does it bother you that you've taken as many lives as you've saved?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000006251B.0B2-I don't mind killing monsters. But go on, keep pushing me.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't mind killing monsters. But go on, keep pushing me.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623B5.0B2-So, sweet Idina has grown into a domineering beast.mp3
lines.transcript: So, sweet Idina has grown into a domineering beast.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000062540.0B2-My name is Orisa. You would be wise to remember it.mp3
lines.transcript: My name is Orisa. You would be wise to remember it.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623B8.0B2-I've read your report on cryogenically preserving severed appendages. I would be happy to assist in your.mp3
lines.transcript: I've read your report on cryogenically preserving severed appendages. I would be happy to assist in your research.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000623DE.0B2-No thank you. I don't think our methodologies are very aligned.mp3
lines.transcript: No thank you. I don't think our methodologies are very aligned.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-000000067707.0B2-Come now, doctor. I was only hoping to lend a hand.mp3
lines.transcript: Come now, doctor. I was only hoping to lend a hand.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 4-Moira-00000006770B.0B2-Of course. I've heard you prefer working alone.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. I've heard you prefer working alone.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000067708.0B2-How fares your research, Dr. Ziegler_ Making much progress through all that red tape_.mp3
lines.transcript: How fares your research, Dr. Ziegler? Making much progress through all that red tape?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000006203E.0B2-It's called the Hippocratic Oath, doctor. Ring any bells_.mp3
lines.transcript: It's called the Hippocratic Oath, doctor. Ring any bells?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000633DF.0B2-I could have rebuilt you without all that metal.mp3
lines.transcript: I could have rebuilt you without all that metal.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000063C17.0B2-And left me a monster, like your other creations_.mp3
lines.transcript: And left me a monster, like your other creations?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-0000000633E3.0B2-That is a matter of perspective.mp3
lines.transcript: That is a matter of perspective.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000633E4.0B2-You've been rather quiet today, Doctor. I've gotten a lot done.mp3
lines.transcript: You've been rather quiet today, Doctor. I've gotten a lot done.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-0000000634F9.0B2-If one built a violin of Planck length, could one play music into another universe_.mp3
lines.transcript: If one built a violin of Planck length, could one play music into another universe?

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-0000000634FA.0B2-Someone must build a particle collider around the sun!.mp3
lines.transcript: Someone must build a particle collider around the sun!

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 4-Sigma-0000000634FB.0B2-I wonder if frogs dream of ponds.mp3
lines.transcript: I wonder if frogs dream of ponds.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 5-Sigma-0000000634F7.0B2-Can a fish that never sees the surface know it's underwater_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can a fish that never sees the surface know it's underwater?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 6-Moira-0000000633E5.0B2-(sigh) There it goes.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) There it goes.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-00000006770C.0B2-There is always room for brilliance at Oasis.mp3
lines.transcript: There is always room for brilliance at Oasis.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-000000064577.0B2-I'm honored, but I have some reservations about your… oh, what's the word_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm honored, but I have some reservations about your&  oh, what's the word?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 3-Moira-00000006770D.0B2-Atrocities_ Inhumanity_ _Crimes against nature_.mp3
lines.transcript: Atrocities? Inhumanity? "Crimes against nature"?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 4-Lifeweaver-000000064574.0B2-(chuckles) Any of those will do.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckles) Any of those will do.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-0000000623A1.0B2-It seems your little band is back together. For the moment, at least.mp3
lines.transcript: It seems your little band is back together. For the moment, at least.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000069105.0B2-Overwatch is here to stay. And we're coming for you next.mp3
lines.transcript: Overwatch is here to stay. And we're coming for you next.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 1-Moira-000000067709.0B2-Yet another stretch of cloudless skies and idyllic ocean views. Wonderful.mp3
lines.transcript: Yet another stretch of cloudless skies and idyllic ocean views. Wonderful.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000684F7.0B2-(sigh) Of course you would hate the beach.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Moira-00000006ACD9.0B2-Hm. Though an added dose of obedience would be appreciated.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000037EDF.0B2-Why does that feel like an accusation_.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000035280.0B2-Tracer, is it wrong for us to operate outside the law_.mp3
lines.transcript: Tracer, is it wrong for us to operate outside the law?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000004B0EF.0B2-That's a difficult question, Orisa. I think there are times when you have to do what is right.mp3
lines.transcript: That's a difficult question, Orisa. I think there are times when you have to do what is right.

lines.filename: 2-Bastion-0000000412BD.0B2-(Torbjörn impression).mp3
lines.transcript: (Torbjörn impression)

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-00000003527E.0B2-Reinhardt, I have allocated my learning processes towards analyzing your combat performance.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, I have allocated my learning processes towards analyzing your combat performance.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-0000000446D4.0B2-What an odd compliment.mp3
lines.transcript: What an odd compliment.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-00000003527D.0B2-Reinhardt, why is your shield so important to you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, why is your shield so important to you?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-0000000446D3.0B2-It is a reminder of my duty.mp3
lines.transcript: It is a reminder of my duty.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000035292.0B2-Zarya, I have learned to utilize my graviton charge by watching you.mp3
lines.transcript: Zarya, I have learned to utilize my graviton charge by watching you.

lines.filename: 2-Zarya-000000035FBF.0B2-Your compliment is unwanted.mp3
lines.transcript: Your compliment is unwanted.

lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000035293.0B2-Tekhartha Zenyatta, I wish to learn about the iris.mp3
lines.transcript: Tekhartha Zenyatta, I wish to learn about the iris.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000004424D.0B2-I would be happy to teach you. It is rare that I meet one with such an unformed mind.mp3
lines.transcript: I would be happy to teach you. It is rare that I meet one with such an unformed mind.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000035282.0B2-Doomfist, you will be brought to justice.mp3
lines.transcript: Doomfist, you will be brought to justice.

lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-00000004143E.0B2-(laughs) I like you.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) I like you.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000035294.0B2-I consider Reinhardt to be the model upon which I have based my own behaviors.mp3
lines.transcript: I consider Reinhardt to be the model upon which I have based my own behaviors.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000037EE0.0B2-What a terrifying thought.mp3
lines.transcript: What a terrifying thought.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-0000000351AE.0B2-Scanning... Bastion, model e54 detected. All models subject to termination.mp3
lines.transcript: Scanning... Bastion, model e54 detected. All models subject to termination.

lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000043A39.0B2-(scared beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (scared beeps)

lines.filename: 3-Bastion-0000000412BC.0B2-(scared, whimpering beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (scared, whimpering beeps)

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-00000006253B.0B2-You were Efi's favorite character from the Overwatch cartoon.mp3
lines.transcript: You were Efi's favorite character from the Overwatch cartoon.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000062681.0B2-Eh... it made me look like a superhero. The reality was... not as inspiring.mp3
lines.transcript: Eh... it made me look like a superhero. The reality was... not as inspiring.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 3-Orisa-00000006253C.0B2-You gave Efi courage when she needed it most. I am grateful for you, Captain.mp3
lines.transcript: You gave Efi courage when she needed it most. I am grateful for you, Captain.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-000000061F3A.0B2-That... means a lot, Orisa.mp3
lines.transcript: That... means a lot, Orisa.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-0000000625BC.0B2-Cause trouble in my city, and I will show you how we deal with vermin.mp3
lines.transcript: Cause trouble in my city, and I will show you how we deal with vermin.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000062631.0B2-(hamster noises) The hamster will use your chassis as a vacation home.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) The hamster will use your chassis as a vacation home.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-0000000625C0.0B2-I see you glancing at me. You wish to ride me into battle.mp3
lines.transcript: I see you glancing at me. You wish to ride me into battle.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000061F91.0B2-I- What a preposterous thought!.mp3
lines.transcript: I- What a preposterous thought!

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 3-Orisa-0000000625C1.0B2-Do not lie, archer. It is beneath you.mp3
lines.transcript: Do not lie, archer. It is beneath you.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 1-Orisa-000000063219.0B2-Will we ever rid the world of evil, Zenyatta_.mp3
lines.transcript: Will we ever rid the world of evil, Zenyatta?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635E0.0B2-As long as there is free will, I fear there will be evil.mp3
lines.transcript: As long as there is free will, I fear there will be evil.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 3-Orisa-00000006321A.0B2-But denying free will is also evil.mp3
lines.transcript: But denying free will is also evil.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-0000000635E1.0B2-Quite a puzzle, isn't it.mp3
lines.transcript: Quite a puzzle, isn't it.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000000B178.0B2-Reinhardt, you know, I had a poster of you on my wall when I was younger.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, you know, I had a poster of you on my wall when I was younger.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000021DEA.0B2-I remember the poster. My hair was amazing.mp3
lines.transcript: I remember the poster. My hair was amazing.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000002A8D2.0B2-Hey Torbjörn, check out my new suit. Mark VI. State of the art.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey Torbjörn, check out my new suit. Mark VI. State of the art.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000002A8FD.0B2-(clears throat) Jump jets... concussion rockets... (grumbles) Well, yes, it's looking pretty good.mp3
lines.transcript: (clears throat) Jump jets... concussion rockets... (grumbles) Well, yes, it's looking pretty good.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000002A8D5.0B2-Mom, I know why you didn't want me to join Overwatch, but it's still what I want.mp3
lines.transcript: Mom, I know why you didn't want me to join Overwatch, but it's still what I want.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC8A.0B2-I didn't want that life for you. But I know that it is your decision, and I will support it.mp3
lines.transcript: I didn't want that life for you. But I know that it is your decision, and I will support it.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000036B03.0B2-I'm keeping an eye on you, Soldier_ 76.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm keeping an eye on you, Soldier: 76.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000038A30.0B2-When have I heard that before_.mp3
lines.transcript: When have I heard that before?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000036B01.0B2-Mom, don't you think it's time that you told Sam you're alive_.mp3
lines.transcript: Mom, don't you think it's time that you told Sam you're alive?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-000000038494.0B2-You let me worry about what your father needs to know.mp3
lines.transcript: You let me worry about what your father needs to know.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE16.0B2-Helix should keep the peace in Vishkar developments.mp3
lines.transcript: Helix should keep the peace in Vishkar developments.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000043E99.0B2-We do not need an army to keep the peace. We prefer our own methods.mp3
lines.transcript: We do not need an army to keep the peace. We prefer our own methods.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000002A8D1.0B2-You're so lucky, Tracer. Ever since I was a little girl, I dreamed of joining Overwatch.mp3
lines.transcript: You're so lucky, Tracer. Ever since I was a little girl, I dreamed of joining Overwatch.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000002CDED.0B2-Maybe you'll still get your chance. Who knows what the future holds_.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe you'll still get your chance. Who knows what the future holds?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000036AFA.0B2-Reinhardt, are we still on for ice fishing_ You're not still sore about last year, are you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, are we still on for ice fishing? You're not still sore about last year, are you?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000038158.0B2-Last year_ (chuckles) I'll show you! I'll catch twice as many as you this year!.mp3
lines.transcript: Last year? (chuckles) I'll show you! I'll catch twice as many as you this year!

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000002A8DD.0B2-I always dreamed of the day we'd fight together.mp3
lines.transcript: I always dreamed of the day we'd fight together.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC8B.0B2-Wanting a better life for you was all I ever dreamed of.mp3
lines.transcript: Wanting a better life for you was all I ever dreamed of.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000036B02.0B2-Tracer, have you thought about joining Helix_ We could always use a good pilot.mp3
lines.transcript: Tracer, have you thought about joining Helix? We could always use a good pilot.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000003712F.0B2-Aw, I'm flattered, really, but I have some other things occupying my time now.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, I'm flattered, really, but I have some other things occupying my time now.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE11.0B2-Brigitte, I'd love it if you could take a look at my armor sometime.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte, I'd love it if you could take a look at my armor sometime.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005504B.0B2-It'll take some time for me to get familiar with the design, but if you don't mind, I'd love to!.mp3
lines.transcript: It'll take some time for me to get familiar with the design, but if you don't mind, I'd love to!

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE10.0B2-Hey Brigitte, want to go hit the weights_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey Brigitte, want to go hit the weights?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000055061.0B2-You're on.mp3
lines.transcript: You're on.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-000000055074.0B2-Only if we can get something to eat afterwards!.mp3
lines.transcript: Only if we can get something to eat afterwards!

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE0F.0B2-Did you ever want to join Overwatch growing up_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you ever want to join Overwatch growing up?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000055075.0B2-Not after how they treated Reinhardt. He deserved better.mp3
lines.transcript: Not after how they treated Reinhardt. He deserved better.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE13.0B2-A lot of good people in Helix died when you escaped. People I knew.mp3
lines.transcript: A lot of good people in Helix died when you escaped. People I knew.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-000000041467.0B2-Don't make it personal. It had nothing to do with you.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't make it personal. It had nothing to do with you.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000004CE15.0B2-An omnic in my squad took his own life rather than be controlled by an AI.mp3
lines.transcript: An omnic in my squad took his own life rather than be controlled by an AI.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000004424E.0B2-A noble, but tragic sacrifice. I hope that you will honor it.mp3
lines.transcript: A noble, but tragic sacrifice. I hope that you will honor it.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000036AFB.0B2-My new year's resolution_ Actually take that time off.mp3
lines.transcript: My new year's resolution? Actually take that time off.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000038157.0B2-That'd be the day.mp3
lines.transcript: That'd be the day.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000620A5.0B2-You stole a lot of things that Helix was supposed to protect.mp3
lines.transcript: You stole a lot of things that Helix was supposed to protect.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-00000005E029.0B2-What's it to you_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's it to you?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-0000000620A6.0B2-My unit would have eaten you alive.mp3
lines.transcript: My unit would have eaten you alive.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 4-Roadhog-00000005E02A.0B2-(chuckle).mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle)

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000620A7.0B2-Why not fire arrows that explode_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why not fire arrows that explode?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000005E42B.0B2-With enough skill and precision, explosives are unnecessary.mp3
lines.transcript: With enough skill and precision, explosives are unnecessary.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-0000000620A8.0B2-You saying I can't aim_ (incredulous laugh) I can aim.mp3
lines.transcript: You saying I can't aim? (incredulous laugh) I can aim.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000620B1.0B2-I don’t work with criminals.mp3
lines.transcript: I don t work with criminals.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000005EF8C.0B2-What's right isn't always what's legal.mp3
lines.transcript: What's right isn't always what's legal.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-0000000620B2.0B2-Then you change the laws.mp3
lines.transcript: Then you change the laws.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-00000005EFDD.0B2-Easy for you to say.mp3
lines.transcript: Easy for you to say.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000620B5.0B2-I see your sneakers. You, me, the basketball courts later.mp3
lines.transcript: I see your sneakers. You, me, the basketball courts later.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-0000000627A9.0B2-Sure, but I don't play without stakes.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure, but I don't play without stakes.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-0000000620B6.0B2-Likewise. What are you willing to lose_.mp3
lines.transcript: Likewise. What are you willing to lose?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-0000000627AA.0B2-Oh, Pharah-chan. I've never lost.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, Pharah-chan. I've never lost.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000620B9.0B2-(sigh) I think I went a bit overboard on the weights yesterday.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I think I went a bit overboard on the weights yesterday.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-0000000625F9.0B2-Pace yourself! That's what I always tell Reinhardt. Not that he ever listens.mp3
lines.transcript: Pace yourself! That's what I always tell Reinhardt. Not that he ever listens.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000062D83.0B2-That would be a liability. You'd just fall out of it.mp3
lines.transcript: That would be a liability. You'd just fall out of it.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-000000062D78.0B2-You can take that up with Helix.mp3
lines.transcript: You can take that up with Helix.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000062D40.0B2-Hey Winston. Want to hear a secret joke about peanut butter_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey Winston. Want to hear a secret joke about peanut butter?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-000000063766.0B2-I sure do.mp3
lines.transcript: I sure do.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-000000062D3F.0B2-Sorry, can't tell you. You might spread it.mp3
lines.transcript: Sorry, can't tell you. You might spread it.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 4-Winston-000000063767.0B2-Aw... (gasp) Wait, I get it!.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw... (gasp) Wait, I get it!

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000006401C.0B2-Thank you, mother.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you, mother.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-000000064100.0B2-You're welcome, Fareeha.mp3
lines.transcript: You're welcome, Fareeha.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-0000000674A8.0B2-I think I'm going to get a chihuahua.mp3
lines.transcript: I think I'm going to get a chihuahua.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-0000000680A9.0B2-You're joking.mp3
lines.transcript: You're joking.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-0000000674A7.0B2-Why, what's wrong with chihuahuas_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why, what's wrong with chihuahuas?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-0000000680AB.0B2-Uh, well, for starters, they aren't corgis.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh, well, for starters, they aren't corgis.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000006402B.0B2-If you ever need help, just fly to me, Angela.mp3
lines.transcript: If you ever need help, just fly to me, Angela.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000064ABB.0B2-(chuckle) Ah, my hero! You're like a knight in flying armor!.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Ah, my hero! You're like a knight in flying armor!

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-00000006402C.0B2-That's what I'm going for.mp3
lines.transcript: That's what I'm going for.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-00000006576C.0B2-Hey, Hephaestus. Is my sister treating you alright_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, Hephaestus. Is my sister treating you alright?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-0000000668C2.0B2-You must have me mistaken for someone else.mp3
lines.transcript: You must have me mistaken for someone else.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-00000006576D.0B2-Pretending to be a mortal, eh_ Don't worry, I won't tell.mp3
lines.transcript: Pretending to be a mortal, eh? Don't worry, I won't tell.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 1-Pharah-000000066770.0B2-Why does your face look so familiar_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why does your face look so familiar?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-000000066380.0B2-There's a price on my head in 17 countries. I'm hoping for an even 20.mp3
lines.transcript: There's a price on my head in 17 countries. I'm hoping for an even 20.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 3-Pharah-00000006676F.0B2-Yeah. That's it.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. That's it.

lines.speaker: Radio
lines.filename: 1-Radio-000000064C1C.0B2-The castle has fallen. Approach at your own peril.mp3
lines.transcript: The castle has fallen. Approach at your own peril.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-0000000643FB.0B2-These messages... I hope everyone got out safe.mp3
lines.transcript: These messages... I hope everyone got out safe.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 3-Kiriko-0000000643FC.0B2-Does anyone know what's going on here_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does anyone know what's going on here?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-0000000648AF.0B2-I'd bet these zomnics have something to do with the lord of the castle… and Doctor Junkenstein, no doubt.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd bet these zomnics have something to do with the lord of the castle&  and Doctor Junkenstein, no doubt.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 5-Junker Queen-0000000648B0.0B2-What are we waiting for_ Let's get to the castle and chop that doctor to bits!.mp3
lines.transcript: What are we waiting for? Let's get to the castle and chop that doctor to bits!

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005D710.0B2-It is surprising that you would resist freedom for omnics. I'd heard you championed our cause.mp3
lines.transcript: It is surprising that you would resist freedom for omnics. I'd heard you championed our cause.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005D9E7.0B2-Maybe my optics need calibrating, because I don't see any _freedom_ in indoctrination.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe my optics need calibrating, because I don't see any "freedom" in indoctrination.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F113.0B2-It is the privilege of humanity to trifle with every threat.mp3
lines.transcript: It is the privilege of humanity to trifle with every threat.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F122.0B2-I give everything to protect my home. So don't trifle with me.mp3
lines.transcript: I give everything to protect my home. So don't trifle with me.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F16C.0B2-You were one of Anubis's jailers. You should have destroyed it.mp3
lines.transcript: You were one of Anubis's jailers. You should have destroyed it.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000005F178.0B2-That is... not what I would have expected you to say.mp3
lines.transcript: That is... not what I would have expected you to say.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F17A.0B2-Of course not. You humans love your assumptions.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course not. You humans love your assumptions.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F17B.0B2-Your armor is interesting. What does it use as a power source_.mp3
lines.transcript: Your armor is interesting. What does it use as a power source?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000005F179.0B2-Planning to steal it for your own designs_ Heh, nice try.mp3
lines.transcript: Planning to steal it for your own designs? Heh, nice try.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F132.0B2-I was being polite. Frankly, it's a little primitive for my tastes.mp3
lines.transcript: I was being polite. Frankly, it's a little primitive for my tastes.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F170.0B2-You appear to have a bird following you. Why_.mp3
lines.transcript: You appear to have a bird following you. Why?

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000005F13E.0B2-(explanatory beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (explanatory beeps)

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F171.0B2-Interesting. Well, if I see any twigs, I will let you know.mp3
lines.transcript: Interesting. Well, if I see any twigs, I will let you know.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F139.0B2-Are you satisfied following humans around like an observant pet_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you satisfied following humans around like an observant pet?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-00000005F142.0B2-There's no shame in learning from others. Try it sometime.mp3
lines.transcript: There's no shame in learning from others. Try it sometime.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F181.0B2-My brother wasted too much of his life teaching you.mp3
lines.transcript: My brother wasted too much of his life teaching you.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000005F157.0B2-I agree.mp3
lines.transcript: I agree.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F163.0B2-Really_.mp3
lines.transcript: Really?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-00000005F164.0B2-Yes. Like you, I was undeserving of his patience.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. Like you, I was undeserving of his patience.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F14B.0B2-Is that... is that a bow and arrow_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that... is that a bow and arrow?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000005F14A.0B2-Yes.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F165.0B2-Are firearms not to your taste_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are firearms not to your taste?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 4-Hanzo-00000005F149.0B2-They make killing too simple.mp3
lines.transcript: They make killing too simple.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F148.0B2-I hear you like to prey on omnics. Try me.mp3
lines.transcript: I hear you like to prey on omnics. Try me.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 2-Junker Queen-00000005F166.0B2-No thanks. Fought a bunch of ya before. You're a bit gimmicky, no offense.mp3
lines.transcript: No thanks. Fought a bunch of ya before. You're a bit gimmicky, no offense.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F147.0B2-Gimmicky.mp3
lines.transcript: Gimmicky.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 4-Junker Queen-00000005F167.0B2-I said no offense.mp3
lines.transcript: I said no offense.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F161.0B2-It must gall you, working with me. Keeping me alive.mp3
lines.transcript: It must gall you, working with me. Keeping me alive.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000005F156.0B2-I don't want anyone to die. Not even you.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't want anyone to die. Not even you.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F155.0B2-Your willingness to experiment on your own kind fascinates me, Doctor. Why do you do it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Your willingness to experiment on your own kind fascinates me, Doctor. Why do you do it?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000005F159.0B2-I'm surprised you have to ask. We have an enemy in common.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm surprised you have to ask. We have an enemy in common.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F15A.0B2-Overwatch_.mp3
lines.transcript: Overwatch?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 4-Moira-00000005F15B.0B2-No. Mortality.mp3
lines.transcript: No. Mortality.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000005F17F.0B2-Tell me, is it true you never miss_.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell me, is it true you never miss?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005F137.0B2-Everyone misses.mp3
lines.transcript: Everyone misses.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000005F16D.0B2-That wasn't an answer.mp3
lines.transcript: That wasn't an answer.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 4-Widowmaker-00000005F16E.0B2-I don't owe you one.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't owe you one.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000062851.0B2-So, you were the one leading the fight against my forces in Numbani.mp3
lines.transcript: So, you were the one leading the fight against my forces in Numbani.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000625BF.0B2-Yes. A fight you did not attend.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. A fight you did not attend.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000006413B.0B2-Another location demanded my attention.mp3
lines.transcript: Another location demanded my attention.

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 4-Orisa-000000067C29.0B2-Did you fail there too_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you fail there too?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000064007.0B2-From one engineer to another_ why a ball_.mp3
lines.transcript: From one engineer to another: why a ball?

lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-0000000639BC.0B2-(hamster noises) A wheel would fall over.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) A wheel would fall over.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000064008.0B2-(chuckle) Delightful.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Delightful.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000063FE7.0B2-Do you remember when we sat up at night, counting stars_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you remember when we sat up at night, counting stars?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000658DE.0B2-Yes. We wondered how many others omnics were doing the same.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. We wondered how many others omnics were doing the same.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000063FE9.0B2-Yes, well. I've learned that too few of them look up at all.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, well. I've learned that too few of them look up at all.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000063FEE.0B2-How much of the world have you seen_.mp3
lines.transcript: How much of the world have you seen?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000067C26.0B2-Efi has taken me to many wonderful places.mp3
lines.transcript: Efi has taken me to many wonderful places.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000063FF0.0B2-Have you ever wanted to make your own path_ To leave her behind_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you ever wanted to make your own path? To leave her behind?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 4-Orisa-000000067C2A.0B2-There is nowhere worth going without her.mp3
lines.transcript: There is nowhere worth going without her.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000063FF8.0B2-It's a shame none of us have ever met Aurora, your predecessor.mp3
lines.transcript: It's a shame none of us have ever met Aurora, your predecessor.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000066305.0B2-I hear that often. (clears throat) What would you have asked her_.mp3
lines.transcript: I hear that often. (clears throat) What would you have asked her?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000064004.0B2-The same thing I ask her every day. I wish she could answer.mp3
lines.transcript: The same thing I ask her every day. I wish she could answer.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-0000000655B9.0B2-Did you know I am also the god of horses_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you know I am also the god of horses?

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000006576B.0B2-Yes, brother, everyone knows you're the god of horses. You never shut up about being the god of horses.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, brother, everyone knows you're the god of horses. You never shut up about being the god of horses.

lines.transcript: Ah, even I knew that, and I've been trapped in a maze for 800 years.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-0000000655BA.0B2-Good, good. Just wanted to make sure.mp3

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000069A43.0B2-I've heard you _Phreaks_ modify my kind. Force us to hide, even among outcasts.mp3
lines.transcript: I've heard you "Phreaks" modify my kind. Force us to hide, even among outcasts.

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 2-Hazard-00000006930B.0B2-Ravagers come to us for a fresh start. New chassis can go a long way.mp3
lines.transcript: Ravagers come to us for a fresh start. New chassis can go a long way.
