lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000069A44.0B2-Towards what_ Assimilation_ Subservience_.mp3

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 4-Hazard-000000069309.0B2-Nah. That's more your deal, I'd wager.mp3
lines.transcript: Nah. That's more your deal, I'd wager.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000069A47.0B2-You call my people _bots_, yet you now take orders from one.mp3
lines.transcript: You call my people "bots", yet you now take orders from one.

lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069A22.0B2-Max isn't my boss. I call the shots as much as he does.mp3
lines.transcript: Max isn't my boss. I call the shots as much as he does.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000069A48.0B2-Your self-importance is irksome, but impressively, your denial may be worse.mp3

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-000000069A46.0B2-So, you work with Maximilien. I am amazed even a human can tolerate him.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069A25.0B2-And here I thought you fought for all omnics.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-000000069A45.0B2-He cares nothing for our people and lives only to enrich himself. I suppose you have that in common.mp3
lines.transcript: He cares nothing for our people and lives only to enrich himself. I suppose you have that in common.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 1-Ramattra-00000006A8D1.0B2-So you've found your quarry at last, hunter. Another paragon of Overwatch reduced to a villainous merc.mp3
lines.transcript: So you've found your quarry at last, hunter. Another paragon of Overwatch reduced to a villainous mercenary.

lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B605.0B2-It's not like that! He isn't himself right now.mp3

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 3-Ramattra-00000006A8CE.0B2-Nor were my people 'themselves' during the Crisis. But would you afford them the same forgiveness_.mp3
lines.transcript: Nor were my people 'themselves' during the Crisis. But would you afford them the same forgiveness?

lines.filename: 4-Freja-00000006B604.0B2-I... (sigh) I don't know.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Reaper-00000005E41E.0B2-We're going to get along just fine.mp3

lines.speaker: Reaper

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 1-Reaper-00000006B291.0B2-You really think Antonio's daughter won't take out everyone involved in the Venice incident_ (scoff) Mor.mp3
lines.transcript: You really think Antonio's daughter won't take out everyone involved in the Venice incident? (scoff) Moron.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000006ACE0.0B2-Only one man pulled the trigger that night. I'd be more concerned for his well-being.mp3
lines.transcript: Only one man pulled the trigger that night. I'd be more concerned for his well-being.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 1-Reaper-00000006B292.0B2-We need to be careful. If Vendetta finds us, we're dead.mp3
lines.transcript: We need to be careful. If Vendetta finds us, we're dead.

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-00000006B2B0.0B2-Uh, who's _we_ You're the one who killed her old man.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh, who's "we"? You're the one who killed her old man.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 3-Reaper-00000006B286.0B2-If I go down, I'm taking you with me.mp3
lines.transcript: If I go down, I'm taking you with me.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 1-Reaper-00000006B28F.0B2-So Overwatch is hiring interns now. How adorable.mp3
lines.transcript: So Overwatch is hiring interns now. How adorable.

lines.speaker: Wuyang
lines.filename: 2-Wuyang-00000006B1CC.0B2-I know right_ I actually applied just before you ran away from Talon.mp3
lines.transcript: I know right? I actually applied just before you ran away from Talon.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 1-Reaper-00000006B289.0B2-I thought you'd know better than to kill Doomfist, since you never shut up about 'retribution'.mp3
lines.transcript: I thought you'd know better than to kill Doomfist, since you never shut up about 'retribution'.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 2-Vendetta-00000006B395.0B2-Your failed leader was already bleeding allies, and what few remain can be swiftly put down.mp3
lines.transcript: Your failed leader was already bleeding allies, and what few remain can be swiftly put down.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000000AE13.0B2-Let's show them how it's done.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's show them how it's done.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000000B482.0B2-I think I've got this, old man.mp3
lines.transcript: I think I've got this, old man.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000002A85A.0B2-You know, Torbjörn, you would make an excellent Santa Claus! Ho, ho, ho!.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, Torbjörn, you would make an excellent Santa Claus! Ho, ho, ho!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000044483.0B2-Maybe this year you can be the elf. I think Ingrid's been working on something.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe this year you can be the elf. I think Ingrid's been working on something.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000004A61E.0B2-Stay close to me!.mp3
lines.transcript: Stay close to me!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000004A1EA.0B2-Of course. How else can I bail you out when you get into trouble_.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. How else can I bail you out when you get into trouble?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000002A850.0B2-Just like old times, eh Ana_.mp3
lines.transcript: Just like old times, eh Ana?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC90.0B2-Reinhardt, things may change, but you never do.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, things may change, but you never do.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000002A85E.0B2-Ana! How can this be_ I thought you were dead.mp3
lines.transcript: Ana! How can this be? I thought you were dead.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC8F.0B2-I'm sorry, Reinhardt. After everything that happened, I needed time.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm sorry, Reinhardt. After everything that happened, I needed time.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000021E05.0B2-Ah, Winston, it's up to us to keep our comrades safe!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, Winston, it's up to us to keep our comrades safe!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000001FD5E.0B2-I'll be right behind you, sir.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll be right behind you, sir.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000002A84F.0B2-(laughs) Finally I have beaten the champion at arm wrestling!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) Finally I have beaten the champion at arm wrestling!

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000002A7EC.0B2-I heard it was your birthday, old man, so I went easy on you.mp3
lines.transcript: I heard it was your birthday, old man, so I went easy on you.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000000AE0D.0B2-You always did take good care of my armor.mp3
lines.transcript: You always did take good care of my armor.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000000ADB2.0B2-Just try to keep it in one piece... for once.mp3
lines.transcript: Just try to keep it in one piece... for once.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000000A6F6.0B2-You kids today with your techno music. You should enjoy the classics, like Hasselhoff!.mp3
lines.transcript: You kids today with your techno music. You should enjoy the classics, like Hasselhoff!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000000B514.0B2-I can't even take you seriously right now.mp3
lines.transcript: I can't even take you seriously right now.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000021E07.0B2-I was wondering if you'd sign something for me... it's (clears throat) for a friend.mp3
lines.transcript: I was wondering if you'd sign something for me... it's (clears throat) for a friend.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000000B945.0B2-Aw, after this match is over. Right now... it's time to get serious.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, after this match is over. Right now... it's time to get serious.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 3-D.Va-00000000B9B5.0B2-(giggles) Of course. Here you go... love, D.Va!.mp3
lines.transcript: (giggles) Of course. Here you go... love, D.Va!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000000AE4B.0B2-Keep training, and maybe someday you could learn to handle a real weapon.mp3
lines.transcript: Keep training, and maybe someday you could learn to handle a real weapon.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000000ACBA.0B2-That hammer doesn't look so heavy.mp3
lines.transcript: That hammer doesn't look so heavy.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005B9A1.0B2-My elbow servo isn’t actuating! Gah, that’s annoying. Brigitte!.mp3
lines.transcript: My elbow servo isn t actuating! Gah, that s annoying. Brigitte!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000004A1CE.0B2-No point in fixing it now, you'll probably just mess it up again!.mp3
lines.transcript: No point in fixing it now, you'll probably just mess it up again!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000059985.0B2-Wait! Yes! Yes yes yes yes yes!.mp3
lines.transcript: Wait! Yes! Yes yes yes yes yes!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000061282.0B2-It worked! Oh, Papa, I'm so relieved!.mp3
lines.transcript: It worked! Oh, Papa, I'm so relieved!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000059984.0B2-(heavy sigh) I am definitely too old for this.mp3
lines.transcript: (heavy sigh) I am definitely too old for this.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-00000005C13D.0B2-(heavy sigh) I don't know why it always has to be so close.mp3
lines.transcript: (heavy sigh) I don't know why it always has to be so close...

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 5-Torbjörn-00000005C13E.0B2-Phew. Cooked soup with a nail... and it turned out just fine.mp3
lines.transcript: Phew. Cooked soup with a nail... and it turned out just fine.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 6-Torbjörn-00000005C13F.0B2-To be completely honest, I was not sure that was going to work.mp3
lines.transcript: To be completely honest, I was not sure that was going to work.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BC77.0B2-Work together! This might get a little messy.mp3
lines.transcript: Work together! This might get a little messy...

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005B9A5.0B2-Where did a medic like you learn to handle a weapon like that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Where did a medic like you learn to handle a weapon like that?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B904.0B2-The number of battlefields I've seen, I was bound to pick something up.mp3
lines.transcript: The number of battlefields I've seen, I was bound to pick something up.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005B9A0.0B2-Stay behind me! I will keep you safe.mp3
lines.transcript: Stay behind me! I will keep you safe.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000005B9D0.0B2-Thanks, but I already have a bodyguard.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks, but I already have a bodyguard.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BB25.0B2-Sombra, something is wrong with my phone. It is so slow!.mp3
lines.transcript: Sombra, something is wrong with my phone. It is so slow!

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-00000005BC00.0B2-I'm not tech support, big guy.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not tech support, big guy.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005BB26.0B2-I know, I know. I'm just not very good with computers.mp3
lines.transcript: I know, I know. I'm just not very good with computers.

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-00000005BC01.0B2-(sighs) Have you tried turning it off and on_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) Have you tried turning it off and on?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BA92.0B2-Is it too late to build a catapult_ Just launch me out there, I'll take care of this thing.mp3
lines.transcript: Is it too late to build a catapult? Just launch me out there, I'll take care of this thing.

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000005BC79.0B2-(teasing beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (teasing beeps)

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BB86.0B2-I don’t like this Bastion unit. He’s stealing all the glory!.mp3
lines.transcript: I don t like this Bastion unit. He s stealing all the glory!

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000005BB88.0B2-(confused beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (confused beeps)

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-00000005BB87.0B2-Don't listen to him. I'm glad you're helping.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't listen to him. I'm glad you're helping.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BC46.0B2-You know who I wish was here_ That scientist with the freeze gun. She took down the Titan in Paris be.mp3
lines.transcript: You know who I wish was here? That scientist with the freeze gun. She took down the Titan in Paris before you could say Gesundheit.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005BC47.0B2-Dr. Zhou is a genius, no doubt. But we’ll make do.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Zhou is a genius, no doubt. But we ll make do.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BCA5.0B2-How are the grandkids, Torbjorn_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are the grandkids, Torbjorn?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005BCA6.0B2-Lucas has gotten so big, you wouldn’t believe it! The twins pull him into all their pranks.mp3
lines.transcript: Lucas has gotten so big, you wouldn t believe it! The twins pull him into all their pranks.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-000000061286.0B2-Oh no. Their poor cat!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh no. Their poor cat!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BCA7.0B2-How are the grandkids, Torbjorn_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are the grandkids, Torbjorn?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005BCA8.0B2-Märta just finished another vampire manuscript. I’m supposed to read it, but… well, you know.mp3
lines.transcript: Märta just finished another vampire manuscript. I m supposed to read it, but&  well, you know.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005BCA9.0B2-What_! I love her stories! Send it to me!.mp3
lines.transcript: What?! I love her stories! Send it to me!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BCAA.0B2-How are the grandkids, Torbjorn_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are the grandkids, Torbjorn?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005BCAB.0B2-Elise won the national spelling bee. There was one word she got... Brigitte, do you remember_.mp3
lines.transcript: Elise won the national spelling bee. There was one word she got... Brigitte, do you remember?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-00000005BCAF.0B2-Cymotrichous!.mp3
lines.transcript: Cymotrichous!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000005BCAE.0B2-Antediluvian!.mp3
lines.transcript: Antediluvian!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 5-Brigitte-00000005BCAD.0B2-Chiaroscurist!.mp3
lines.transcript: Chiaroscurist!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 6-Brigitte-00000005BCAC.0B2-Septuagenarian!.mp3
lines.transcript: Septuagenarian!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 7-Torbjörn-00000005BCB0.0B2-Haha! That was it.mp3
lines.transcript: Haha! That was it.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BCC1.0B2-A machine will never outperform me in battle!.mp3
lines.transcript: A machine will never outperform me in battle!

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000005BCC2.0B2-(displeased growl).mp3
lines.transcript: (displeased growl)

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005BCC3.0B2-Stop bickering, you two!.mp3
lines.transcript: Stop bickering, you two!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BE97.0B2-The thrill of combat... Isn't it nice to have your blood pumping again, old friend_.mp3
lines.transcript: The thrill of combat... Isn't it nice to have your blood pumping again, old friend?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005BE98.0B2-My doctor says I'm not supposed to get so worked up anymore.mp3
lines.transcript: My doctor says I'm not supposed to get so worked up anymore...

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005BCA7.0B2-How are the grandkids, Torbjorn_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are the grandkids, Torbjorn?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005C061.0B2-Do Astrid and Alma still want to be firefighters when they grow up_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do Astrid and Alma still want to be firefighters when they grow up?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005C062.0B2-Last I heard, they'd decided to be artists, like their father.mp3
lines.transcript: Last I heard, they'd decided to be artists, like their father.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 4-Reinhardt-000000061280.0B2-Ah, yes! That creative Lindholm spark.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, yes! That creative Lindholm spark.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005F111.0B2-You're awfully far from home. Do you miss your friends_.mp3
lines.transcript: You're awfully far from home. Do you miss your friends?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F120.0B2-Yeah. But the squad is doing great on their own! Besides, I have new friends here. Including you!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. But the squad is doing great on their own! Besides, I have new friends here. Including you!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-0000000616B3.0B2-Wonderful! We should have a game night! I will bring the snacks!.mp3
lines.transcript: Wonderful! We should have a game night! I will bring the snacks!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000005EBF2.0B2-I wish these Slicers would sit still.mp3
lines.transcript: I wish these Slicers would sit still.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005EBF3.0B2-That's what the freeze turrets are for!.mp3
lines.transcript: That's what the freeze turrets are for!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005EBF4.0B2-Oh, right. I forgot about those!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, right. I forgot about those!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000006208E.0B2-Moira! I should crush you like a bug for what you've done.mp3
lines.transcript: Moira! I should crush you like a bug for what you've done.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-0000000623A3.0B2-Did you know that certain centipedes kill prey fifteen times their size_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you know that certain centipedes kill prey fifteen times their size?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000006208F.0B2-What are you saying_.mp3
lines.transcript: What are you saying?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 4-Moira-0000000623A4.0B2-I'm advising my prey not to test me.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm advising my prey not to test me.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-0000000601E5.0B2-Let's attack the enemy from the front and take them by surprise!.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's attack the enemy from the front and take them by surprise!

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000062C01.0B2-(worried beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (worried beeps)

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-0000000601E7.0B2-You hear that_ Bastion agrees with me!.mp3
lines.transcript: You hear that? Bastion agrees with me!

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 4-Bastion-000000062BFC.0B2-(panicky beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (panicky beeps)

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000060C5A.0B2-One last turret, huh_.mp3
lines.transcript: One last turret, huh?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005B61B.0B2-Chambered with a triple-jacketed dymerium round, high-caliber, and ultrasonic muzzle velocity.mp3
lines.transcript: Chambered with a triple-jacketed dymerium round, high-caliber, and ultrasonic muzzle velocity...

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005B61A.0B2-Could you explain it in uh... simpler terms_ For our omnic friend_.mp3
lines.transcript: Could you explain it in uh... simpler terms? For our omnic friend?

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 4-Bastion-00000005B61E.0B2-(offended beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (offended beeps)

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 5-Brigitte-00000005BE95.0B2-He's saying we need a bigger gun!.mp3
lines.transcript: He's saying we need a bigger gun!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-0000000616B8.0B2-Brigitte, isn't it time to size up your armor_ It's been ages!.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte, isn't it time to size up your armor? It's been ages!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-0000000625EC.0B2-I'm not getting any taller.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm not getting any taller.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-0000000616B0.0B2-What_ Why not_ Aim to be as huge as me!.mp3
lines.transcript: What? Why not? Aim to be as huge as me!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-0000000625ED.0B2-Considering Papa, I'm already a lot taller than expected.mp3
lines.transcript: Considering Papa, I'm already a lot taller than expected.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-0000000671D7.0B2-I can't believe such little bullets made that huge explosion!.mp3
lines.transcript: I can't believe such little bullets made that huge explosion!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-0000000671F7.0B2-Well, Brigitte aimed right at their fuel cells, so.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, Brigitte aimed right at their fuel cells, so...

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-00000005BB93.0B2-Let's target the engines next.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's target the engines next.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-000000059811.0B2-Great idea. Come on, I have another turret up ahead.mp3
lines.transcript: Great idea. Come on, I have another turret up ahead.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000062095.0B2-One day, you'll pay for all the crimes you've committed!.mp3
lines.transcript: One day, you'll pay for all the crimes you've committed!

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000006213F.0B2-You're less handsome when you talk.mp3
lines.transcript: You're less handsome when you talk.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000006128B.0B2-Not the best wurst, but not the worst wurst either!.mp3
lines.transcript: Not the best wurst, but not the worst wurst either!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006128A.0B2-Gosh, I'm hungry. I wonder if Papa keeps any snacks in the truck.mp3
lines.transcript: Gosh, I'm hungry. I wonder if Papa keeps any snacks in the truck...

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000061289.0B2-I just took Nils and the twins here the other day!.mp3
lines.transcript: I just took Nils and the twins here the other day!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-00000006409F.0B2-Twice as many Lindholms as I'm used to!.mp3
lines.transcript: Twice as many Lindholms as I'm used to!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006445D.0B2-But still the same amount of Reinhardt.mp3
lines.transcript: But still the same amount of Reinhardt.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000063E79.0B2-Maybe too much.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe too much.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000064073.0B2-Great work! Mostly me, though.mp3
lines.transcript: Great work! Mostly me, though.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000063855.0B2-Look who finally found a way to contribute.mp3
lines.transcript: Look who finally found a way to contribute.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000064075.0B2-Haha! Now that's what I call a shatter-bomb!.mp3
lines.transcript: Haha! Now that's what I call a shatter-bomb!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-0000000640CC.0B2-Um, I think you mean _bomb-shatter_.mp3
lines.transcript: Um, I think you mean "bomb-shatter".

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000068C32.0B2-Orisa! I heard you took down Null Sector. You've gotten strong!.mp3
lines.transcript: Orisa! I heard you took down Null Sector. You've gotten strong!

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000694B5.0B2-Thank you. Do you truly believe so_.mp3
lines.transcript: Thank you. Do you truly believe so?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-000000068C39.0B2-Of course! Not quite as strong as I am, but you're getting there!.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course! Not quite as strong as I am, but you're getting there!

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 4-Orisa-0000000694B8.0B2-(chuckle) We will see about that!.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) We will see about that!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000065626.0B2-Ana, when we work together, we are unstoppable!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ana, when we work together, we are unstoppable!

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-000000064106.0B2-You don't have to shout, Reinhardt. I'm right here.mp3
lines.transcript: You don't have to shout, Reinhardt. I'm right here.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 1-Reinhardt-000000065629.0B2-Winston, you still haven't told me that joke about the periodic table!.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston, you still haven't told me that joke about the periodic table!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-0000000668E8.0B2-Oh, well... when I asked, you were supposed to answer, 'Na'! (chuckles).mp3

lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000065F2F.0B2-Siebren, that was years and years ago. But we had a lovely talk.mp3
lines.transcript: Siebren, that was years and years ago. But we had a lovely talk.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-000000066408.0B2-Oh, I remember now. Birds, wasn't it_ Birds and music.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, I remember now. Birds, wasn't it? Birds and music.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000066407.0B2-Self-propagating biomass_ A deadly weapon in the wrong hands.mp3
lines.transcript: Self-propagating biomass? A deadly weapon in the wrong hands.

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-000000066386.0B2-No need to fear. I won't sell my biolight to anyone.mp3
lines.transcript: No need to fear. I won't sell my biolight to anyone.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-000000066405.0B2-We never plan for our creations to escape our control.mp3
lines.transcript: We never plan for our creations to escape our control...

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000066645.0B2-Show them the might of my Empire.mp3
lines.transcript: Show them the might of my Empire.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000066648.0B2-As you command, your Infinite grace!.mp3
lines.transcript: As you command, your Infinite grace!

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000066643.0B2-Bow before the grace of the Infinite!.mp3
lines.transcript: Bow before the grace of the Infinite!

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000066641.0B2-(Reverent beeping).mp3
lines.transcript: (Reverent beeping)

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000066644.0B2-Speak to me, Seer! What is the fate of the Nebula_.mp3
lines.transcript: Speak to me, Seer! What is the fate of the Nebula?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000066647.0B2-It is Infinite, Your Excellency.mp3
lines.transcript: It is Infinite, Your Excellency.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000069B3B.0B2-Remind me. What is the purpose of the experiment ahead_.mp3
lines.transcript: Remind me. What is the purpose of the experiment ahead?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000006770F.0B2-We expose an addled subject to stressors and observe the results.mp3
lines.transcript: We expose an addled subject to stressors and observe the results.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-000000069B3A.0B2-Oh. Perhaps I'll wait for your report.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh. Perhaps I'll wait for your report.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-000000069B34.0B2-That cape... it utilizes mag-lev technology, yes_.mp3
lines.transcript: That cape... it utilizes mag-lev technology, yes?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-000000069DCE.0B2-That's right. Good eye.mp3
lines.transcript: That's right. Good eye.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-000000069B36.0B2-Ah, there is no greater joy than to see one's invention help the world.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, there is no greater joy than to see one's invention help the world.

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 4-Freja-000000069DCB.0B2-Sure. Just don't worry about what I'm using it for.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure. Just don't worry about what I'm using it for.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 1-Sigma-00000006B172.0B2-What becomes of you, when your mind is not your own_.mp3
lines.transcript: What becomes of you, when your mind is not your own?

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 2-Emre-00000006AF87.0B2-I don't know. I'm here one moment, and then... nothing.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't know. I'm here one moment, and then... nothing.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 3-Sigma-00000006B16E.0B2-Ah… Then I suppose you are more fortunate than most.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah&  Then I suppose you are more fortunate than most.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000062664.0B2-You're sitting out the next mission, Oxton. Emily made me promise you’d take it easy.mp3
lines.transcript: You're sitting out the next mission, Oxton. Emily made me promise you d take it easy.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000005509A.0B2-Maybe you could look the other way this time_.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe you could look the other way this time?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006A424.0B2-And get on her bad side_ Not a chance.mp3
lines.transcript: And get on her bad side? Not a chance.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000058681.0B2-There's been a serious increase in Talon activity lately.mp3
lines.transcript: There's been a serious increase in Talon activity lately.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000058682.0B2-Something's brewing, and if we don't know what it is, we can't do anything to stop it.mp3
lines.transcript: Something's brewing, and if we don't know what it is, we can't do anything to stop it.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000058515.0B2-Why now all of a sudden_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why now all of a sudden?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-000000058683.0B2-It's Doomfist. He pushing the world to war, and he's transforming the entire organization to deliver it.mp3
lines.transcript: It's Doomfist. He pushing the world to war, and he's transforming the entire organization to deliver it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005876F.0B2-Genji, how are your new cybernetics_.mp3
lines.transcript: Genji, how are your new cybernetics?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000058615.0B2-They do not feel a part of me.mp3
lines.transcript: They do not feel a part of me.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000058770.0B2-Tell me. When you look at me, do you think, _There's a machine that looks like Sojourn,_ or _That's Soj.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell me. When you look at me, do you think, "There's a machine that looks like Sojourn," or "That's Sojourn?"

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000058616.0B2-You're Sojourn, of course.mp3
lines.transcript: You're Sojourn, of course.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-000000058771.0B2-See_ You'll figure it out. You have a good head on your shoulders.mp3
lines.transcript: See? You'll figure it out. You have a good head on your shoulders.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 6-Genji-000000058617.0B2-...Was that a joke_.mp3
lines.transcript: ...Was that a joke?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 7-Sojourn-000000058772.0B2-Poor choice of words.mp3
lines.transcript: Poor choice of words.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005993C.0B2-I heard omnics used to live down here during the old days.mp3
lines.transcript: I heard omnics used to live down here during the old days.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 2-Claire-00000005BC1F.0B2-Yeah. Not the highlight of my life.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. Not the highlight of my life.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005BC20.0B2-Well... at least it's roomy, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Well... at least it's roomy, right?

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 4-Claire-00000005BC23.0B2-Sure. And it kept us away from the angry mobs on the surface.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure. And it kept us away from the angry mobs on the surface.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 5-Reinhardt-00000005BC22.0B2-Exactly! (nervous chuckle) I hid in worse places during the Crisis!.mp3
lines.transcript: Exactly! (nervous chuckle) I hid in worse places during the Crisis!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 6-Sojourn-00000005BF92.0B2-Reinhardt, please stop talking.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, please stop talking.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005E68C.0B2-Claire, are you all right_.mp3
lines.transcript: Claire, are you all right?

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 2-Claire-00000005E68D.0B2-Don't worry about me. I'm okay.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't worry about me. I'm okay.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 3-Claire-000000059AD2.0B2-Can you do anything to help him_.mp3
lines.transcript: Can you do anything to help him?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-000000059AD3.0B2-(sigh) I don't think so. I've never encountered anything like this before.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I don't think so. I've never encountered anything like this before.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 5-Lúcio-00000005ABFD.0B2-Don't think so. Trying might make things worse.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't think so. Trying might make things worse.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 6-Baptiste-00000005ABFF.0B2-I've never seen anything like this.mp3
lines.transcript: I've never seen anything like this.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 7-Brigitte-00000005ABFE.0B2-It's fused with him. Trying to remove it might be... bad.mp3
lines.transcript: It's fused with him. Trying to remove it might be... bad.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 8-Sojourn-000000065874.0B2-We can't help him yet. Let's keep moving.mp3
lines.transcript: We can't help him yet. Let's keep moving.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 9-Claire-00000005ABA3.0B2-Okay. The maintenance tunnels are this way.mp3
lines.transcript: Okay. The maintenance tunnels are this way.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BAD4.0B2-I have to ask, Echo. Who broke you out of the prison those bureaucrats stuck you in_.mp3
lines.transcript: I have to ask, Echo. Who broke you out of the prison those bureaucrats stuck you in?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-00000005BAD5.0B2-Who do you think_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who do you think?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BAD6.0B2-(Laugh) Of course. Silly of me to ask, really.mp3
lines.transcript: (Laugh) Of course. Silly of me to ask, really.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BAE4.0B2-You're taller than I remember, Fareeha.mp3
lines.transcript: You're taller than I remember, Fareeha.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000005BAE5.0B2-The jetpack adds a few meters.mp3
lines.transcript: The jetpack adds a few meters.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BAE6.0B2-Heh.mp3
lines.transcript: Heh.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BF55.0B2-I remember you. One of the Lindholm kids. Elvira, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: I remember you. One of the Lindholm kids. Elvira, right?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005BF56.0B2-Uh, no, Brigitte.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh, no, Brigitte.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF57.0B2-Ah, right. Elvira's the neurosurgeon. You're the engineer.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, right. Elvira's the neurosurgeon. You're the engineer.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000005BF58.0B2-How do you know all this_.mp3
lines.transcript: How do you know all this?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005BF59.0B2-Your father's been sending me Christmas family newsletters for twenty years.mp3
lines.transcript: Your father's been sending me Christmas family newsletters for twenty years.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BF75.0B2-So, Lúcio. How long you been with the team_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, Lúcio. How long you been with the team?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000065912.0B2-Uh... basically_ They picked me up just before this.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh... basically? They picked me up just before this.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF77.0B2-Huh. Could've fooled me.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh. Could've fooled me.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BF70.0B2-Nice MEKA. Exo-Force, right_ What's that like_.mp3
lines.transcript: Nice MEKA. Exo-Force, right? What's that like?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005BF71.0B2-Lots of fighting, not much sleep.mp3
lines.transcript: Lots of fighting, not much sleep.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF72.0B2-Sounds familiar. How do you deal with it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Sounds familiar. How do you deal with it?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 4-D.Va-00000005BF73.0B2-More caffeine than you'd ever believe.mp3
lines.transcript: More caffeine than you'd ever believe.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005BF74.0B2-You'd be surprised.mp3
lines.transcript: You'd be surprised.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BF6B.0B2-I'm surprised to see you here. Overwatch isn't all that popular where you come from.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm surprised to see you here. Overwatch isn't all that popular where you come from.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-00000005BF6C.0B2-I am not here representing them.mp3
lines.transcript: I am not here representing them.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF6D.0B2-Huh. You going to be in trouble when you get home_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh. You going to be in trouble when you get home?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 4-Zarya-00000005BF6E.0B2-(chuckle) Only if we survive.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Only if we survive.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005BF6F.0B2-Ah, an optimist.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, an optimist.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005BF5A.0B2-Can't say I've seen you before.mp3
lines.transcript: Can't say I've seen you before.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005BF5B.0B2-Yeah, I'm new.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, I'm new.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF5C.0B2-Funny. You don't fight like you are.mp3
lines.transcript: Funny. You don't fight like you are.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 4-Baptiste-00000005BF5D.0B2-Maybe I'm a prodigy.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe I'm a prodigy.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005BF5E.0B2-And maybe you're full of it.mp3
lines.transcript: And maybe you're full of it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005E514.0B2-You've taken a lot of hits. You all right_.mp3
lines.transcript: You've taken a lot of hits. You all right?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000005E518.0B2-What are you talking about_ I was made for this!.mp3
lines.transcript: What are you talking about? I was made for this!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000005E517.0B2-I'll be fine. I've been upgrading this armor for years!.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll be fine. I've been upgrading this armor for years!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 4-D.Va-00000005E516.0B2-Better than all right!.mp3
lines.transcript: Better than all right!

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 5-Zarya-00000005E515.0B2-Oh, please. My morning workout is tougher than this.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, please. My morning workout is tougher than this.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 6-Sojourn-0000000658C3.0B2-(long sigh) I could've used you blocking fire back when the fighting started. A lotta soldiers got hurt.mp3
lines.transcript: (long sigh) I could've used you blocking fire back when the fighting started. A lotta soldiers got hurt.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 7-Mercy-0000000658C2.0B2-How many defenders does the city have left_.mp3
lines.transcript: How many defenders does the city have left?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 8-Brigitte-0000000658C4.0B2-How many fighters does the city have left_.mp3
lines.transcript: How many fighters does the city have left?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 9-Lúcio-0000000658C5.0B2-How many fighters does Toronto have left_.mp3
lines.transcript: How many fighters does Toronto have left?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 10-Baptiste-0000000658C7.0B2-How many defenders does the city have left_.mp3
lines.transcript: How many defenders does the city have left?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 11-Sojourn-0000000658C6.0B2-(chuckle) You're basically looking at her.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) You're basically looking at her.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005E526.0B2-Hold on, are you THE Lúcio_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hold on, are you THE Lúcio?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000005E527.0B2-I think so! And you're THE Sojourn!.mp3
lines.transcript: I think so! And you're THE Sojourn!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005E528.0B2-Don't remind me.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't remind me.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000005F043.0B2-What kind of work do you do for the city, anyway_.mp3
lines.transcript: What kind of work do you do for the city, anyway?

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 2-Claire-00000005F044.0B2-Uh, design.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh, design.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 3-Reinhardt-00000005F046.0B2-Huh. Have we seen anything you've made yet_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh. Have we seen anything you've made yet?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 4-Zarya-00000005F045.0B2-And what sort of things do you make_.mp3
lines.transcript: And what sort of things do you make?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 5-D.Va-00000005F048.0B2-Oh! Have we seen anything you've made_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh! Have we seen anything you've made?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 6-Winston-00000005F047.0B2-Interesting! Have we seen anything you've made_.mp3
lines.transcript: Interesting! Have we seen anything you've made?

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 7-Claire-00000005F049.0B2-Um. Well, for example, pretty much everything in this room. And the programming behind it.mp3
lines.transcript: Um. Well, for example, pretty much everything in this room. And the programming behind it.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 8-Lúcio-00000005F04B.0B2-Claire, you've been holding out on us. That's amazing!.mp3
lines.transcript: Claire, you've been holding out on us. That's amazing!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 9-Mercy-00000005F04C.0B2-That is quite impressive, Claire!.mp3
lines.transcript: That is quite impressive, Claire!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 10-Brigitte-00000005F04D.0B2-You must be so proud, Claire! This is outstanding work.mp3
lines.transcript: You must be so proud, Claire! This is outstanding work.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 11-Baptiste-00000005F04A.0B2-Look at you, Claire. That's amazing!.mp3
lines.transcript: Look at you, Claire. That's amazing!

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 12-Claire-00000005F04E.0B2-Nice of you to say. I just see the mistakes.mp3
lines.transcript: Nice of you to say. I just see the mistakes.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000061F3B.0B2-Did you read the mission brief_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did you read the mission brief?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-000000061610.0B2-Huh_ Oh, was I supposed to read that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh? Oh, was I supposed to read that?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000061F37.0B2-(sighs) What did I say about teamwork_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) What did I say about teamwork?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 4-D.Va-000000061612.0B2-_Teamwork gets you out alive_, but homework makes me dead inside.mp3
lines.transcript: "Teamwork gets you out alive", but homework makes me dead inside.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000062673.0B2-You look familiar.mp3
lines.transcript: You look familiar.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-0000000620F1.0B2-You don't.mp3
lines.transcript: You don't.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000062674.0B2-You were at my induction. Standing with Gerard... Amelie_.mp3
lines.transcript: You were at my induction. Standing with Gerard... Amelie?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 4-Widowmaker-0000000620F2.0B2-Call me by that name again, and you will share his fate.mp3
lines.transcript: Call me by that name again, and you will share his fate.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000062677.0B2-I saw you training yesterday. Can I give you a tip_.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw you training yesterday. Can I give you a tip?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.transcript: Um... sure!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000062678.0B2-Widen your stance. Might feel strange at first, but it keeps you balanced.mp3
lines.transcript: Widen your stance. Might feel strange at first, but it keeps you balanced.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000061CB9.0B2-Oh... thank you, Sojourn! I'll try that next time!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh... thank you, Sojourn! I'll try that next time!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000601F4.0B2-So, Bastion, how are you settling in_ Anything you need_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, Bastion, how are you settling in? Anything you need?

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000062C00.0B2-(straightforward beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (straightforward beeps)

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000601F1.0B2-Yeah, uh... Sounds good.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, uh... Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000601F5.0B2-You're too good with that gun to waste it on a life of crime.mp3
lines.transcript: You're too good with that gun to waste it on a life of crime.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000006268B.0B2-I'll go on the straight and narrow when hell freezes over.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll go on the straight and narrow when hell freezes over.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000601F6.0B2-Or when the law catches up with you.mp3
lines.transcript: Or when the law catches up with you.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-00000006268C.0B2-Same thing.mp3
lines.transcript: Same thing.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000061F38.0B2-Brigitte's one of the best we've got. She's a natural leader.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte's one of the best we've got. She's a natural leader.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000061219.0B2-Do you expect anything less from my daughter_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you expect anything less from my daughter?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000061F39.0B2-From your daughter_ I expected a lot more tantrums.mp3
lines.transcript: From your daughter? I expected a lot more tantrums.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000062684.0B2-Interesting choices, Cole. A professional gamer, a Russian powerlifter, two mercenaries.mp3
lines.transcript: Interesting choices, Cole. A professional gamer, a Russian powerlifter, two mercenaries...

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-0000000622A9.0B2-You like 'em.mp3
lines.transcript: You like 'em.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000062685.0B2-(chuckle) I really do.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) I really do.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000064376.0B2-I saw Vishkar is opening an office in Toronto.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw Vishkar is opening an office in Toronto.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-0000000647D0.0B2-Yes... Are you interested in applying_.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes... Are you interested in applying?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000064377.0B2-(chuckles) I'd rather clean cattle pens in Alberta.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckles) I'd rather clean cattle pens in Alberta.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006437E.0B2-You know, I'm not so bad at cards myself. Even beat Burnes, one time.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, I'm not so bad at cards myself. Even beat Burnes, one time.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F73.0B2-I think she let you win.mp3
lines.transcript: I think she let you win.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006437F.0B2-(laughing) Burnes never let anybody win.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughing) Burnes never let anybody win.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000064379.0B2-What kind of armor polish do you use, anyway_.mp3
lines.transcript: What kind of armor polish do you use, anyway?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000062FDF.0B2-I make my own.mp3
lines.transcript: I make my own.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000064378.0B2-With... (sniffs) walnuts_.mp3
lines.transcript: With... (sniffs) walnuts?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-000000063001.0B2-Among other things.mp3
lines.transcript: Among other things.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000646A9.0B2-What brings a fortune teller to Adlersbrunn_.mp3
lines.transcript: What brings a fortune teller to Adlersbrunn?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-0000000646AA.0B2-People like to know what's coming. With this town's luck, I can see why.mp3
lines.transcript: People like to know what's coming. With this town's luck, I can see why.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000646AD.0B2-So... how do you earn a name like _the Butcher_.mp3
lines.transcript: So... how do you earn a name like "the Butcher"?

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 2-Junker Queen-0000000646AC.0B2-By butcherin'! Not quick for a sleuth, are ya_.mp3
lines.transcript: By butcherin'! Not quick for a sleuth, are ya?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000646AB.0B2-Never hurts to ask.mp3
lines.transcript: Never hurts to ask.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006473C.0B2-Look at all this. The Bride idolized Junkenstein, even after his demise.mp3
lines.transcript: Look at all this. The Bride idolized Junkenstein, even after his demise.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006473D.0B2-And now she's returned to where it all ended... to finish what he started.mp3
lines.transcript: And now she's returned to where it all ended... to finish what he started.

lines.speaker: Junker Queen
lines.filename: 3-Junker Queen-0000000648AD.0B2-What for_.mp3
lines.transcript: What for?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-00000006473B.0B2-What else_ Revenge.mp3
lines.transcript: What else? Revenge.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-0000000648AE.0B2-We need to find the lord. Fast.mp3
lines.transcript: We need to find the lord. Fast.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000648B3.0B2-You really think Junkenstein's behind this_.mp3
lines.transcript: You really think Junkenstein's behind this?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000648B4.0B2-Wouldn't be the first time he clawed his way out of the grave.mp3
lines.transcript: Wouldn't be the first time he clawed his way out of the grave.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000648D8.0B2-Let's be sure to close his case this time.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's be sure to close his case this time.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000648B9.0B2-How'd you end up an outlaw_.mp3
lines.transcript: How'd you end up an outlaw?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000648BA.0B2-The close-minded folks out west don't take kindly to conjurers.mp3
lines.transcript: The close-minded folks out west don't take kindly to conjurers.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000648BB.0B2-Is that so_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that so?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-0000000648B8.0B2-And maybe I made a town's gold disappear. Happy_.mp3
lines.transcript: And maybe I made a town's gold disappear. Happy?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000064A5B.0B2-That ghost is back. Keep moving!.mp3
lines.transcript: That ghost is back. Keep moving!

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000064A5A.0B2-I feel... rage in him. Pain... ugh!.mp3
lines.transcript: I feel... rage in him. Pain... ugh!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000064A69.0B2-I'd feel sorry for him, but I'm a little busy!.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd feel sorry for him, but I'm a little busy!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000064DFA.0B2-(Sigh) Why didn't you talk to me before you ran off with Talon_.mp3
lines.transcript: (Sigh) Why didn't you talk to me before you ran off with Talon?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000068DE1.0B2-It would have turned into an argument.mp3
lines.transcript: It would have turned into an argument.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000064DFB.0B2-I thought we were friends, Gabe.mp3
lines.transcript: I thought we were friends, Gabe.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 4-Reaper-000000068DDF.0B2-That's exactly why I left you out of it.mp3
lines.transcript: That's exactly why I left you out of it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066100.0B2-You can't act like a lone wolf on my team.mp3
lines.transcript: You can't act like a lone wolf on my team.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000067463.0B2-Depending on others brings nothing but disappointment.mp3
lines.transcript: Depending on others brings nothing but disappointment.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000066102.0B2-Let's see if this mission proves you wrong.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's see if this mission proves you wrong.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066103.0B2-Bet it's fun, hanging out in the sky.mp3
lines.transcript: Bet it's fun, hanging out in the sky.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000066814.0B2-I do enjoy the perspective and tactical advantages, yes.mp3
lines.transcript: I do enjoy the perspective and tactical advantages, yes.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000066108.0B2-Do you ever pretend you're a bird_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you ever pretend you're a bird?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 4-Echo-000000066812.0B2-Constantly.mp3
lines.transcript: Constantly.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066142.0B2-How are you still so optimistic, Echo_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are you still so optimistic, Echo?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000066815.0B2-It's not always easy, but Doctor Liao created me to improve the world.mp3
lines.transcript: It's not always easy, but Doctor Liao created me to improve the world.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000066101.0B2-She'd be proud of you.mp3
lines.transcript: She'd be proud of you.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066109.0B2-Follow my lead, and we make it out of here in one piece.mp3
lines.transcript: Follow my lead, and we make it out of here in one piece.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-000000065657.0B2-Watch the high ground.mp3
lines.transcript: Watch the high ground.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000066104.0B2-Huh, I didn't take you for a tactician.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh, I didn't take you for a tactician.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 4-Roadhog-000000065667.0B2-Used to it.mp3
lines.transcript: Used to it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066111.0B2-I remember Overwatch tailing you back in the day, before you teamed up with your sidekick.mp3
lines.transcript: I remember Overwatch tailing you back in the day, before you teamed up with your sidekick.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-000000065675.0B2-Heh. Quieter times.mp3
lines.transcript: Heh. Quieter times.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000065919.0B2-Still can't get used to King Street coming before Queen.mp3
lines.transcript: Still can't get used to King Street coming before Queen.

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 2-Claire-000000065918.0B2-I was on the crew that rebuilt that tunnel after the Crisis. Swapping the stops_ Easier.mp3
lines.transcript: I was on the crew that rebuilt that tunnel after the Crisis. Swapping the stops? Easier.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000065917.0B2-Big mess, huh_.mp3
lines.transcript: Big mess, huh?

lines.speaker: Claire
lines.filename: 4-Claire-00000006590D.0B2-Yeah. And it's still down there.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. And it's still down there.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006610B.0B2-So, you invented a form of light that's somehow alive... What's next for you_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, you invented a form of light that's somehow alive... What's next for you?

lines.speaker: Lifeweaver
lines.filename: 2-Lifeweaver-00000006638A.0B2-Saving the Earth. And maybe... learning to blow glass.mp3
lines.transcript: Saving the Earth. And maybe... learning to blow glass.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006610C.0B2-(chuckle) Those are on my list, too.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Those are on my list, too.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000680AE.0B2-The Hashimoto are a massive force… with a lot more firepower than a gang of kids.mp3
lines.transcript: The Hashimoto are a massive force&  with a lot more firepower than a gang of kids.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-00000006931A.0B2-What, you think we shouldn't fight back_.mp3
lines.transcript: What, you think we shouldn't fight back?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000680AF.0B2-I think you need to start fighting smarter.mp3
lines.transcript: I think you need to start fighting smarter.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000067141.0B2-Nice augments. They must have cost quite a bit.mp3
lines.transcript: Nice augments. They must have cost quite a bit.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000066F96.0B2-(bitter laugh) You have no idea.mp3
lines.transcript: (bitter laugh) You have no idea.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000066646.0B2-Your Eminence, the rebels are gaining ground.mp3
lines.transcript: Your Eminence, the rebels are gaining ground.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-000000066640.0B2-Then steal it from beneath them!.mp3
lines.transcript: Then steal it from beneath them!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-0000000680A8.0B2-What part of Canada are you from_.mp3
lines.transcript: What part of Canada are you from?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 2-Venture-00000006808C.0B2-Well, I was born in Nova Scotia. Then we moved to Nevada, then Buenos Aires, Reykjavík, Mexico City, Si.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, I was born in Nova Scotia. Then we moved to Nevada, then Buenos Aires, Reykjavík, Mexico City, Singapore, back to Nevada... sorry, what was the question again?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-0000000680A7.0B2-Eh... don't worry about it.mp3
lines.transcript: Eh... don't worry about it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006A415.0B2-Null Sector had a foothold in so many cities... why withdraw your forces now_.mp3
lines.transcript: Null Sector had a foothold in so many cities... why withdraw your forces now?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-00000006A8D0.0B2-Would you have preferred I destroy humanity_.mp3
lines.transcript: Would you have preferred I destroy humanity?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006A41D.0B2-The way you're consolidating your forces, I think you're still planning on it.mp3
lines.transcript: The way you're consolidating your forces, I think you're still planning on it.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-00000006A8C9.0B2-I seek liberation, not devastation. I leave such senseless conflict to your kind.mp3
lines.transcript: I seek liberation, not devastation. I leave such senseless conflict to your kind.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-000000067DFB.0B2-Damn it! The Ravager got to one of us.mp3
lines.transcript: Damn it! The Ravager got to one of us.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000067DEA.0B2-There's no hope for them now. Just focus on your escape and take them down if you have to.mp3
lines.transcript: There's no hope for them now. Just focus on your escape and take them down if you have to.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006A41B.0B2-You were a great asset to Overwatch. All those accolades... what happened_.mp3
lines.transcript: You were a great asset to Overwatch. All those accolades... what happened?

lines.speaker: Freja
lines.filename: 2-Freja-0000000696EA.0B2-Same thing that happened to you. Times changed.mp3
lines.transcript: Same thing that happened to you. Times changed.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006A425.0B2-Whatever Talon has on you... we can help. You just have to tell me what's going on.mp3
lines.transcript: Whatever Talon has on you... we can help. You just have to tell me what's going on.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 2-Emre-00000006AF7F.0B2-How many years did we work together, Viv_ You should know if I'm not telling you something, I've got a goo.mp3
lines.transcript: How many years did we work together, Viv? You should know if I'm not telling you something, I've got a good reason.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006A422.0B2-So, you finally made it. How's retirement going_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, you finally made it. How's retirement going?

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 2-Emre-00000006AF7E.0B2-(chuckle) Not bad. A few more firefights than I planned for.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Not bad. A few more firefights than I planned for.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006A423.0B2-You seem prepared to me.mp3
lines.transcript: You seem prepared to me.

lines.speaker: Emre
lines.filename: 4-Emre-00000006AF7C.0B2-Well next time, I'm packing less heat, and more sunscreen.mp3
lines.transcript: Well next time, I'm packing less heat, and more sunscreen.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006A418.0B2-I saw you on the court with Fareeha last night. Your first time playing basketball_.mp3
lines.transcript: I saw you on the court with Fareeha last night. Your first time playing basketball?

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-00000006AE3D.0B2-Oh, yes! You could tell_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, yes! You could tell?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006A416.0B2-You were kicking the ball.mp3
lines.transcript: You were kicking the ball.

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 4-Juno-00000006AE3E.0B2-And I scored in both hoops!.mp3
lines.transcript: And I scored in both hoops!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B1A4.0B2-You're keeping up with the team better than I expected. Maybe I should push you harder.mp3
lines.transcript: You're keeping up with the team better than I expected. Maybe I should push you harder.

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 2-Anran-00000006AB25.0B2-Sure. Whatever bar you set for me, I'll hit it.mp3
lines.transcript: Sure. Whatever bar you set for me, I'll hit it.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006B1A5.0B2-Careful now. Is that overconfidence I hear_.mp3
lines.transcript: Careful now. Is that overconfidence I hear?

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 4-Anran-00000006AB1A.0B2-Nope. Just determination.mp3
lines.transcript: Nope. Just determination.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B1A6.0B2-It feels like Talon has gone from covert ops to world domination overnight.mp3
lines.transcript: It feels like Talon has gone from covert ops to world domination overnight.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000006AB32.0B2-They've done plenty of raids in the past, but nothing nearly this loud.mp3
lines.transcript: They've done plenty of raids in the past, but nothing nearly this loud.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006B1A7.0B2-Huh. You have experience fighting Talon_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh. You have experience fighting Talon?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 4-Baptiste-00000006AB2D.0B2-Yeah. You could say that.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah. You could say that.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B182.0B2-You know, my twin was always sticking her neck out for me.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, my twin was always sticking her neck out for me.

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 2-Anran-00000006AD96.0B2-I get that. Nothing beats helping your loved ones.mp3
lines.transcript: I get that. Nothing beats helping your loved ones.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006B184.0B2-If she hadn't let me return the favor, I'd miss out on knowing that feeling. Just some food for thought.mp3
lines.transcript: If she hadn't let me return the favor, I'd miss out on knowing that feeling. Just some food for thought.

lines.speaker: Anran
lines.filename: 4-Anran-00000006AD97.0B2-Huh... I'd never thought of it that way.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh... I'd never thought of it that way.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B19C.0B2-This war you're waging isn't just aimless chaos. What are you planning_.mp3
lines.transcript: This war you're waging isn't just aimless chaos. What are you planning?

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 2-Vendetta-00000006B388.0B2-Have patience, Commander. I would never spoil the finale.mp3
lines.transcript: Have patience, Commander. I would never spoil the finale.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B19D.0B2-You'd better stay out of trouble out there. Understand, recruit_.mp3
lines.transcript: You'd better stay out of trouble out there. Understand, recruit?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000006B19E.0B2-And I'll know if you've been sneaking treats between missions!.mp3
lines.transcript: And I'll know if you've been sneaking treats between missions!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B18B.0B2-You and Juno have been doing a great job to make the new recruits feel welcome.mp3
lines.transcript: You and Juno have been doing a great job to make the new recruits feel welcome.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B110.0B2-What can I say_ It's all about curating the vibes.mp3
lines.transcript: What can I say? It's all about curating the vibes.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 1-Sojourn-00000006B18C.0B2-Brigitte, you're one of my best agents. So I'll give you one chance to explain why you put a cat in a j.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte, you're one of my best agents. So I'll give you one chance to explain why you put a cat in a jetpack.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006B2FD.0B2-I know it seems crazy, but she can help! Can't you, Fika_ Good girl!.mp3
lines.transcript: I know it seems crazy, but she can help! Can't you, Fika? Good girl!

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000006B18F.0B2-Ugh. I should've stayed retired.mp3
lines.transcript: Ugh. I should've stayed retired...

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002EF24.0B2-Everyone still alive_.mp3
lines.transcript: Everyone still alive?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000002ECE4.0B2-Seems so. That or the afterlife's a big disappointment.mp3
lines.transcript: Seems so. That or the afterlife's a big disappointment.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002EEFD.0B2-Surely Dr. Junkenstein must be running out of his machines.mp3
lines.transcript: Surely Dr. Junkenstein must be running out of his machines.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000002F2CA.0B2-He strikes me as a man who had too many free hours to invest in his pursuits.mp3
lines.transcript: He strikes me as a man who had too many free hours to invest in his pursuits.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000000B304.0B2-Well, you sure take to this bad guy thing easily, don't you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, you sure take to this bad guy thing easily, don't you?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000000AED0.0B2-And you sure know how to play boy scout.mp3
lines.transcript: And you sure know how to play boy scout.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002006F.0B2-Your mother would have been proud of you.mp3
lines.transcript: Your mother would have been proud of you.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000001FCBB.0B2-You didn't know my mother very well then.mp3
lines.transcript: You didn't know my mother very well then.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B780.0B2-The front lines are no place for a scientist.mp3
lines.transcript: The front lines are no place for a scientist.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-00000002ED55.0B2-I guess it's a good thing I have you to watch my back!.mp3
lines.transcript: I guess it's a good thing I have you to watch my back!

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B782.0B2-Ana, we all thought you were dead. Why didn't you tell me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Ana, we all thought you were dead. Why didn't you tell me?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BCB2.0B2-You of all people are going to ask me that_.mp3
lines.transcript: You of all people are going to ask me that?

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B784.0B2-Admit it, Ana. This is better than retirement.mp3
lines.transcript: Admit it, Ana. This is better than retirement.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC4D.0B2-You haven't been to Kauai, have you_.mp3
lines.transcript: You haven't been to Kauai, have you?

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000043BD8.0B2-You were a disgrace to Overwatch. If I had known what Reyes had been planning, I would never have a.mp3
lines.transcript: You were a disgrace to Overwatch. If I had known what Reyes had been planning, I would never have allowed it.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-00000004C3B6.0B2-It seems to me that it was convenient for you not to look too closely into Gabriel's business.mp3
lines.transcript: It seems to me that it was convenient for you not to look too closely into Gabriel's business.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000043BC9.0B2-You and your people will be brought to justice.mp3
lines.transcript: You and your people will be brought to justice.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-000000049C89.0B2-We will all see justice done in the end.mp3
lines.transcript: We will all see justice done in the end.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B783.0B2-I feel a lot better having you watch my back.mp3
lines.transcript: I feel a lot better having you watch my back.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC95.0B2-We all need someone we can trust, Jack.mp3
lines.transcript: We all need someone we can trust, Jack.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B781.0B2-You need to slow down. Think about your actions.mp3
lines.transcript: You need to slow down. Think about your actions.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000002CDEA.0B2-Okay, dad.mp3
lines.transcript: Okay, dad.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002B77F.0B2-War isn't a game.mp3
lines.transcript: War isn't a game.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000002EF94.0B2-Are you sure life isn't a game, Soldier_ 76_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you sure life isn't a game, Soldier: 76?

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-00000002006E.0B2-Think you can do my job, do you_.mp3

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C5B.0B2-You look like a man who's seen a few battles.mp3

lines.speaker: Baptiste

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C6A.0B2-I know a man trying to escape his past when I see one.mp3
lines.transcript: I know a man trying to escape his past when I see one.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8FC.0B2-Easier to outrun your shadow, isn't it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Easier to outrun your shadow, isn't it?

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C6B.0B2-My lady, are you well_ You seem pale.mp3

lines.speaker: Widowmaker

lines.transcript: A trick of the light, I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C6E.0B2-Your creations save the day again.mp3
lines.transcript: Your creations save the day again.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005B84C.0B2-They haven't failed me yet.mp3
lines.transcript: They haven't failed me yet.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C4D.0B2-You're supposed to be on ice.mp3
lines.transcript: You're supposed to be on ice.

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-00000005A930.0B2-I think that applies to the both of us.mp3
lines.transcript: I think that applies to the both of us.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C64.0B2-Whoever you are, you have been a stalwart companion this night.mp3
lines.transcript: Whoever you are, you have been a stalwart companion this night.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8F7.0B2-As have you, my friend. We faced the Reaper together—and lived!.mp3
lines.transcript: As have you, my friend. We faced the Reaper together and lived!

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000059C69.0B2-If we survive this final battle, I will speak no word of your presence here.mp3
lines.transcript: If we survive this final battle, I will speak no word of your presence here.

lines.transcript: That would be mighty appreciated.

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F75.0B2-Can't believe Ana Amari's kid took up with mercenaries like Helix.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000061233.0B2-Still a one-man posse_.mp3
lines.transcript: Still a one-man posse?

lines.transcript: Touché.

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F64.0B2-In this world, pacifism is foolish.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F66.0B2-Snap out of it, old man. Talon is using you.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F60.0B2-Dr. Zhou. Did Captain Opara make it back as well_.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Zhou. Did Captain Opara make it back as well?

lines.speaker: Mei

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76

lines.transcript: He was a good man.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000064634.0B2-He thought the same about you.mp3
lines.transcript: He thought the same about you.

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F6E.0B2-Remember the Vikosky kingpins_ Three hundred meters downrange. You fired once, they both fell. Beau.mp3
lines.transcript: Remember the Vikosky kingpins? Three hundred meters downrange. You fired once, they both fell. Beautiful.

lines.transcript: (sigh) That s not the word I would choose.

lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000062F71.0B2-If you knew what Blackwatch was up to, why didn’t you stop them_.mp3
lines.transcript: If you knew what Blackwatch was up to, why didn t you stop them?

lines.transcript: My vision was clouded by anger.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 3-Soldier_ 76-000000062F72.0B2-And now the world pays for your actions.mp3
lines.transcript: And now the world pays for your actions.

lines.speaker: Genji

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 1-Soldier_ 76-000000063F0E.0B2-You always have my back.mp3

lines.speaker: Ana

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 3-Soldier_ 76-000000063F11.0B2-Too slow! (sigh) Never mind.mp3
lines.transcript: Too slow! (sigh) Never mind.

lines.transcript: Back to playing the hero?

lines.transcript: Katya Volskaya and Aleksandra Zaryanova... traitors to your own country. You deserve each other.

lines.speaker: Sombra

lines.filename: 1-Sombra-000000054ED3.0B2-You know, I've seen Reinhardt's Overwatch file.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Sombra-000000054ED1.0B2-Now I've seen it all... I'm supposed to work with a giant rat_.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Sombra-000000054ED5.0B2-They don't pay me enough for this.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Sombra-00000005BBFA.0B2-You would not believe how many people have asked me to track you down.mp3
lines.transcript: You would not believe how many people have asked me to track you down.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005841A.0B2-I'm pretty sure I could.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-00000005E42C.0B2-Ah. Thank you.mp3
