lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000621D2.0B2-You often call your inventions beautiful.mp3
lines.transcript: You often call your inventions beautiful.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000006123A.0B2-And they are.mp3
lines.transcript: And they are.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000621D3.0B2-It seems beauty is in the eye of the beholder.mp3
lines.transcript: It seems beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000621D4.0B2-I can't imagine you're here to do research. Why are you fighting_.mp3
lines.transcript: I can't imagine you're here to do research. Why are you fighting?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000623DA.0B2-I'm here to make a difference in the world. Just like you, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm here to make a difference in the world. Just like you, right?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000621D6.0B2-I've been listening to your new music.mp3
lines.transcript: I've been listening to your new music.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000061D67.0B2-Why_ Is Vishkar doing research on me or something_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why? Is Vishkar doing research on me or something?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000621D7.0B2-No. I am intrigued by how the sound moves behind my eyes when I listen.mp3
lines.transcript: No. I am intrigued by how the sound moves behind my eyes when I listen.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-000000061D83.0B2-Oh, that's because it's binaural! Uh, glad you like it.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, that's because it's binaural! Uh, glad you like it.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647DA.0B2-It is good to see you again, Tekhartha.mp3
lines.transcript: It is good to see you again, Tekhartha.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635D5.0B2-Likewise, Satya. I hope to repay you for your generosity at our temple.mp3
lines.transcript: Likewise, Satya. I hope to repay you for your generosity at our temple.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647CD.0B2-With the wisdom you shared... you already have.mp3
lines.transcript: With the wisdom you shared... you already have.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647DC.0B2-A peaceful reality is within our reach.mp3
lines.transcript: A peaceful reality is within our reach.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000640F3.0B2-I wish I could believe that.mp3
lines.transcript: I wish I could believe that.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647E3.0B2-Vigilantes have no place in the world we’re building.mp3
lines.transcript: Vigilantes have no place in the world we re building.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F6C.0B2-And Vishkar has no place in mine.mp3
lines.transcript: And Vishkar has no place in mine.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647CF.0B2-With a few optimizations, that weapon of yours could probably be much lighter.mp3
lines.transcript: With a few optimizations, that weapon of yours could probably be much lighter.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-000000063C3D.0B2-But then it would not be so good for smashing faces.mp3
lines.transcript: But then it would not be so good for smashing faces.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647CA.0B2-Your grapple looks rather thin. How much weight can it bear_.mp3
lines.transcript: Your grapple looks rather thin. How much weight can it bear?

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-0000000639B9.0B2-(hamster noises) One mech, 2 hamsters.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) One mech, 2 hamsters.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647CB.0B2-Oh, is there seating for another in there_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, is there seating for another in there?

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 4-Wrecking Ball-00000006395A.0B2-(hamster noises) No. The mammal eats a lot.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) No. The mammal eats a lot.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647D1.0B2-Your invasion has left millions in disarray.mp3
lines.transcript: Your invasion has left millions in disarray.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000064006.0B2-Harsh words, considering that your corporation benefits at their expense. You're welcome, by the way.mp3
lines.transcript: Harsh words, considering that your corporation benefits at their expense. You're welcome, by the way.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647D3.0B2-I admire your discipline. It is a rare quality in the world.mp3

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-000000064A3F.0B2-Not that rare. Some people look strong. Some are strong inside.mp3
lines.transcript: Not that rare. Some people look strong. Some are strong inside.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647D4.0B2-And you are both_.mp3
lines.transcript: And you are both?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 4-Zarya-000000064A40.0B2-Yes, I am both.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, I am both.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647D6.0B2-Why did you leave your organization_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why did you leave your organization?

lines.speaker: Hanzo

lines.transcript: I could not bear being the man they'd made of me.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647D7.0B2-How did you know it was the right decision_.mp3
lines.transcript: How did you know it was the right decision?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 4-Hanzo-0000000644BD.0B2-I didn't.mp3
lines.transcript: I didn't.

lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647D8.0B2-(sniffs) Something smells foul. Is it you, rodent_.mp3
lines.transcript: (sniffs) Something smells foul. Is it you, rodent?

lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000063EB5.0B2-(hamster noises) Exhaust port fan power increased by 600%.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) Exhaust port fan power increased by 600%.

lines.transcript: You smell strongly of artificial coconut.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647DE.0B2-(disgust) That is excessive.mp3
lines.transcript: (disgust) That is excessive.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647DF.0B2-What more do you know about LumériCo and Vishkar_.mp3
lines.transcript: What more do you know about LumériCo and Vishkar?

lines.filename: 2-Sombra-00000006436A.0B2-Ooh... Is the little birdie finally leaving her cage_.mp3
lines.transcript: Ooh... Is the little birdie finally leaving her cage?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-0000000647E0.0B2-Do not jump to conclusions.mp3
lines.transcript: Do not jump to conclusions.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-0000000647DB.0B2-I wonder if I have changed for the better or worse.mp3
lines.transcript: I wonder if I have changed for the better or worse.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000063FE6.0B2-Change often comes uninvited. What you make of it is up to you.mp3
lines.transcript: Change often comes uninvited. What you make of it is up to you.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-00000006866E.0B2-Your pylon is marvelous. Efficient and beautiful.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C87.0B2-Doesn't matter how pretty it is if I only use it in ugly situations.mp3
lines.transcript: Doesn't matter how pretty it is if I only use it in ugly situations.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 3-Symmetra-00000006866F.0B2-I recently learned the phrase, _stop to smell the roses._ It applies here, I think.mp3
lines.transcript: I recently learned the phrase, "stop to smell the roses." It applies here, I think.

lines.filename: 1-Symmetra-00000006B143.0B2-I am still searching for information on Dr. Bhatt, Niran. Answers are not forthcoming.mp3
lines.transcript: I am still searching for information on Dr. Bhatt, Niran. Answers are not forthcoming.

lines.transcript: It's in Vishkar's best interest to bury its founder's vision. But you deserve to know the truth.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000000AD51.0B2-Your will is strong, my friend. But in time, I know you will realize we are not so different.mp3
lines.transcript: Your will is strong, my friend. But in time, I know you will realize we are not so different.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005557C.0B2-It is hard to trust that which I cannot see with my own eyes.mp3
lines.transcript: It is hard to trust that which I cannot see with my own eyes.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550CF.0B2-I'd shake your hand but we are a little busy now.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd shake your hand but we are a little busy now.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005557D.0B2-Are you a magic spirit_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you a magic spirit?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550CE.0B2-Just another cursed traveler.mp3
lines.transcript: Just another cursed traveler.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000055551.0B2-I find your religion unnerving, monk.mp3
lines.transcript: I find your religion unnerving, monk.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000005558F.0B2-My beliefs are simply in the fundamental ways of life and nature, nothing more.mp3
lines.transcript: My beliefs are simply in the fundamental ways of life and nature, nothing more.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000055581.0B2-The single mindedness of Dr. Junkenstein's creations reminds me of your own.mp3
lines.transcript: The single mindedness of Dr. Junkenstein's creations reminds me of your own.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000555A0.0B2-You wound me.mp3
lines.transcript: You wound me.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000055582.0B2-Is that even possible_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that even possible?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000055583.0B2-Who were you before you entered the monastery_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who were you before you entered the monastery?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-00000005559F.0B2-No one of note. Just one of thousands like me.mp3
lines.transcript: No one of note. Just one of thousands like me.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-000000055590.0B2-But one moment of clarity changed everything.mp3
lines.transcript: But one moment of clarity changed everything.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000055553.0B2-I hear you're an authority on dragons.mp3
lines.transcript: I hear you're an authority on dragons.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000550DA.0B2-Why do you ask_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000055554.0B2-I hunt them.mp3
lines.transcript: I hunt them.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-0000000550D9.0B2-Then I believe you heard wrong.mp3
lines.transcript: Then I believe you heard wrong.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 5-Torbjörn-00000005556B.0B2-Touchy subject.mp3
lines.transcript: Touchy subject.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B425.0B2-When we rebuilt after the Omnic Crisis, I swore I'd never let Gothenburg be destroyed again.mp3
lines.transcript: When we rebuilt after the Omnic Crisis, I swore I'd never let Gothenburg be destroyed again.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005B424.0B2-This time we'll stop them, Papa. I promise.mp3
lines.transcript: This time we'll stop them, Papa. I promise.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B845.0B2-Where I'm from, we throw deserters into the sea.mp3
lines.transcript: Where I'm from, we throw deserters into the sea.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8F6.0B2-Well, I'm a pretty good swimmer.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, I'm a pretty good swimmer.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B84A.0B2-You know what_ You're alright, Renegade.mp3
lines.transcript: You know what? You're alright, Renegade.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8FB.0B2-For a lizard-obsessed misanthrope, you're pretty agreeable yourself.mp3
lines.transcript: For a lizard-obsessed misanthrope, you're pretty agreeable yourself.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005B84B.0B2-Watch it.mp3
lines.transcript: Watch it.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B846.0B2-Vikings are the greatest raiders of wealth and treasure the world has ever seen.mp3
lines.transcript: Vikings are the greatest raiders of wealth and treasure the world has ever seen.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000005B9C1.0B2-Vikings never met me.mp3
lines.transcript: Vikings never met me.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B848.0B2-I might be able to make a few improvements to that weapon of yours, Outlaw.mp3
lines.transcript: I might be able to make a few improvements to that weapon of yours, Outlaw.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000005B9C4.0B2-It's serving me just fine, thanks.mp3
lines.transcript: It's serving me just fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B852.0B2-I wish we could get that Immortality Field to work on my turret.mp3
lines.transcript: I wish we could get that Immortality Field to work on my turret.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B905.0B2-But then our enemies would have no chance!.mp3
lines.transcript: But then our enemies would have no chance!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B853.0B2-Baptiste, was it_ How did a mercenary like yourself come by such advanced technologies_.mp3
lines.transcript: Baptiste, was it? How did a mercenary like yourself come by such advanced technologies?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B908.0B2-Oh, I just make use of what I find lying around.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, I just make use of what I find lying around.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B854.0B2-Such intriguing sonic displacement technology!.mp3
lines.transcript: Such intriguing sonic displacement technology!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000005B7FD.0B2-Thanks! My dad invented it. You two would get along great.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks! My dad invented it. You two would get along great.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005B849.0B2-After we prevail, will you join us for a banquet, Countess_.mp3
lines.transcript: After we prevail, will you join us for a banquet, Countess?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005B813.0B2-I prefer to feast in private. Typically with a single guest.mp3
lines.transcript: I prefer to feast in private. Typically with a single guest.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005C00E.0B2-So you're working with Sojourn again, Wilhelm_ How's that going_.mp3
lines.transcript: So you're working with Sojourn again, Wilhelm? How's that going?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000005C00F.0B2-We have our differences... but I am willing to overlook them.mp3
lines.transcript: We have our differences... but I am willing to overlook them.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005BCBB.0B2-I hope the old crew's doing well. I haven’t seen some of them in years.mp3
lines.transcript: I hope the old crew's doing well. I haven t seen some of them in years.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000005BCBC.0B2-Lena is as cheery as ever. And Angela hasn’t aged a day.mp3
lines.transcript: Lena is as cheery as ever. And Angela hasn t aged a day.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005BCBD.0B2-I’d expect nothing less.mp3
lines.transcript: I d expect nothing less.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005F105.0B2-How about you let me build you a new mech_.mp3
lines.transcript: How about you let me build you a new mech?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F12B.0B2-Uh... I don't know... I heard your inventions take five minutes to boot up.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh... I don't know... I heard your inventions take five minutes to boot up.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005F104.0B2-That was once!.mp3
lines.transcript: That was once!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005EBF5.0B2-This is not how I envisioned retirement.mp3
lines.transcript: This is not how I envisioned retirement.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000005EBF6.0B2-Come on, Papa. You don't know how to stop working!.mp3
lines.transcript: Come on, Papa. You don't know how to stop working!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000005EBF7.0B2-That's not true. I took your mother to Greece for our anniversary.mp3
lines.transcript: That's not true. I took your mother to Greece for our anniversary.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000005EBF8.0B2-Yeah, and fixed a whole subway system while you were there!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, and fixed a whole subway system while you were there!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000006127F.0B2-(sigh) Just yesterday, Brigitte was a toddler making trouble.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Just yesterday, Brigitte was a toddler making trouble...

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000061287.0B2-Papa! Not right now!.mp3
lines.transcript: Papa! Not right now!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F08.0B2-Brigitte, did you check if you brought enough repair packs for everyone_.mp3
lines.transcript: Brigitte, did you check if you brought enough repair packs for everyone?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-0000000625DF.0B2-Of course Papa. I'm not a little girl anymore.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course Papa. I'm not a little girl anymore.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000060F0A.0B2-You'll always be my little girl.mp3
lines.transcript: You'll always be my little girl.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-0000000625E0.0B2-You're embarrassing me.mp3
lines.transcript: You're embarrassing me.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F0C.0B2-Are you ever going to tell me Valkryie's airfoil ratio_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you ever going to tell me Valkryie's airfoil ratio?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000061FA8.0B2-Are you going to tell me Ingrid's apple pie recipe_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you going to tell me Ingrid's apple pie recipe?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000060F0E.0B2-Hmph, you drive a hard bargain.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmph, you drive a hard bargain.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-000000061FA9.0B2-I'll just ask her myself.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll just ask her myself.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F10.0B2-Remind me to install a firewall system in you. Can't be too careful nowadays.mp3
lines.transcript: Remind me to install a firewall system in you. Can't be too careful nowadays.

lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000062C12.0B2-(happy beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (happy beeps)

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F12.0B2-For the last time, tell Ganymede my beard is not a nest!.mp3
lines.transcript: For the last time, tell Ganymede my beard is not a nest!

lines.transcript: (disappointed beeps)

lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-000000060F14.0B2-Don't you beep boop me. No is no.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F15.0B2-Who developed those orbs of yours_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who developed those orbs of yours?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000621E0.0B2-Ask not who their maker is, but what they mean.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000060F17.0B2-You don't know, do you_.mp3

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-0000000621E1.0B2-I embrace the unknown.mp3
lines.transcript: I embrace the unknown.

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000060F1F.0B2-Brigitte isn't meddling too much with your armor, is she_.mp3

lines.speaker: Reinhardt

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000060F21.0B2-That's parenthood for you.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000006113B.0B2-Retirement looks good on you Ana.mp3
lines.transcript: Retirement looks good on you Ana.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000006113D.0B2-Hmph, we're still alive and kicking!.mp3

lines.filename: 4-Ana-00000006251E.0B2-Still young at heart, I see.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000061141.0B2-Don't you ever want to settle down_.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000061143.0B2-I've got some powder for that.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000061149.0B2-(sighs) I guess it takes all kinds to make a world.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000611AD.0B2-Don't roll over me, you hear_ I'm not a bowling pin.mp3

lines.filename: 4-Wrecking Ball-000000062621.0B2-That is not advisable.mp3

lines.transcript: If you ever need a punching bag, I got plenty of metal that needs scrapping.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-000000062360.0B2-That is the greatest present I've ever gotten.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-0000000611B3.0B2-Maybe you need better friends.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe you need better friends.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000006121F.0B2-I got some new prototypes that need testing. Thought of you.mp3

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000006271B.0B2-Me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Me?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000061221.0B2-Need someone who knows what they're doing.mp3

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 4-Baptiste-00000006271C.0B2-I'm flattered and honored.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000006207F.0B2-Dr. Zhou! You've made quite the name for yourself.mp3
lines.transcript: Dr. Zhou! You've made quite the name for yourself.

lines.speaker: Mei

lines.transcript: Oh, thank you! I think there's always more to learn.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000062080.0B2-Quit being so humble. Nothing wrong with being proud of your work!.mp3
lines.transcript: Quit being so humble. Nothing wrong with being proud of your work!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000006122C.0B2-You know Fareeha, it's not a sign of weakness if you take it easy sometimes.mp3
lines.transcript: You know Fareeha, it's not a sign of weakness if you take it easy sometimes.

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-0000000620BB.0B2-Mistakes arise when people turn careless.mp3
lines.transcript: Mistakes arise when people turn careless.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-00000006122E.0B2-(sighs) Like mother, like daughter.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) Like mother, like daughter.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000062084.0B2-I bet my turret's a better shot than you.mp3
lines.transcript: I bet my turret's a better shot than you.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000062141.0B2-And what are you willing to bet on_.mp3
lines.transcript: And what are you willing to bet on?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000062085.0B2-The Lindholm reputation!.mp3
lines.transcript: The Lindholm reputation!

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 4-Widowmaker-000000063FDD.0B2-How about your other eye_.mp3
lines.transcript: How about your other eye?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000062086.0B2-You sure you won't let me upgrade that arm_.mp3
lines.transcript: You sure you won't let me upgrade that arm?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000006227C.0B2-Ah, you know I like it old school.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, you know I like it old school.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000616C2.0B2-How's Winston_ Did he ever get that shield generator to stop exploding_.mp3
lines.transcript: How's Winston? Did he ever get that shield generator to stop exploding?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-00000006260C.0B2-Wh... I... think so_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wh... I... think so?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-0000000616C3.0B2-That's the problem. You never expect something to explode, until it does.mp3
lines.transcript: That's the problem. You never expect something to explode, until it does.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000062087.0B2-I helped them with a few things.mp3
lines.transcript: I helped them with a few things.

lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-0000000622FA.0B2-What uh—what sort of things_ Asking for a friend.mp3
lines.transcript: What uh what sort of things? Asking for a friend.

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000063E7A.0B2-Hey. Someone repaired my turret while I was napping!.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey. Someone repaired my turret while I was napping!

lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000063957.0B2-(hamster noises) He says, _You're welcome._.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He says, "You're welcome."

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000665FD.0B2-I won't let these b'orlaxes get the better of us!.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-0000000665FE.0B2-Watch your tongue. The b'orlaxes might hear you!.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000665FB.0B2-Meetroo ja paree'nee, du teek-teek-wu'ree!.mp3
lines.transcript: Meetroo ja paree'nee, du teek-teek-wu'ree!

lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-0000000665FC.0B2-(hamster noises) New profanity entry detected. Uploading to database.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) New profanity entry detected. Uploading to database.

lines.filename: 3-Winston-0000000668B5.0B2-Gre'vnax am Grel'nor!.mp3
lines.transcript: Gre'vnax am Grel'nor!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000665F2.0B2-How come Dorioux gives you good deals but not me_.mp3
lines.transcript: How come Dorioux gives you good deals but not me?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000665F4.0B2-Dunno. Maybe you're just easy to manipulate.mp3
lines.transcript: Dunno. Maybe you're just easy to manipulate.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-00000005F0A5.0B2-My new freeze turrets need setting up. Even you're probably smart enough to figure them out.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000061272.0B2-You sure they work, or do you need to futz with them for half an hour_.mp3

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000066708.0B2-Hmm, this one does need a bit of work. I'll just repair it with my hammer. Stand by!.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmm, this one does need a bit of work. I'll just repair it with my hammer. Stand by!

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-0000000671F8.0B2-Who do I have to bother to get my hands on your pylon's blueprints_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who do I have to bother to get my hands on your pylon's blueprints?

lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-0000000671F4.0B2-That's a shame. I'll just reverse engineer it then!.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000068ECD.0B2-You Wayfinders seem to like digging up old problems.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000068EED.0B2-Maybe you should try some Ironclad judgment.mp3
