lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000068ED0.0B2-Last night, I had an awful nightmare. My turret was attached to my head!.mp3
lines.transcript: Last night, I had an awful nightmare. My turret was attached to my head!

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 2-Hazard-000000068FD0.0B2-That's brilliant! I've a friend that could make that happen for ye!.mp3
lines.transcript: That's brilliant! I've a friend that could make that happen for ye!

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000068ECF.0B2-Humph. Some dreams ought to stay dreams.mp3
lines.transcript: Humph. Some dreams ought to stay dreams.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 1-Torbjörn-000000068EF1.0B2-What's the secret behind your flight mechanism_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's the secret behind your flight mechanism?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C8A.0B2-I don't know the specifics. Something about thermodynamics, I think.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't know the specifics. Something about thermodynamics, I think.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 3-Torbjörn-000000068ECB.0B2-Of course! Convection currents! Why didn't I think of that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course! Convection currents! Why didn't I think of that?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000000AFC3.0B2-Lúcio, I'll race ya!.mp3
lines.transcript: Lúcio, I'll race ya!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000000B512.0B2-Oh, you're on!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, you're on!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000021E70.0B2-Aren't you warm wearing all that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Aren't you warm wearing all that?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-00000000BBB8.0B2-Yes, but it's too late to change!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes, but it's too late to change!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000002CDE9.0B2-Don't think I don't recognize that device of yours. I know you stole it.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't think I don't recognize that device of yours. I know you stole it.

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-000000030562.0B2-What can I say_ A girl just has to have the latest tech.mp3
lines.transcript: What can I say? A girl just has to have the latest tech.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000021E71.0B2-Wow, it’s an honor to meet a member of the Shambali. Mondatta was an inspiration to me.mp3
lines.transcript: Wow, it s an honor to meet a member of the Shambali. Mondatta was an inspiration to me.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000021FF4.0B2-To us all. I miss him greatly.mp3
lines.transcript: To us all. I miss him greatly.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000000AFD4.0B2-Whacha lookin' at_.mp3
lines.transcript: Whacha lookin' at?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000000B3A7.0B2-An annoyance.mp3
lines.transcript: An annoyance.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000000AFA5.0B2-Oh, Winston... got you your favorite!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, Winston... got you your favorite!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000000B057.0B2-For the last time_ no more bananas!.mp3
lines.transcript: For the last time: no more bananas!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550B4.0B2-How can you trust the countess after she slew your master_.mp3
lines.transcript: How can you trust the countess after she slew your master?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000055596.0B2-Did I say I trusted her_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did I say I trusted her?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550D2.0B2-In my former life, I would have gladly fought by your side.mp3
lines.transcript: In my former life, I would have gladly fought by your side.

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000055039.0B2-And I would fight with you in the next.mp3
lines.transcript: And I would fight with you in the next.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000005509C.0B2-I guess they'll let anyone be a pilot these days.mp3
lines.transcript: I guess they'll let anyone be a pilot these days.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550D1.0B2-I want a word with you after this fight is over.mp3
lines.transcript: I want a word with you after this fight is over.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005B803.0B2-I don't.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550C2.0B2-I've heard rumors that you've slain a dragon.mp3
lines.transcript: I've heard rumors that you've slain a dragon.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005557A.0B2-Never slain, but I will, or I will die in the attempt.mp3
lines.transcript: Never slain, but I will, or I will die in the attempt.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550C3.0B2-How did you learn your craft_.mp3
lines.transcript: How did you learn your craft?

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005557B.0B2-I was one of many apprentices, (chuckles) but rose the highest.mp3
lines.transcript: I was one of many apprentices, (chuckles) but rose the highest.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550D5.0B2-Time has greatly changed us both.mp3
lines.transcript: Time has greatly changed us both.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000550E9.0B2-We are all of us always changing.mp3
lines.transcript: We are all of us always changing.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550CD.0B2-I'm happy to fight at your side again.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm happy to fight at your side again.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000550E8.0B2-Let us hope that this time it works out better in the end.mp3
lines.transcript: Let us hope that this time it works out better in the end.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550D3.0B2-Would you tell me more about your religion_.mp3
lines.transcript: Would you tell me more about your religion?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000055592.0B2-Our purpose is to show everyone that in the iris, we are all one people.mp3
lines.transcript: Our purpose is to show everyone that in the iris, we are all one people.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550CB.0B2-I don't think I've ever seen you sleep.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't think I've ever seen you sleep.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000055595.0B2-Meditation is all I require to sustain myself.mp3
lines.transcript: Meditation is all I require to sustain myself.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550CA.0B2-What happened to your arm, gunslinger_.mp3
lines.transcript: What happened to your arm, gunslinger?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FD1.0B2-It was claimed by a darker power.mp3
lines.transcript: It was claimed by a darker power.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550C9.0B2-You seem like a man haunted by the past.mp3
lines.transcript: You seem like a man haunted by the past.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FD2.0B2-How can you tell_.mp3
lines.transcript: How can you tell?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000550C8.0B2-Haunting's something of a specialty of mine.mp3
lines.transcript: Haunting's something of a specialty of mine.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550C7.0B2-I'm surprised to see you taking a side in this fight.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm surprised to see you taking a side in this fight.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FD3.0B2-I'm going to be well paid.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm going to be well paid.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000550B1.0B2-Getting a little tired_ You seem short of breath.mp3
lines.transcript: Getting a little tired? You seem short of breath.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FD6.0B2-I'll be fine. I try not to move too much.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll be fine. I try not to move too much.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000058556.0B2-I've heard Commander Morrison's been under pressure to disband this strike team.mp3
lines.transcript: I've heard Commander Morrison's been under pressure to disband this strike team.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000005856C.0B2-But we're only just getting started.mp3
lines.transcript: But we're only just getting started.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000058572.0B2-The commander believes in you. Just deliver results, and he'll have all the ammunition he needs to keep.mp3
lines.transcript: The commander believes in you. Just deliver results, and he'll have all the ammunition he needs to keep things going.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-000000058583.0B2-I guess it's up to us then.mp3
lines.transcript: I guess it's up to us then.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000586B3.0B2-It must be hard for us to gather intel with Blackwatch sidelined.mp3
lines.transcript: It must be hard for us to gather intel with Blackwatch sidelined.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000058618.0B2-I wouldn't know.mp3
lines.transcript: I wouldn't know.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000586B4.0B2-Don't you talk to your old teammates_.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't you talk to your old teammates?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.transcript: No.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 5-Tracer-0000000586B5.0B2-You talk to us though!.mp3
lines.transcript: You talk to us though!

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 6-Mercy-00000005865A.0B2-He likes us better.mp3
lines.transcript: He likes us better.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000586B6.0B2-What do you think of Sojourn_ Change of pace from Reinhardt, isn't she_.mp3
lines.transcript: What do you think of Sojourn? Change of pace from Reinhardt, isn't she?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-0000000585F5.0B2-I feel a little nervous around her. Like she might do something terrible to me if I let her down.mp3
lines.transcript: I feel a little nervous around her. Like she might do something terrible to me if I let her down.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000586C0.0B2-I like her though.mp3
lines.transcript: I like her though.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-000000058779.0B2-Just so you know, the line is open.mp3
lines.transcript: Just so you know, the line is open.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-0000000585E1.0B2-It's been an honor serving with you all.mp3
lines.transcript: It's been an honor serving with you all.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 6-Sojourn-00000005877A.0B2-Noted.mp3
lines.transcript: Noted.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000586B7.0B2-Mercy, have you talked to Reinhardt much since.mp3
lines.transcript: Mercy, have you talked to Reinhardt much since...

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-00000005865B.0B2-Only a little. He's taken it all very hard.mp3
lines.transcript: Only a little. He's taken it all very hard.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000586B8.0B2-I miss having him around.mp3
lines.transcript: I miss having him around.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-00000005865C.0B2-You should talk to him. I think he'd like the company.mp3
lines.transcript: You should talk to him. I think he'd like the company.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000586B9.0B2-You and Dr. Ziegler are getting on well aren't you_.mp3
lines.transcript: You and Dr. Ziegler are getting on well aren't you?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000005861A.0B2-She's the only one who's awake late at night on base.mp3
lines.transcript: She's the only one who's awake late at night on base.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000586A3.0B2-Oh is that all_.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh is that all?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 4-Genji-00000005861B.0B2-And I'm the only one who can drink her coffee.mp3
lines.transcript: And I'm the only one who can drink her coffee.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000005869D.0B2-This would be a great place for a holiday with Emily.mp3
lines.transcript: This would be a great place for a holiday with Emily.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005877E.0B2-Depending on how things turn out, I might be able to swing you all a few days leave before you need to.mp3
lines.transcript: Depending on how things turn out, I might be able to swing you all a few days leave before you need to report back to base.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000058699.0B2-How's that for motivation!.mp3
lines.transcript: How's that for motivation!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000005869E.0B2-You look nervous, Winston.mp3
lines.transcript: You look nervous, Winston.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000005860F.0B2-I'm still getting used to this. Getting out of the lab, being an agent in the field.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm still getting used to this. Getting out of the lab, being an agent in the field.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-00000005869F.0B2-You're doing just fine. Why, my first mission, I threw up on the train heading into the city.mp3
lines.transcript: You're doing just fine. Why, my first mission, I threw up on the train heading into the city.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 4-Winston-000000058610.0B2-You did_ Oh, well, it must have been some irregularity with the flow of the chronal accelerator.  Well,.mp3
lines.transcript: You did? Oh, well, it must have been some irregularity with the flow of the chronal accelerator.  Well, maybe if I go back and change the

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 5-Tracer-0000000586A0.0B2-Winston! That's not what I meant. You're fine.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston! That's not what I meant. You're fine.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 6-Winston-000000058611.0B2-Right. (chuckles) Thanks.mp3
lines.transcript: Right. (chuckles) Thanks.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000005BADC.0B2-Sojo, I've heard an interesting rumor about Toronto.mp3
lines.transcript: Sojo, I've heard an interesting rumor about Toronto.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-00000005BADD.0B2-Have you, now.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you, now.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-00000005BADE.0B2-Yep! Apparently, a masked vigilante roams the streets, striking at injustice. (laugh) Do you know anythi.mp3
lines.transcript: Yep! Apparently, a masked vigilante roams the streets, striking at injustice. (laugh) Do you know anything about that?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-00000005BADF.0B2-News to me.mp3
lines.transcript: News to me.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000005F119.0B2-Two hot shot pilots on the same team_.mp3
lines.transcript: Two hot shot pilots on the same team?

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F12D.0B2-The bad guys won't know what hit 'em!.mp3
lines.transcript: The bad guys won't know what hit 'em!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000061F7B.0B2-You're not exactly built for speed, Orisa. How do you catch someone who's running away_.mp3
lines.transcript: You're not exactly built for speed, Orisa. How do you catch someone who's running away?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000061883.0B2-I will provide a demonstration. Start running.mp3
lines.transcript: I will provide a demonstration. Start running.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061F7C.0B2-Uhh... Actually, I think I'll take your word for it!.mp3
lines.transcript: Uhh... Actually, I think I'll take your word for it!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000617ED.0B2-So what have you been up to_ Seeing anyone_.mp3
lines.transcript: So what have you been up to? Seeing anyone?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000062610.0B2-Oh my gosh, Lena!.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh my gosh, Lena!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000617EF.0B2-So that's a no_.mp3
lines.transcript: So that's a no?

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-000000062611.0B2-I'll… tell you later.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll&  tell you later.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000617F8.0B2-A friend of mine has a massive collection of vintage vinyl.mp3
lines.transcript: A friend of mine has a massive collection of vintage vinyl.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006236E.0B2-That's sick! If they want, I can send them some stuff too.mp3
lines.transcript: That's sick! If they want, I can send them some stuff too.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000617FA.0B2-Iggy would love that!.mp3
lines.transcript: Iggy would love that!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000061917.0B2-I don't know how you do it, Ana!.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't know how you do it, Ana!

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.transcript: Do what?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061919.0B2-Stay still for hours, waiting for the perfect shot!.mp3
lines.transcript: Stay still for hours, waiting for the perfect shot!

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 4-Ana-000000062521.0B2-I don't know how you zip around without getting dizzy.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't know how you zip around without getting dizzy.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000061922.0B2-I still can't believe how tall you've gotten!.mp3
lines.transcript: I still can't believe how tall you've gotten!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 2-Brigitte-000000062612.0B2-And now, I can lift you with one arm!.mp3
lines.transcript: And now, I can lift you with one arm!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061924.0B2-You'll have to catch me first!.mp3
lines.transcript: You'll have to catch me first!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000061925.0B2-Can I please fly Tokki_ I'll be super careful!.mp3
lines.transcript: Can I please fly Tokki? I'll be super careful!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-000000062393.0B2-Uh, didn't you lose an entire jet once_.mp3
lines.transcript: Uh, didn't you lose an entire jet once?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061927.0B2-(laughs) Not on purpose!.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) Not on purpose!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000006192C.0B2-It's a perfect day for some mayhem!.mp3
lines.transcript: It's a perfect day for some mayhem!

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-00000006233F.0B2-That's what I'm always saying!.mp3
lines.transcript: That's what I'm always saying!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-00000006192E.0B2-What's the most crazy thing you've seen as a doctor_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's the most crazy thing you've seen as a doctor?

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 2-Mercy-000000061FAE.0B2-Well, there was one pilot who was lost in time.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, there was one pilot who was lost in time.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061930.0B2-Ooh, right, that was an adventure. Sorry about that.mp3
lines.transcript: Ooh, right, that was an adventure. Sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Mercy
lines.filename: 4-Mercy-000000061FAF.0B2-Don't be. You were worth it.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't be. You were worth it.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000061932.0B2-Ugh, entered my passcode too quick and now I'm locked out of my phone!.mp3
lines.transcript: Ugh, entered my passcode too quick and now I'm locked out of my phone!

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-000000062434.0B2-I can unlock it for you, cariño.mp3
lines.transcript: I can unlock it for you, cariño.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000061934.0B2-Thanks, love! Wait. You trying to pull a fast one on me_.mp3
lines.transcript: Thanks, love! Wait. You trying to pull a fast one on me?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-000000062435.0B2-You're smarter than you look.mp3
lines.transcript: You're smarter than you look.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000064516.0B2-I have to work with you_.mp3
lines.transcript: I have to work with you?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-000000062BC6.0B2-Babysitting is not part of my services.mp3
lines.transcript: Babysitting is not part of my services.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000064517.0B2-That's a relief. Who'd trust you with a baby_.mp3
lines.transcript: That's a relief. Who'd trust you with a baby?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000064518.0B2-You sure know how to bring people together!.mp3
lines.transcript: You sure know how to bring people together!

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 2-Zarya-0000000648CF.0B2-And you know how to blow them up!.mp3
lines.transcript: And you know how to blow them up!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000658E8.0B2-This reminds me of my first mission. Null Sector, in London.mp3
lines.transcript: This reminds me of my first mission. Null Sector, in London.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-0000000658F5.0B2-Yeah, except this time, whoever made these robots is invading every nation at once.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, except this time, whoever made these robots is invading every nation at once.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000658ED.0B2-Do you think we did the right thing_ Maybe we could've talked things out and avoided all of this.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you think we did the right thing? Maybe we could've talked things out and avoided all of this.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 4-Sojourn-0000000658EE.0B2-Maybe. But peace is rarely that simple.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe. But peace is rarely that simple.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-0000000658F6.0B2-Let's focus on helping that transit worker, huh_ We can save the world another day.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's focus on helping that transit worker, huh? We can save the world another day.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000065B18.0B2-You're distracted, big guy!.mp3
lines.transcript: You're distracted, big guy!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000065B1B.0B2-Is something wrong, Winston_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is something wrong, Winston?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 3-Genji-000000065B19.0B2-Winston, you are losing focus.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston, you are losing focus.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 4-Mei-000000065B1A.0B2-What's wrong, Winston_.mp3
lines.transcript: What's wrong, Winston?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-000000065B1C.0B2-Sorry! Just looking for structural flaws.mp3
lines.transcript: Sorry! Just looking for structural flaws.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 6-Lúcio-000000065D9C.0B2-What for_.mp3
lines.transcript: What for?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 7-Winston-000000065D9B.0B2-These attacks are happening all over the world. We'll need every advantage we can get.mp3
lines.transcript: These attacks are happening all over the world. We'll need every advantage we can get.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000665E4.0B2-I think you've gotten faster since I saw you last, Genji!.mp3
lines.transcript: I think you've gotten faster since I saw you last, Genji!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000665E3.0B2-(chuckle) Though probably still slower than you.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Though probably still slower than you.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000665E5.0B2-And don't you forget it!.mp3
lines.transcript: And don't you forget it!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000665EF.0B2-I never saw you in action back in the old days, Echo!.mp3
lines.transcript: I never saw you in action back in the old days, Echo!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-0000000665F0.0B2-Well_ Any observations_.mp3
lines.transcript: Well? Any observations?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-0000000665EE.0B2-I think you're just the firepower we need to save this city!.mp3
lines.transcript: I think you're just the firepower we need to save this city!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000066635.0B2-I always imagined Rio's beaches were nicer than this!.mp3
lines.transcript: I always imagined Rio's beaches were nicer than this!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-000000066634.0B2-Yeah—normally they're not covered in robots!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah normally they're not covered in robots!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000066F4B.0B2-Think you could spiff up my chronal accelerator with hard light_.mp3
lines.transcript: Think you could spiff up my chronal accelerator with hard light?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000066F50.0B2-Potentially. Are you envisioning something in particular_.mp3
lines.transcript: Potentially. Are you envisioning something in particular?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-000000066F4F.0B2-What about... a record that spins when I recall_.mp3
lines.transcript: What about... a record that spins when I recall?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-000000066F4A.0B2-How about... a falcon that flaps its wings when I run_.mp3
lines.transcript: How about... a falcon that flaps its wings when I run?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 5-Tracer-000000066F4E.0B2-Maybe... a plane that does a barrel roll when I dodge_.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe... a plane that does a barrel roll when I dodge?

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 6-Symmetra-000000066F4C.0B2-That is doable. I will send you a quote.mp3
lines.transcript: That is doable. I will send you a quote.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-0000000588D3.0B2-Reinhardt, get over here!.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, get over here!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-0000000588F3.0B2-Reinhardt, where are you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, where are you?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 3-Lúcio-000000058CE3.0B2-Reinhardt, you're going to get left behind!.mp3
lines.transcript: Reinhardt, you're going to get left behind!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 1-Tracer-000000069183.0B2-Iggy tells me you kept in touch after your little record trade.mp3
lines.transcript: Iggy tells me you kept in touch after your little record trade.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B116.0B2-Yeah! We've been vibing about our favorite tunes. She's got great taste!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah! We've been vibing about our favorite tunes. She's got great taste!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-00000006917C.0B2-(giggle) Great taste in DJ's, too.mp3
lines.transcript: (giggle) Great taste in DJ's, too.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-00000006B117.0B2-You think so_ (clears throat) That's... t-that'd be somethin' else.mp3
lines.transcript: You think so? (clears throat) That's... t-that'd be somethin' else.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A4C1.0B2-Fail me, vecchio sciocco, and you'll find I'm less tolerant than my predecessor.mp3
lines.transcript: Fail me, vecchio sciocco, and you'll find I'm less tolerant than my predecessor.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-00000006B176.0B2-Ah, but is failure not an opportunity to reconsider our variables_.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah, but is failure not an opportunity to reconsider our variables?

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A4C2.0B2-Make no mistake_ you are the variable here, and I would eliminate you without hesitation.mp3
lines.transcript: Make no mistake: you are the variable here, and I would eliminate you without hesitation.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-000000069C5C.0B2-Come face me in the Colosseo, “Champion”. Prove you’re more than just prey.mp3
lines.transcript: Come face me in the Colosseo,  Champion . Prove you re more than just prey.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000069E01.0B2-(hamster noises) The hamster prefers a real challenge.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) The hamster prefers a real challenge.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A429.0B2-Fine, Damnatio ad bestias it is. My wolves will love the chase.mp3
lines.transcript: Fine, Damnatio ad bestias it is. My wolves will love the chase.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A4BD.0B2-So this is how the last son of Shimada wields his legacy_ skulking about like a fannullone.mp3
lines.transcript: So this is how the last son of Shimada wields his legacy: skulking about like a fannullone.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000069B6A.0B2-The Hashimoto cannot go unchallenged. It is my duty to protect my home from tyrants like you.mp3
lines.transcript: The Hashimoto cannot go unchallenged. It is my duty to protect my home from tyrants like you.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A4BE.0B2-(laugh) Call it tyranny if you like. At least my victory is absolute.mp3
lines.transcript: (laugh) Call it tyranny if you like. At least my victory is absolute.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A874.0B2-Had you remained with Talon, I might have stayed your execution.mp3
lines.transcript: Had you remained with Talon, I might have stayed your execution.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000069DB0.0B2-(grunt).mp3
lines.transcript: (grunt)

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A288.0B2-Then again... perhaps your judgement was already overdue.mp3
lines.transcript: Then again... perhaps your judgement was already overdue.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 4-Reaper-000000069DAE.0B2-If you've got a point, make it.mp3
lines.transcript: If you've got a point, make it.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 5-Vendetta-00000006A287.0B2-Never. This is far more entertaining.mp3
lines.transcript: Never. This is far more entertaining.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A465.0B2-I hope you've made your funeral arrangements. You never know which fight will be your last.mp3
lines.transcript: I hope you've made your funeral arrangements. You never know which fight will be your last.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000069DB5.0B2-They won't take me down out there.mp3
lines.transcript: They won't take me down out there.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A463.0B2-I should hope not. That honor is mine.mp3
lines.transcript: I should hope not. That honor is mine.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A428.0B2-You parade around like some righteous outlaw, and yet I doubt you could even throw a lasso.mp3
lines.transcript: You parade around like some righteous outlaw, and yet I doubt you could even throw a lasso.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000006A1DD.0B2-If it meant I'd catch you on the other end, I wager I'd aim it just right.mp3
lines.transcript: If it meant I'd catch you on the other end, I wager I'd aim it just right.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A86B.0B2-I'm disappointed you left Talon behind, Amelie. You would have thrived under my rule.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm disappointed you left Talon behind, Amelie. You would have thrived under my rule.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000006AB57.0B2-I've given my life to Talon. I have no desire to serve another's vengeance.mp3
lines.transcript: I've given my life to Talon. I have no desire to serve another's vengeance.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 3-Vendetta-00000006A875.0B2-Mine was not the only revenge I would have chased. A shame you forfeited your chance to hunt by my sid.mp3
lines.transcript: Mine was not the only revenge I would have chased. A shame you forfeited your chance to hunt by my side.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A873.0B2-Allying with Doomfist truly was the beginning of your failure.mp3
lines.transcript: Allying with Doomfist truly was the beginning of your failure.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-00000006A8CD.0B2-Failure is only a threat to those who see a single path.mp3
lines.transcript: Failure is only a threat to those who see a single path.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006A86D.0B2-You did me a favor by calling your retreat, omnic. It saved me the trouble of killing you myself.mp3
lines.transcript: You did me a favor by calling your retreat, omnic. It saved me the trouble of killing you myself.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-00000006A8CB.0B2-Of course. I will gladly stand aside while you goad humanity to tear itself apart.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course. I will gladly stand aside while you goad humanity to tear itself apart.

lines.speaker: Vendetta
lines.filename: 1-Vendetta-00000006B390.0B2-You ran when you killed my father, you ran from Overwatch, and now you run from Talon. It seems coward.mp3
lines.transcript: You ran when you killed my father, you ran from Overwatch, and now you run from Talon. It seems cowardice is all you know.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000006B285.0B2-Call it what you want. It'll keep me alive long enough to kill you someday.mp3
lines.transcript: Call it what you want. It'll keep me alive long enough to kill you someday.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067EF0.0B2-You'd better not mess with any of the relics here.mp3
lines.transcript: You'd better not mess with any of the relics here.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000068235.0B2-Why not_ If anything breaks, you can just buy another from the store.mp3
lines.transcript: Why not? If anything breaks, you can just buy another from the store.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067EF4.0B2-You can't just _buy another_ millennia-old statue, bozo!.mp3
lines.transcript: You can't just "buy another" millennia-old statue, bozo!

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 4-Mauga-000000068234.0B2-(laughs) You're too funny, kid. (sigh) Now I'm gonna break some stuff on purpose.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) You're too funny, kid. (sigh) Now I'm gonna break some stuff on purpose.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067237.0B2-Hey, so, what's the deal with your whole... _blinking_ thing_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, so, what's the deal with your whole... "blinking" thing?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000067123.0B2-Well, Winston describes it as _localized time travel_!.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, Winston describes it as "localized time travel"!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067238.0B2-Time travel_ Like you can go back in time and be there for when they laid the first brick of the Great.mp3
lines.transcript: Time travel? Like you can go back in time and be there for when they laid the first brick of the Great Pyramid of Giza?!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-000000067124.0B2-Not... exactly. But, I guess I've never tried.mp3
lines.transcript: Not... exactly. But, I guess I've never tried.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067EFB.0B2-That's... a mask of Bastet! Judging by the brushwork, I'd guess it's over 3000 years old... and you're.mp3
lines.transcript: That's... a mask of Bastet! Judging by the brushwork, I'd guess it's over 3000 years old... and you're wearing it into battle?

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-0000000684FC.0B2-Is there a problem_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is there a problem?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067EF5.0B2-Ana... I am so jealous.mp3
lines.transcript: Ana... I am so jealous.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067EF2.0B2-All those concerts must be rough on your ears!.mp3
lines.transcript: All those concerts must be rough on your ears!

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000006B10F.0B2-Can't be much worse than listening to a drill all day.mp3
lines.transcript: Can't be much worse than listening to a drill all day.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067EF9.0B2-Huh_ Can you speak up_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh? Can you speak up?

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 4-Lúcio-00000006B10C.0B2-What_ I can't hear you!.mp3
lines.transcript: What? I can't hear you!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-0000000682CE.0B2-I've always wanted to make Aurora's pilgrimage to the Shambali Monastery!.mp3
lines.transcript: I've always wanted to make Aurora's pilgrimage to the Shambali Monastery!

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000067F3F.0B2-The monks do not mind humans. What is stopping you_.mp3
lines.transcript: The monks do not mind humans. What is stopping you?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067F00.0B2-I don't know. Maybe I have asthma_.mp3
lines.transcript: I don't know. Maybe I have asthma?

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-000000067F3E.0B2-(sigh) Asthma.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Asthma.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067EF7.0B2-Our research on Shambali shows that the human monks abandoned it a thousand years ago.mp3
lines.transcript: Our research on Shambali shows that the human monks abandoned it a thousand years ago.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000068625.0B2-Indeed. It sat dormant until Aurora's arrival.mp3
lines.transcript: Indeed. It sat dormant until Aurora's arrival.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067EFF.0B2-I bet they left because they divined that omnics would need it in the future!.mp3
lines.transcript: I bet they left because they divined that omnics would need it in the future!

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-000000068627.0B2-An interesting theory.mp3
lines.transcript: An interesting theory.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067EFE.0B2-Mr. Lindholm, good to see you! Hey, the excavator's working great.mp3
lines.transcript: Mr. Lindholm, good to see you! Hey, the excavator's working great.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000068ECE.0B2-It'd work better if you didn't overload it with all those modules.mp3
lines.transcript: It'd work better if you didn't overload it with all those modules.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067F03.0B2-Psh, it's fine! Just a few degrees overheated, is all.mp3
lines.transcript: Psh, it's fine! Just a few degrees overheated, is all...

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F01.0B2-This place is incredible! I wish I knew more Medieval history.mp3
lines.transcript: This place is incredible! I wish I knew more Medieval history.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000068326.0B2-Perhaps I could regale you with the time-honored tales of a brave knight and his noble squire!.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps I could regale you with the time-honored tales of a brave knight and his noble squire!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067EFD.0B2-No way! Tell me, tell me!.mp3
lines.transcript: No way! Tell me, tell me!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 4-Brigitte-00000006B303.0B2-Just make sure you do some fact-checking when he's done.mp3
lines.transcript: Just make sure you do some fact-checking when he's done.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-00000006808B.0B2-Hey, what's the name of that omnic who's always with you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey, what's the name of that omnic who's always with you?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-0000000688CA.0B2-Oh, that big hunk of metal_ Name's B.O.B.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, that big hunk of metal? Name's B.O.B.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-00000006808A.0B2-Huh! How good is he at carrying priceless artifacts_.mp3
lines.transcript: Huh! How good is he at carrying priceless artifacts?

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-0000000688CE.0B2-The very best. But I'm afraid he's spoken for.mp3
lines.transcript: The very best. But I'm afraid he's spoken for.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F08.0B2-Isn't it amazing that all these structures are still standing after thousands of years_.mp3
lines.transcript: Isn't it amazing that all these structures are still standing after thousands of years?

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-00000006933C.0B2-Not so impressive when you know they were built by... aliens!.mp3
lines.transcript: Not so impressive when you know they were built by... aliens!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067F0C.0B2-There weren't aliens in ancient Egypt! (sigh) Believe me, I've checked.mp3
lines.transcript: There weren't aliens in ancient Egypt! (sigh) Believe me, I've checked.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F06.0B2-You're a geneticist_ If you're up for it, I bet our bioarchaeology team would love to have you!.mp3
lines.transcript: You're a geneticist? If you're up for it, I bet our bioarchaeology team would love to have you!

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-000000067704.0B2-The dead tell intriguing tales. But my interest lies with the living.mp3
lines.transcript: The dead tell intriguing tales. But my interest lies with the living.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F09.0B2-No way… you're Echo! Like, Mina Liao's Echo! Oh, I have so many questions for you!.mp3
lines.transcript: No way&  you're Echo! Like, Mina Liao's Echo! Oh, I have so many questions for you!

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 2-Echo-000000068487.0B2-I… suppose I could answer them.mp3
lines.transcript: I&  suppose I could answer them.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000067F1F.0B2-Awesome! I don't even know where to start, I mean… what was she like_.mp3
lines.transcript: Awesome! I don't even know where to start, I mean&  what was she like?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 4-Echo-000000068489.0B2-She was... like me.mp3
lines.transcript: She was... like me.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-0000000682CC.0B2-Wow, are you like a real cowboy_ Do you have any cool stories_.mp3
lines.transcript: Wow, are you like a real cowboy? Do you have any cool stories?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-00000006A1D3.0B2-Not sure you're old enough to hear 'em, kid.mp3
lines.transcript: Not sure you're old enough to hear 'em, kid.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-00000006946D.0B2-I'm... in my twenties_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm... in my twenties?

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 4-Cassidy-00000006A1D4.0B2-Hmph. Give it a few years.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmph. Give it a few years.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F21.0B2-You'll like this one_ How does a non-binary ninja take out a target_.mp3
lines.transcript: You'll like this one: How does a non-binary ninja take out a target?

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.transcript: How...?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.transcript: Uh... how?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-000000069B4B.0B2-I'll bite. How_.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll bite. How?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 5-Venture-000000067F1E.0B2-They slash them!.mp3
lines.transcript: They slash them!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 6-Genji-000000069444.0B2-Oh. They should try shurikens too.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh. They should try shurikens too.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 7-Hanzo-000000069B6E.0B2-(sigh) I suppose I've heard worse jokes.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) I suppose I've heard worse jokes.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 8-Kiriko-000000069B4D.0B2-(laughs) Good one! Bet you a hundred yen Genji doesn't get it.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) Good one! Bet you a hundred yen Genji doesn't get it.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000067F15.0B2-Legend has it that Japanese castles were built with squeaky floorboards to prevent ninja attacks!.mp3
lines.transcript: Legend has it that Japanese castles were built with squeaky floorboards to prevent ninja attacks!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-000000069447.0B2-It certainly made sneaking out much harder.mp3
lines.transcript: It certainly made sneaking out much harder...

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000068087.0B2-I was trying to recreate a quipu, but the threads kept getting tangled, so I made this friendship brace.mp3
lines.transcript: I was trying to recreate a quipu, but the threads kept getting tangled, so I made this friendship bracelet instead! Want it?

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C7F.0B2-Are you sure_ What if I lose it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you sure? What if I lose it?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-00000006808D.0B2-I'll just have an excuse to make another!.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll just have an excuse to make another!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-0000000686FA.0B2-Your spikes look just like the stalactites in Carlsbad!.mp3
lines.transcript: Your spikes look just like the stalactites in Carlsbad!

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 2-Hazard-0000000686DD.0B2-Stalackety—What're you sayin' to me now_.mp3
lines.transcript: Stalackety What're you sayin' to me now?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-0000000686FB.0B2-Don't tell me you've never been spelunking!.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't tell me you've never been spelunking!

lines.speaker: Hazard
lines.filename: 4-Hazard-0000000686DE.0B2-Alright, now you've just got to be making up words.mp3
lines.transcript: Alright, now you've just got to be making up words.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-00000006946E.0B2-You're the one from Mars! Oh, I'd do anything to add a Mars rock to my collection.mp3
lines.transcript: You're the one from Mars! Oh, I'd do anything to add a Mars rock to my collection...

lines.speaker: Juno
lines.filename: 2-Juno-000000068A1D.0B2-When I return someday, I will bring you one!.mp3
lines.transcript: When I return someday, I will bring you one!

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-00000006946C.0B2-(sudden sharp inhale, sputtering coughs and giggles).mp3
lines.transcript: (sudden sharp inhale, sputtering coughs and giggles)

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000068EEC.0B2-Gah! What's the matter with you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Gah! What's the matter with you?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-00000006946A.0B2-I wanted to see... how long I can hold my breath... if I'm ever stuck... in a cave-in! (laugh).mp3
lines.transcript: I wanted to see... how long I can hold my breath... if I'm ever stuck... in a cave-in! (laugh)

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 4-Torbjörn-000000068EEE.0B2-I worry about you sometimes, you know.mp3
lines.transcript: I worry about you sometimes, you know.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-00000006946F.0B2-Do you ever wish you were back in medieval times_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you ever wish you were back in medieval times?

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-000000068C2A.0B2-A true knight's valor is timeless, little historian. The world needs us now.mp3
lines.transcript: A true knight's valor is timeless, little historian. The world needs us now.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-00000006946B.0B2-Yeah, cool! (pause) But imagine living in a castle, though!.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah, cool! (pause) But imagine living in a castle, though!

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 4-Reinhardt-000000068C2E.0B2-(laughs) I suppose that does sound tempting.mp3
lines.transcript: (laughs) I suppose that does sound tempting.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000069470.0B2-So... you haven't been in touch since Ilios.mp3
lines.transcript: So... you haven't been in touch since Ilios.

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-00000006B2C1.0B2-Be patient, escuincle. You aren't the only piece in this puzzle.mp3
lines.transcript: Be patient, escuincle. You aren't the only piece in this puzzle.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000069465.0B2-But what kind of puzzle_ Lockbox_ Ancient riddle_ Jigsaw_.mp3
lines.transcript: But what kind of puzzle? Lockbox? Ancient riddle? Jigsaw?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-00000006B2C2.0B2-(sigh) Whatever kind makes you stop asking questions.mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh) Whatever kind makes you stop asking questions.

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 1-Venture-000000069469.0B2-¡Quiúbole, Gabrielito! How's it hangin'_.mp3
lines.transcript: ¡Quiúbole, Gabrielito! How's it hangin'?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-000000069950.0B2-What did you call me_.mp3
lines.transcript: What did you call me?

lines.speaker: Venture
lines.filename: 3-Venture-000000069467.0B2-_Gabrielito_! That's your nickname, right_.mp3
lines.transcript: "Gabrielito"! That's your nickname, right?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 4-Reaper-00000006994F.0B2-(growl) Sombra.mp3
lines.transcript: (growl) Sombra...

lines.speaker: Waitron
lines.filename: 1-Waitron-00000004BDF5.0B2-Name on your reservation_.mp3
lines.transcript: Name on your reservation?

lines.speaker: Waitron
lines.filename: 2-Waitron-00000004BDF8.0B2-I'm terribly sorry, but we are unable to accommodate walk-ins.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm terribly sorry, but we are unable to accommodate walk-ins.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000021EB2.0B2-Well, well, it looks like we will be working together.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, well, it looks like we will be working together.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000021E75.0B2-Don't think I'm happy about that!.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't think I'm happy about that!

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000002A925.0B2-You were once a legend... but what are you now_ Just a shell of a woman.mp3
lines.transcript: You were once a legend... but what are you now? Just a shell of a woman.

lines.speaker: Ana
lines.filename: 2-Ana-00000002BC91.0B2-I take it you don't want my autograph then.mp3
lines.transcript: I take it you don't want my autograph then.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000021EB3.0B2-(scoffs) So predictable, even when you reverse time, you always make the same decisions.mp3
lines.transcript: (scoffs) So predictable, even when you reverse time, you always make the same decisions.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000021E76.0B2-Don't be so sure about that.mp3
lines.transcript: Don't be so sure about that.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000021EB1.0B2-Talon could restore your family's empire.mp3
lines.transcript: Talon could restore your family's empire.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000021195.0B2-But at what cost_.mp3
lines.transcript: But at what cost?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000000B3A5.0B2-This is no place for children.mp3
lines.transcript: This is no place for children.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-0000000200A1.0B2-Who are you calling a child_.mp3
lines.transcript: Who are you calling a child?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000002A924.0B2-Does it bother you, knowing that you could have saved Mondatta's life_.mp3
lines.transcript: Does it bother you, knowing that you could have saved Mondatta's life?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000002CDEB.0B2-We're all responsible for the choices we've made.mp3
lines.transcript: We're all responsible for the choices we've made.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B804.0B2-Swift or no, I could strike you down with ease.mp3
lines.transcript: Swift or no, I could strike you down with ease.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550B2.0B2-Are you so sure about that_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you so sure about that?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B802.0B2-When this night is done, I will not return.mp3
lines.transcript: When this night is done, I will not return.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550C1.0B2-I'll count that as a blessing.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll count that as a blessing.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B80A.0B2-When daylight comes, you'll be on your own.mp3
lines.transcript: When daylight comes, you'll be on your own.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FDB.0B2-I'd be much more comfortable with that arrangement.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd be much more comfortable with that arrangement.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B80E.0B2-We'd best finish this business before the dawn.mp3
lines.transcript: We'd best finish this business before the dawn.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-000000055555.0B2-Do you have somewhere to be_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you have somewhere to be?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B820.0B2-Brave of you to show your face after what happened in Monte Cristi.mp3
lines.transcript: Brave of you to show your face after what happened in Monte Cristi.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-000000058469.0B2-Well, it is a pretty good face.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, it is a pretty good face.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B81F.0B2-Hello Baptiste. Think you can hide from Talon forever_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hello Baptiste. Think you can hide from Talon forever?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-000000058464.0B2-You can send your people to find me. But I'll find them first.mp3
lines.transcript: You can send your people to find me. But I'll find them first.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B80F.0B2-You're that guard who deserted his post. Didn't we pay you enough_.mp3
lines.transcript: You're that guard who deserted his post. Didn't we pay you enough?

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8F4.0B2-No sum was worth the cost of serving you.mp3
lines.transcript: No sum was worth the cost of serving you.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B819.0B2-I hope you're not planning to abandon this fight too.mp3
lines.transcript: I hope you're not planning to abandon this fight too.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B900.0B2-This cause is worth fighting for. Yours was not.mp3
lines.transcript: This cause is worth fighting for. Yours was not.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B812.0B2-When this is over, Renegade, I'll give you one night's head start.mp3
lines.transcript: When this is over, Renegade, I'll give you one night's head start.

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-00000005B8F8.0B2-If you were capable of catching me, I'd be dead already.mp3
lines.transcript: If you were capable of catching me, I'd be dead already.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B814.0B2-You fight well for a bandit.mp3
lines.transcript: You fight well for a bandit.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 2-Ashe-00000005B9C6.0B2-Hey now. I prefer _self-employed wealth requisitioner._.mp3
lines.transcript: Hey now. I prefer "self-employed wealth requisitioner."

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B823.0B2-All the armor in the world can’t save you from a well-placed bullet.mp3
lines.transcript: All the armor in the world can t save you from a well-placed bullet.

lines.speaker: Reinhardt
lines.filename: 2-Reinhardt-00000005B99F.0B2-How do you think your fancy jumpsuit would fare against my hammer_.mp3
lines.transcript: How do you think your fancy jumpsuit would fare against my hammer?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B824.0B2-You're making too much noise.mp3
lines.transcript: You're making too much noise.

lines.speaker: Lúcio
lines.filename: 2-Lúcio-00000005B7FA.0B2-It's not noise. It's music!.mp3
lines.transcript: It's not noise. It's music!

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-00000005B825.0B2-Very well. You're making too much music.mp3
lines.transcript: Very well. You're making too much music.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005B817.0B2-I've met a few red-blooded Vikings over the years.mp3
lines.transcript: I've met a few red-blooded Vikings over the years.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005B84D.0B2-Anyone I might know_.mp3
lines.transcript: Anyone I might know?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-00000005B818.0B2-I didn't catch their names.mp3
lines.transcript: I didn't catch their names.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-00000005F10A.0B2-You claim you are skilled. That remains to be seen.mp3
lines.transcript: You claim you are skilled. That remains to be seen.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F121.0B2-What's that_ You're hiding so far in the backline, I can barely hear you!.mp3
lines.transcript: What's that? You're hiding so far in the backline, I can barely hear you!

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-0000000620EC.0B2-Are you ever tempted to contact your wife_.mp3
lines.transcript: Are you ever tempted to contact your wife?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.transcript: No.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-0000000620EB.0B2-Afraid she would try to kill you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Afraid she would try to kill you?

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 4-Reaper-000000061F97.0B2-I'd be surprised if she didn't.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd be surprised if she didn't.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-0000000620EE.0B2-Gerard spoke of you often.mp3
lines.transcript: Gerard spoke of you often.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F76.0B2-Did he say I warned him about you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Did he say I warned him about you?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-0000000620EF.0B2-Yes. He thought it was funny.mp3
lines.transcript: Yes. He thought it was funny.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000062BF2.0B2-Was the lily on Gerard's grave yours_.mp3
lines.transcript: Was the lily on Gerard's grave yours?

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-000000062F74.0B2-You know we were close.mp3
lines.transcript: You know we were close.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-000000063FE0.0B2-Not close enough to know he preferred roses.mp3
lines.transcript: Not close enough to know he preferred roses.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000063FDE.0B2-(French)_ I am surrounded, as usual, by moronic men. (sigh).mp3
lines.transcript: (French): I am surrounded, as usual, by moronic men. (sigh)

lines.speaker: Baptiste
lines.filename: 2-Baptiste-000000063A26.0B2-Careful! You never know who speaks French.mp3
lines.transcript: Careful! You never know who speaks French.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-0000000655FD.0B2-What experience do you possibly bring to this mission_.mp3
lines.transcript: What experience do you possibly bring to this mission?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000065B79.0B2-Last week, my friends and I sank a Hashimoto party boat.mp3
lines.transcript: Last week, my friends and I sank a Hashimoto party boat.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-0000000655FE.0B2-So... nothing. (sigh).mp3
lines.transcript: So... nothing. (sigh)

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 1-Widowmaker-000000068EFB.0B2-Poor girl. There are ways to numb your pain.mp3
lines.transcript: Poor girl. There are ways to numb your pain.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000068C97.0B2-That feels wrong. Would I even be the same person_.mp3
lines.transcript: That feels wrong. Would I even be the same person?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 3-Widowmaker-000000068EFC.0B2-Of course not. You would be stronger.mp3
lines.transcript: Of course not. You would be stronger.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000001FD5B.0B2-Genji! This is just like old times.mp3
lines.transcript: Genji! This is just like old times.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000001FF0C.0B2-Our paths cross for now. As to the future, we shall see.mp3
lines.transcript: Our paths cross for now. As to the future, we shall see...

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000002EDA5.0B2-Mei, is this where you were stationed before_ Mei_.mp3
lines.transcript: Mei, is this where you were stationed before? Mei?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-00000002ED5D.0B2-Oh, it's nothing, Winston.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, it's nothing, Winston.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000037625.0B2-Tell Efi if she's ever in Gibraltar, she should look me up!.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell Efi if she's ever in Gibraltar, she should look me up!

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-000000038FDE.0B2-Efi would be honored to be able to meet such an accomplished scientist and a member of Overwatch!.mp3
lines.transcript: Efi would be honored to be able to meet such an accomplished scientist and a member of Overwatch!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000048B76.0B2-Overwatch had good reason to shut down your research.mp3
lines.transcript: Overwatch had good reason to shut down your research.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-000000046872.0B2-I shouldn't be surprised at such a narrow opinion coming from a jumped-up ape.mp3
lines.transcript: I shouldn't be surprised at such a narrow opinion coming from a jumped-up ape.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000048B77.0B2-Tekhartha Zenyatta, do you believe that Overwatch should return_.mp3
lines.transcript: Tekhartha Zenyatta, do you believe that Overwatch should return?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-000000044260.0B2-I believe that we must all do our part to find solutions to the troubles that are before us.mp3
lines.transcript: I believe that we must all do our part to find solutions to the troubles that are before us.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000002EDAD.0B2-Someone's going to put a stop to your illegal activities.mp3
lines.transcript: Someone's going to put a stop to your illegal activities.

lines.speaker: Soldier_ 76
lines.filename: 2-Soldier_ 76-00000002B76D.0B2-You're one to talk. You and your friends are breaking the law, same as me.mp3
lines.transcript: You're one to talk. You and your friends are breaking the law, same as me.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000000B048.0B2-Need any adjustments to your chronal accelerator_.mp3
lines.transcript: Need any adjustments to your chronal accelerator?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-00000000AFB3.0B2-(garbled static sounds) Just kidding, Winston. It works great!.mp3
lines.transcript: (garbled static sounds) Just kidding, Winston. It works great!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000003761E.0B2-I stopped you once. I can do it again.mp3
lines.transcript: I stopped you once. I can do it again.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-000000041440.0B2-I wouldn't count on that.mp3
lines.transcript: I wouldn't count on that.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000058606.0B2-We've been through a lot, escaping from the moon.mp3
lines.transcript: We've been through a lot, escaping from the moon.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-000000058603.0B2-You're right, that would be much worse.mp3
lines.transcript: You're right, that would be much worse.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000058604.0B2-Hammond, how did you escape anyway_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hammond, how did you escape anyway?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-000000058605.0B2-What_ That explains the drag when I lifted off... I was sure that my calculations were correct.mp3
lines.transcript: What? That explains the drag when I lifted off... I was sure that my calculations were correct.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000037624.0B2-Mei, if you don't have anything else going on, you should come celebrate the holidays with Tracer, Emil.mp3
lines.transcript: Mei, if you don't have anything else going on, you should come celebrate the holidays with Tracer, Emily, Athena, and me!

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.filename: 2-Mei-000000036DB9.0B2-I'd love to! We could have hot pot!.mp3
lines.transcript: I'd love to! We could have hot pot!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000048B75.0B2-Hammond_.mp3
lines.transcript: Hammond?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-0000000584B3.0B2-I'm sure the rum distillery's business would give Maximilien a lot of room to hide Talon's money in.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm sure the rum distillery's business would give Maximilien a lot of room to hide Talon's money in.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000058639.0B2-He knows what he's doing, give him that.mp3
lines.transcript: He knows what he's doing, give him that.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-0000000585E5.0B2-(sighs) I wish he could do my taxes.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) I wish he could do my taxes.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-00000005863A.0B2-You pay taxes_ What, to the moon_.mp3
lines.transcript: You pay taxes? What, to the moon?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-0000000585E6.0B2-No, Switzerland.mp3
lines.transcript: No, Switzerland.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 6-Tracer-00000005863B.0B2-You know, a gorilla from the moon paying Swiss taxes is probably just the kind of situation Max would be.mp3
lines.transcript: You know, a gorilla from the moon paying Swiss taxes is probably just the kind of situation Max would be great at. (laughs)

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 7-Winston-0000000585E7.0B2-I'll be sure to ask when we catch him.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll be sure to ask when we catch him.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-0000000585ED.0B2-(sniffs) Mmm… something smells delicious. Like empanadas.mp3
lines.transcript: (sniffs) Mmm&  something smells delicious. Like empanadas.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000586A4.0B2-Mmm, I haven’t had a good empanada in ages.mp3
lines.transcript: Mmm, I haven t had a good empanada in ages.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-000000058773.0B2-Have you tried the ones in the cafeteria_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you tried the ones in the cafeteria?

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-000000058695.0B2-Like I said.mp3
lines.transcript: Like I said.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-0000000585EE.0B2-I smell a storm coming.mp3
lines.transcript: I smell a storm coming.

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 2-Sojourn-000000058774.0B2-You _smell_ a storm coming_ Can't you see it_.mp3
lines.transcript: You *smell* a storm coming? Can't you see it?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-0000000585E2.0B2-I meant in addition to that.mp3
lines.transcript: I meant in addition to that.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005860D.0B2-Tracer, you and I make a great team!.mp3
lines.transcript: Tracer, you and I make a great team!

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-000000058696.0B2-Aw, Winston, you know you're more than a teammate to me.mp3
lines.transcript: Aw, Winston, you know you're more than a teammate to me.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 3-Tracer-00000005869C.0B2-Friends for life!.mp3
lines.transcript: Friends for life!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-000000058612.0B2-All this upheaval in Overwatch... it makes me nervous for the future.mp3
lines.transcript: All this upheaval in Overwatch... it makes me nervous for the future.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000586A1.0B2-There's no point in worrying about the things that are out of your control.mp3
lines.transcript: There's no point in worrying about the things that are out of your control.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000005860E.0B2-That's good advice.mp3
lines.transcript: That's good advice.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 4-Tracer-000000058697.0B2-Read it on the side of a hoverbus.mp3
lines.transcript: Read it on the side of a hoverbus.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005BCDB.0B2-I remember you. You visited the doctor on the Lunar Colony.mp3
lines.transcript: I remember you. You visited the doctor on the Lunar Colony.

lines.speaker: Sigma
lines.filename: 2-Sigma-000000058D24.0B2-(sighs) He was a good friend. And you were much smaller back then.mp3
lines.transcript: (sighs) He was a good friend. And you were much smaller back then.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005BCDC.0B2-Echo... you've shown capabilities that should not be possible.mp3
lines.transcript: Echo... you've shown capabilities that should not be possible.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000005BCDD.0B2-Why did Dr. Liao keep so many secrets from us_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why did Dr. Liao keep so many secrets from us?

lines.speaker: Echo
lines.filename: 3-Echo-00000005A92F.0B2-She had her reasons. But all I want to do is to help.mp3
lines.transcript: She had her reasons. But all I want to do is to help.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005BCDF.0B2-How are you bypassing device firewalls_ Localized microbursts of EMPs_.mp3
lines.transcript: How are you bypassing device firewalls? Localized microbursts of EMPs?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 2-Sombra-00000005BC02.0B2-You know I'm not going to tell you.mp3
lines.transcript: You know I'm not going to tell you.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000005BCE0.0B2-Controlled zero-point energy fluctuations_.mp3
lines.transcript: Controlled zero-point energy fluctuations?

lines.speaker: Sombra
lines.filename: 4-Sombra-00000005BBFC.0B2-Stop it!.mp3
lines.transcript: Stop it!

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005BF50.0B2-Maybe this isn't the best time, but it feels good to be back together again, doesn't it_.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe this isn't the best time, but it feels good to be back together again, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000005E598.0B2-So, Sojourn... why didn't you answer the recall_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, Sojourn... why didn't you answer the recall?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 3-Sojourn-00000005BF51.0B2-Ask me later.mp3
lines.transcript: Ask me later.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 4-Winston-00000005BF52.0B2-Okay, when_.mp3
lines.transcript: Okay, when?

lines.speaker: Sojourn
lines.filename: 5-Sojourn-00000005BF53.0B2-Let's start with _not now_ and see how it goes.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's start with "not now" and see how it goes.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 6-Winston-00000005BF54.0B2-Oh.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005C539.0B2-Athena, how long ago was this photo taken_.mp3
lines.transcript: Athena, how long ago was this photo taken?

lines.speaker: Athena
lines.filename: 2-Athena-00000005C544.0B2-Have you forgotten how old you are again_.mp3
lines.transcript: Have you forgotten how old you are again?

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000005C540.0B2-No. That's ridiculous.mp3
lines.transcript: No. That's ridiculous.

lines.speaker: Athena
lines.filename: 4-Athena-00000005C62E.0B2-Winston.mp3
lines.transcript: Winston.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 5-Winston-00000005C60B.0B2-All right, yes.mp3
lines.transcript: All right, yes.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000005C642.0B2-Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table_.mp3
lines.transcript: Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.transcript: Na!

lines.speaker: Brigitte
lines.filename: 3-Brigitte-00000005C649.0B2-Na!.mp3
lines.transcript: Na!

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.transcript: Na!

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.transcript: Na.

lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000006AD0C.0B2-You seem like a born archaeologist! Would you say it's... _in your bones_.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000006ACFA.0B2-You know, Agent Skov... when the world needs saving, there's no one more up to the challenge than searc.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Freja-00000006B624.0B2-Hmm. Maybe you ought to find someone who still does it, then.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000006AD00.0B2-Fika, were you playing on my desk again_ You accidentally tripped my security systems!.mp3

lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000006ACFE.0B2-(chuckle) Aww, it's okay. I'll find you something else to play with.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckle) Aww, it's okay. I'll find you something else to play with.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 1-Winston-00000006AD07.0B2-You remind me of an old friend from the Lunar Colony.mp3
lines.transcript: You remind me of an old friend from the Lunar Colony.

lines.speaker: Winston
lines.filename: 3-Winston-00000006AD0B.0B2-You're both smart, and cute, and love finding trouble! I hope I can introduce you to him one day.mp3
lines.transcript: You're both smart, and cute, and love finding trouble! I hope I can introduce you to him one day.

lines.filename: 1-Wrecking Ball-000000062618.0B2-(hamster noises) He wonders if you are staying out of combat.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He wonders if you are staying out of combat.

lines.filename: 3-Wrecking Ball-000000062619.0B2-(hamster noises) He asks why you left your gun at home, then.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He asks why you left your gun at home, then.

lines.speaker: Hanzo

lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He wants to know if you can make biolight vegetables.

lines.filename: 3-Wrecking Ball-0000000686E9.0B2-(hamster noises) Next time he will steal first and ask never.mp3

lines.filename: 2-Winston-00000006AD0D.0B2-Because it doesn't like dry humor_.mp3

lines.filename: 1-Wuyang-000000069D0B.0B2-Hey, you're that famous Mecha Guardian player, right_ Could you train me_.mp3

lines.speaker: Wuyang
