lines.transcript: (thoughtful grunt)

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000063C42.0B2-Tell me, omnic. Do you dream_.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell me, omnic. Do you dream?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635E4.0B2-I dream of peace. And, sometimes, falling.mp3
lines.transcript: I dream of peace. And, sometimes, falling.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000063C43.0B2-Perhaps we have more in common than I thought.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps we have more in common than I thought.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000063C48.0B2-You do too much cardio, not enough weight training.mp3
lines.transcript: You do too much cardio, not enough weight training.

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000062DB7.0B2-I'll lift some weights if you go jogging with me.mp3
lines.transcript: I'll lift some weights if you go jogging with me.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000063C49.0B2-We will see if you can keep up.mp3
lines.transcript: We will see if you can keep up.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000063C4A.0B2-So, you throw tiny daggers_.mp3
lines.transcript: So, you throw tiny daggers?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 2-Kiriko-000000062DC3.0B2-Is that a problem_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is that a problem?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000063C4B.0B2-Depends. How often do you miss_.mp3
lines.transcript: Depends. How often do you miss?

lines.speaker: Kiriko
lines.filename: 4-Kiriko-000000062DC5.0B2-Let's find out.mp3
lines.transcript: Let's find out.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000063C44.0B2-You rarely preach about victory.mp3
lines.transcript: You rarely preach about victory.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 2-Zenyatta-0000000635EE.0B2-Is victory so important_.mp3
lines.transcript: Is victory so important?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000063C45.0B2-If it isn't, why are you here_.mp3
lines.transcript: If it isn't, why are you here?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 4-Zenyatta-0000000635EF.0B2-Indeed, why are we here_.mp3
lines.transcript: Indeed, why are we here?

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-0000000648D0.0B2-Your pets are quite handsome.mp3
lines.transcript: Your pets are quite handsome.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000063CA5.0B2-The dragons are not _pets_… but thank you.mp3
lines.transcript: The dragons are not "pets"&  but thank you.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-0000000648CE.0B2-Rat. Say _thank you_.mp3
lines.transcript: Rat. Say "thank you".

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 2-Junkrat-000000063D67.0B2-Ah! My most sinciferest thanks to the second most intimidating person I know.mp3
lines.transcript: Ah! My most sinciferest thanks to the second most intimidating person I know.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-0000000648CD.0B2-Nowhere to run.mp3
lines.transcript: Nowhere to run.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-0000000644CF.0B2-Nowhere to hide!.mp3
lines.transcript: Nowhere to hide!

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-0000000648CC.0B2-Good thinking, omnic! Uh... processing. Whatever.mp3
lines.transcript: Good thinking, omnic! Uh... processing. Whatever.

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-00000006440C.0B2-(giggly beeps).mp3
lines.transcript: (giggly beeps)

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-0000000648CB.0B2-Just like we planned. I pulled them together, and.mp3
lines.transcript: Just like we planned. I pulled them together, and...

lines.speaker: Pharah
lines.filename: 2-Pharah-00000006401D.0B2-Yeah yeah yeah, I blew them up.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah yeah yeah, I blew them up.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000065F5E.0B2-You talk big, but can you deliver_.mp3
lines.transcript: You talk big, but can you deliver?

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000066A3A.0B2-With a big red bow on top.mp3
lines.transcript: With a big red bow on top.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000065F64.0B2-I prefer pink.mp3
lines.transcript: I prefer pink.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 4-Mauga-000000066A39.0B2-For you, I can make it happen.mp3
lines.transcript: For you, I can make it happen.

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 1-Zarya-000000065F5C.0B2-I'm the muscle of the team.mp3
lines.transcript: I'm the muscle of the team.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-000000066A37.0B2-No, I'm the muscle!.mp3
lines.transcript: No, I'm the muscle!

lines.speaker: Zarya
lines.filename: 3-Zarya-000000065F63.0B2-Well, you are certainly not the brains.mp3
lines.transcript: Well, you are certainly not the brains.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 4-Mauga-000000066A24.0B2-(chuckles) I like you.mp3
lines.transcript: (chuckles) I like you.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000000AD3B.0B2-So this is where you grew up. You must show me around!.mp3
lines.transcript: So this is where you grew up. You must show me around!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000000BA28.0B2-That was another life.mp3
lines.transcript: That was another life.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000044269.0B2-Symmetra, you speak of law and of order, but you must know that life is chaotic by its very nature.mp3
lines.transcript: Symmetra, you speak of law and of order, but you must know that life is chaotic by its very nature.

lines.speaker: Symmetra
lines.filename: 2-Symmetra-000000043E9C.0B2-To be lectured about chaos and disorder from a machine.mp3
lines.transcript: To be lectured about chaos and disorder from a machine.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000021FF1.0B2-I sense within you the same rage that once consumed your brother.mp3
lines.transcript: I sense within you the same rage that once consumed your brother.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-000000021196.0B2-We are nothing alike.mp3
lines.transcript: We are nothing alike.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000044268.0B2-Genji, how was your reunion with your brother_.mp3
lines.transcript: Genji, how was your reunion with your brother?

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000004BCE4.0B2-He is still not ready for time to flow forward again.mp3
lines.transcript: He is still not ready for time to flow forward again.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-00000004C50F.0B2-Time is a river. It may be stopped for a while, but it will always flow the same direction.mp3
lines.transcript: Time is a river. It may be stopped for a while, but it will always flow the same direction.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000004C50E.0B2-I believe that you could find peace, if you were to search within yourself.mp3
lines.transcript: I believe that you could find peace, if you were to search within yourself.

lines.speaker: Doomfist
lines.filename: 2-Doomfist-000000041465.0B2-What is tranquility but stagnation_.mp3
lines.transcript: What is tranquility but stagnation?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000002EFC4.0B2-Do you have any dreams, my friend_.mp3
lines.transcript: Do you have any dreams, my friend?

lines.speaker: Orisa
lines.filename: 2-Orisa-0000000352AB.0B2-I do not dream as humans do... but it is my desire to become the hero Efi believes that I am.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not dream as humans do... but it is my desire to become the hero Efi believes that I am.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000000AD55.0B2-It is good to fight alongside one of my brightest pupils.mp3
lines.transcript: It is good to fight alongside one of my brightest pupils.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-00000000BA50.0B2-And you, master.mp3
lines.transcript: And you, master.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000000AD2E.0B2-Tell me your thoughts, my friend.mp3
lines.transcript: Tell me your thoughts, my friend.

lines.speaker: Bastion
lines.filename: 2-Bastion-000000052B9F.0B2-(quizzical beep).mp3
lines.transcript: (quizzical beep)

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000055591.0B2-When I gazed into the iris, I found a great nothingness... it changed me. You must have experienced th.mp3
lines.transcript: When I gazed into the iris, I found a great nothingness... it changed me. You must have experienced the same.

lines.speaker: Tracer
lines.filename: 2-Tracer-0000000550C0.0B2-That is not what I saw.mp3
lines.transcript: That is not what I saw.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000055589.0B2-I do not sense the spark of life within you.mp3
lines.transcript: I do not sense the spark of life within you.

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005B805.0B2-Why do you think that is_.mp3
lines.transcript: Why do you think that is?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000555A4.0B2-Some believe that the full moon is a good omen.mp3
lines.transcript: Some believe that the full moon is a good omen.

lines.speaker: Cassidy
lines.filename: 2-Cassidy-000000054FE1.0B2-Maybe if you're a werewolf.mp3
lines.transcript: Maybe if you're a werewolf.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000005559D.0B2-When did you receive this curse, countess_.mp3
lines.transcript: When did you receive this curse, countess?

lines.speaker: Widowmaker
lines.filename: 2-Widowmaker-00000005B80C.0B2-It is no curse.mp3
lines.transcript: It is no curse.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000005559B.0B2-You blame yourself for the dragons' reign of terror... but it is not your fault.mp3
lines.transcript: You blame yourself for the dragons' reign of terror... but it is not your fault.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005556A.0B2-You weren't there, monk. You don't know about my failure.mp3
lines.transcript: You weren't there, monk. You don't know about my failure.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000005559A.0B2-Rarely has my path crossed a warrior as cheerful as you.mp3
lines.transcript: Rarely has my path crossed a warrior as cheerful as you.

lines.speaker: Torbjörn
lines.filename: 2-Torbjörn-00000005555C.0B2-When you've seen as much as I have, either you laugh or you go mad.mp3
lines.transcript: When you've seen as much as I have, either you laugh or you go mad.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000055599.0B2-A pause in the battle. An opportunity to recenter our minds.mp3
lines.transcript: A pause in the battle. An opportunity to recenter our minds.

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000550E0.0B2-I am centered.mp3
lines.transcript: I am centered.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000055598.0B2-Take care that you do not spend yourself before the battle is done!.mp3
lines.transcript: Take care that you do not spend yourself before the battle is done!

lines.speaker: Genji
lines.filename: 2-Genji-0000000550DF.0B2-I am only just getting started.mp3
lines.transcript: I am only just getting started.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-00000005F116.0B2-There is much to admire about a rebellious spirit. Questioning tradition is how new tradition is forme.mp3
lines.transcript: There is much to admire about a rebellious spirit. Questioning tradition is how new tradition is formed.

lines.speaker: D.Va
lines.filename: 2-D.Va-00000005F125.0B2-Oh, that's good! I'll use that the next time Sojourn gives me trouble.mp3
lines.transcript: Oh, that's good! I'll use that the next time Sojourn gives me trouble.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000635E6.0B2-I sense that your hardest battle is yet to come.mp3
lines.transcript: I sense that your hardest battle is yet to come.

lines.speaker: Hanzo
lines.filename: 2-Hanzo-0000000630E0.0B2-Hmph. I will best any enemy, no matter how strong.mp3
lines.transcript: Hmph. I will best any enemy, no matter how strong.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-0000000635E7.0B2-And what of the enemy within_.mp3
lines.transcript: And what of the enemy within?

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000635EC.0B2-Those who seek only to enrich themselves live the most impoverished lives of all.mp3
lines.transcript: Those who seek only to enrich themselves live the most impoverished lives of all.

lines.speaker: Roadhog
lines.filename: 2-Roadhog-000000063DC5.0B2-(sigh).mp3
lines.transcript: (sigh)

lines.speaker: Junkrat
lines.filename: 3-Junkrat-000000063D63.0B2-That's why I'm an artist.mp3
lines.transcript: That's why I'm an artist.

lines.speaker: Ashe
lines.filename: 4-Ashe-000000063D29.0B2-Yeah_ And those who seek my wrath tend to find it.mp3
lines.transcript: Yeah? And those who seek my wrath tend to find it.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000635F0.0B2-I have always wondered what it is like being inside an orb.mp3
lines.transcript: I have always wondered what it is like being inside an orb.

lines.speaker: Wrecking Ball
lines.filename: 2-Wrecking Ball-000000063959.0B2-(hamster noises) He says, _Don't even think about it._.mp3
lines.transcript: (hamster noises) He says, "Don't even think about it."

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000635F3.0B2-You spend your second chance at life walking a lonely road.mp3
lines.transcript: You spend your second chance at life walking a lonely road.

lines.speaker: Reaper
lines.filename: 2-Reaper-00000006384B.0B2-No one cares, monk.mp3
lines.transcript: No one cares, monk.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-0000000635F4.0B2-Someone always cares. You must simply seek them out.mp3
lines.transcript: Someone always cares. You must simply seek them out.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000635F5.0B2-You have an intense gaze, Doctor.mp3
lines.transcript: You have an intense gaze, Doctor.

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 2-Moira-000000064419.0B2-I am thinking on how best to utilize you.mp3
lines.transcript: I am thinking on how best to utilize you.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-0000000635F6.0B2-In the coming battle, you mean_.mp3
lines.transcript: In the coming battle, you mean?

lines.speaker: Moira
lines.filename: 4-Moira-00000006441E.0B2-Perhaps.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000658DC.0B2-There is a new sadness in you, brother.mp3
lines.transcript: There is a new sadness in you, brother.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 2-Ramattra-000000063FEB.0B2-No. I've simply grown tired of pretending I am content.mp3
lines.transcript: No. I've simply grown tired of pretending I am content.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-0000000658DB.0B2-Perhaps I can share your burden.mp3
lines.transcript: Perhaps I can share your burden.

lines.speaker: Ramattra
lines.filename: 4-Ramattra-000000063FED.0B2-You already do.mp3
lines.transcript: You already do.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-0000000658E0.0B2-It is often those with the loudest voice who have the most to lose.mp3
lines.transcript: It is often those with the loudest voice who have the most to lose.

lines.speaker: Mauga
lines.filename: 2-Mauga-00000006783D.0B2-Good thing I always win!.mp3
lines.transcript: Good thing I always win!

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 1-Zenyatta-000000068626.0B2-True strength comes to those who accept their weaknesses.mp3
lines.transcript: True strength comes to those who accept their weaknesses.

lines.speaker: Illari
lines.filename: 2-Illari-000000066DAE.0B2-That's not what I was taught.mp3
lines.transcript: That's not what I was taught.

lines.speaker: Zenyatta
lines.filename: 3-Zenyatta-000000068628.0B2-But it is never too late to learn.mp3
lines.transcript: But it is never too late to learn.

lines.speaker: Zeus
lines.filename: 1-Zeus-0000000656DA.0B2-The Battle for Olympus is complete!.mp3
lines.transcript: The Battle for Olympus is complete!

lines.speaker: Zeus
lines.filename: 2-Zeus-0000000656D9.0B2-Our champion will be immortalized in stone for all eternity.mp3
lines.transcript: Our champion will be immortalized in stone for all eternity.
